subject: I’m fighting to save my son
body:

My Dear Friend, My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason.You may have heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or on Fox News.I am James’s father, but because I refused to accept that my 5 YEAR OLD boy should be surgically and chemically castrated......I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James. That’s why I’m writing to you today. **[I need your help.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9b67224baee84af999e91a502617fe66&_e=YHsB5X5k8spTCcpPYsCCV5ZFH_O3XZym7_kKNs4QBI-rvv5pcZ6PPCW94XyZjPUVXG1pTduVZvPTg0Clfb7On8plr6nUHswQqenIsjyJaD8BiwlcpHYhUG8Woy9bO62KmOU0r0a35RXvnF3g-WVk1s0oQGVthy7SIIZlkS162RTtSQxLi2KMLMf4vYMNVA2FQLuTY9c85dMrdjfZhFP5g4KsU3OhtoyQcUnyB5GlC_IwW4ZqYKcUpI82_apSaPAL0fJq3RdJ-PT6Rr_W6hSoMEaqY_wIQcbLLv_-oDAfNdA8NUC7tdAgpRzC7v6jbSJfhPoJMjne27-JFLldTrlODmglahSMfemJy_FuX_HS3SR25aolWQBOB0YxyPS-aRk8)** I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... I want to keep fighting, but I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me in the fight to **Save James** , **[would you consider making a generous $25 contribution to my Legal Defense Fund today?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9b67224baee84af999e91a502617fe66&_e=YHsB5X5k8spTCcpPYsCCV5ZFH_O3XZym7_kKNs4QBI-rvv5pcZ6PPCW94XyZjPUVXG1pTduVZvPTg0Clfb7On8plr6nUHswQqenIsjyJaD8BiwlcpHYhUG8Woy9bO62KmOU0r0a35RXvnF3g-WVk1s0oQGVthy7SIIZlkS162RTtSQxLi2KMLMf4vYMNVA2FQLuTY9c85dMrdjfZhFP5g4KsU3OhtoyQcUnyB5GlC_Ja_KmHuA6CXxuEgKGvXZbZnwwyhZUPpZWGxZsmMhrjrRf2dQJoL5Td-ba6X2Bfw34VwmP1npt1bKCs2_RGOkj3_yy7LUxmJlczaH0te6Wq2a803A6ap8HCYdRovgsQywCp-MEzaHpNxDSdqpeq5CN2)** But I’m getting ahead of myself...Let me start at the beginning. When James was just two years old, my ex-wife began saying our boy James was actually a girl.I told her she was wrong, and I kept dropping my son off at school in boy’s clothes because **he is a boy**. (I can’t believe I have to say that.) I later found out that the school counselors were changing him into girl’s clothes once he got to school WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE to inflame this delusion.Then during the custody battle, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.The court-mandated supervisor would ONLY let me see James if I put him in girl’s clothes. I have never affirmed the lie that my son is a girl, nor will I ever affirm it.So I was forced to stop visiting him.It broke my heart.**Do you see what we’re up against?** I can confirm that these trans-activist judges are presiding over kangaroo courts where common sense goes right out the window.They need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And **James** needs to be **saved** from their butchery.**[THAT’S why I need your help.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9b67224baee84af999e91a502617fe66&_e=YHsB5X5k8spTCcpPYsCCV5ZFH_O3XZym7_kKNs4QBI-rvv5pcZ6PPCW94XyZjPUVXG1pTduVZvPTg0Clfb7On8plr6nUHswQqenIsjyJaD8BiwlcpHYhUG8Woy9bO62KmOU0r0a35RXvnF3g-WVk1s0oQGVthy7SIIZlkS162RTtSQxLi2KMLMf4vYMNVA2FQLuTY9c85dMrdjfZhFP5g4KsU3OhtoyQcUnyB5GlC_Kxwz6tItNb2-6EbzbjOikkeOkvwSsW_nauR8GPLo2V3L30FpIkmiS00wVhf_vsGMhYBUECtCaJQCXMDWnWvWAmcjf4YY161u7xNkmXwewY2g0Yd_gtmf-u86hW3ug3VzVGuagiZtY9QiR7yaaprQZb)** I am under a gag order currently to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Obviously, I’m not abiding by that order because it’s blatantly unconstitutional.But that’s not even the point.If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time. But I’m not just some activist.I’m a Dad.I’m fighting to save my son.And I will never give up on **James**.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I authored the bill in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee that outlawed sex change surgeries for minors.I then spent every dollar I had to make sure cowardly politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, but then my ex-wife just took James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state.And there was nothing I could do to stop it.And that’s the scary part:**If this can happen in Texas, it can happen anywhere.** Then in California, the radical judge railroaded me and gave my ex-wife free reign to proceed with the castration.I can’t even appeal the case because he sealed all the court records...I’ll have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process...On top of that, the other side is trying to make ME pay THEIR legal fees...**Do you see what we’re up against?** But if Conservatives won’t put up a fight, how will we ever win? That’s where Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) comes in. They heard about my case and immediately offered to stand by my side. **[Will you stand with us?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9b67224baee84af999e91a502617fe66&_e=YHsB5X5k8spTCcpPYsCCV5ZFH_O3XZym7_kKNs4QBI-rvv5pcZ6PPCW94XyZjPUVXG1pTduVZvPTg0Clfb7On8plr6nUHswQqenIsjyJaD8BiwlcpHYhUG8Woy9bO62KmOU0r0a35RXvnF3g-WVk1s0oQGVthy7SIIZlkS162RTtSQxLi2KMLMf4vYMNVA2FQLuTY9c85dMrdjfZhFP5g4KsU3OhtoyQcUnyB5GlC_KWJ2dxEl1eLWKzAQuZ57Kd1SGiPRKy3pWYcGCodyEJ8fFmg6GiXtRvOos2vV0gEsdP5ZKuGk1Cfn_SkghIcOpf7Yup7B0aHMk-A2untU4EHlc2VZMx-xxR1bQXZRTtFJ9vgIJBoTolehLkkzJZx-eJ)**

P.S. I need your help to save my son. I have fought for a decade to keep radical activists and judges from transitioning my son against my will and against all reason. I have lobbied politicians, wiped out my life’s savings, and spent thousands of hours in court trying to save my son. Would you please rush me your **[Save James contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $500 or $1,000?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9b67224baee84af999e91a502617fe66&_e=YHsB5X5k8spTCcpPYsCCV5ZFH_O3XZym7_kKNs4QBI-rvv5pcZ6PPCW94XyZjPUVXG1pTduVZvPTg0Clfb7On8plr6nUHswQqenIsjyJaD8BiwlcpHYhUG8Woy9bO62KmOU0r0a35RXvnF3g-WVk1s0oQGVthy7SIIZlkS162RTtSQxLi2KMLMf4vYMNVA2FQLuTY9c85dMrdjfZhFP5g4KsU3OhtoyQcUnyB5GlC_Ldmi3ZetFc7oazV1p5tp1GQcJDaE7veNAbPf_ZzUD4r62ge0mvn2LFlifE43fIHfmdcWqOh6-rFNwK4-98uaUXRVfPDl-D0FucDaGvDDJ70SG6hH5LnhcDXRLrUwlpUMRuxEMzKmO6ofPv-HexK33x)** I need your help, and I need to know that I’m not alone in this fight.

clean_body: Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James.| | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now. | | | | | | My Dear Friend, My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason.You may have heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or on Fox News.I am James’s father, but because I refused to accept that my 5 YEAR OLD boy should be surgically and chemically castrated......I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James. That’s why I’m writing to you today. I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... I want to keep fighting, but I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me in the fight to Save James , But I’m getting ahead of myself...Let me start at the beginning. When James was just two years old, my ex-wife began saying our boy James was actually a girl.I told her she was wrong, and I kept dropping my son off at school in boy’s clothes because he is a boy. (I can’t believe I have to say that.) I later found out that the school counselors were changing him into girl’s clothes once he got to school WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE to inflame this delusion.Then during the custody battle, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.The court-mandated supervisor would ONLY let me see James if I put him in girl’s clothes. I have never affirmed the lie that my son is a girl, nor will I ever affirm it.So I was forced to stop visiting him.It broke my heart.Do you see what we’re up against? I can confirm that these trans-activist judges are presiding over kangaroo courts where common sense goes right out the window.They need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And James needs to be saved from their butchery. I am under a gag order currently to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Obviously, I’m not abiding by that order because it’s blatantly unconstitutional.But that’s not even the point.If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time. But I’m not just some activist.I’m a Dad.I’m fighting to save my son.And I will never give up on James.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I authored the bill in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee that outlawed sex change surgeries for minors.I then spent every dollar I had to make sure cowardly politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, but then my ex-wife just took James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state.And there was nothing I could do to stop it.And that’s the scary part:If this can happen in Texas, it can happen anywhere. Then in California, the radical judge railroaded me and gave my ex-wife free reign to proceed with the castration.I can’t even appeal the case because he sealed all the court records...I’ll have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process...On top of that, the other side is trying to make ME pay THEIR legal fees...Do you see what we’re up against? But if Conservatives won’t put up a fight, how will we ever win? That’s where Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) comes in. They heard about my case and immediately offered to stand by my side. | | | | | | | The fact is, if you care about keeping your children or grandchildren safe...If you want to save my son James from castration and make sure this will NEVER happen to ANY child ever again...And if you want to send a message to these radical judges that their day of reckoning has come...Then you’ll need someone who knows how these kangaroo courts ACTUALLY operate, and someone who’s willing to do WHATEVER it takes to save his son and every other kid like him.I humbly submit to you that I am that man. Your Warrior on the Frontlines,Jeff Younger P.S. I need your help to save my son. I have fought for a decade to keep radical activists and judges from transitioning my son against my will and against all reason. I have lobbied politicians, wiped out my life’s savings, and spent thousands of hours in court trying to save my son. Would you please rush me your I need your help, and I need to know that I’m not alone in this fight. Patriot's Legal Defense Fund601 Baffie Avenue Winter Park, Florida 32789

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Our 2026 Candidate Recruitment efforts are getting noticed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We’ve been saying it for years, but it’s especially clear now:

To rebuild trust with voters, win more elections, and create the kind of
change our communities desperately need, the Democratic Party must
separate itself from the same corporations and billionaires robbing
working-class people and funding right-wing extremists like Donald Trump.

That’s why we’re urging the Party to reject corporate Super PAC money once
and for all, overturn Citizens United, and support working-class
candidates for Congress.

Our work to hold the Democratic establishment accountable to its values
and re-center the working class is getting noticed:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250124?refcode=em20250124-36361&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36361_1203867_kz1W3w&akid=36361%2E1203867%2Ekz1W3w ]The Hill article: Progressives focus their ire on US 'oligarchy'
“November’s election is a mandate for the Democratic Party to clean up
shop,” said Usamah Andrabi, communications director of Justice Democrats,
the most prominent group in charge of nurturing new progressive candidates
for the House and Senate. Strategists like Andrabi say progressives are
responding to an explicit call from voters demanding that their party “rid
itself of the same consultants, donors, advisers, and career politicians
that ushered in a Republican trifecta and second Trump administration.”

We’re recruiting as many progressive, working-class leaders to run against
out-of-touch Republicans AND Democrats in the 2026 midterms as possible,
but our work directly counts on grassroots fundraising from emails like
this one.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250124?refcode=em20250124-36361&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36361_1203867_kz1W3w&akid=36361%2E1203867%2Ekz1W3w ]With just a week left until our February 1st fundraising deadline, will
you rush $5 or more to help reach our $100,000 goal?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250124?refcode=em20250124-36361&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36361_1203867_kz1W3w&akid=36361%2E1203867%2Ekz1W3w ]Contribute $5

Thanks for all you do to fuel our movement,

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250124-36361-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36361_1203867_kz1W3w&akid=36361%2E1203867%2Ekz1W3w

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, We’ve been saying it for years, but it’s especially clear now: To rebuild trust with voters, win more elections, and create the kind of change our communities desperately need, the Democratic Party must separate itself from the same corporations and billionaires robbing working-class people and funding right-wing extremists like Donald Trump. That’s why we’re urging the Party to reject corporate Super PAC money once and for all, overturn Citizens United, and support working-class candidates for Congress. Our work to hold the Democratic establishment accountable to its values and re-center the working class is getting noticed: [ ]The Hill article: Progressives focus their ire on US 'oligarchy' “November’s election is a mandate for the Democratic Party to clean up shop,” said Usamah Andrabi, communications director of Justice Democrats, the most prominent group in charge of nurturing new progressive candidates for the House and Senate. Strategists like Andrabi say progressives are responding to an explicit call from voters demanding that their party “rid itself of the same consultants, donors, advisers, and career politicians that ushered in a Republican trifecta and second Trump administration.” We’re recruiting as many progressive, working-class leaders to run against out-of-touch Republicans AND Democrats in the 2026 midterms as possible, but our work directly counts on grassroots fundraising from emails like this one. [ ]With just a week left until our February 1st fundraising deadline, will you rush $5 or more to help reach our $100,000 goal? [ ]Contribute $5 Thanks for all you do to fuel our movement, In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

subject: Pam Bondi

body:

#
---
Peter, Last week, I attended the Senate Judiciary Committee's hearing for Pam Bondi, Donald Trump’s nominee for Attorney General. Pam Bondi is a long-time ally of Donald Trump, who helped to promote Trump’s conspiracies about the legitimacy of the 2020 election and has served as chair of a pro-Trump think-tank. That’s why I took my time to question Pam Bondi and vet whether she will serve the American people, or Donald Trump. To ask whether she would take her duty to the Constitution and rule of law seriously, or treat them as less important than Trump’s wishes to weaponize the DOJ and go after his perceived enemies. I take my duty to uphold the Constitution and defend the rule of law seriously. Our Attorney General should too. **Donald Trump has promised to weaponize the Department of Justice against his political enemies — and Bondi’s hearing shows that she is the perfect person for the job.** Her loyalty to Donald Trump outweighs her loyalty to the facts: when I asked Bondi who won the 2020 election, _she couldn’t answer the question_ — or acknowledge the simple fact that in 2020, Donald Trump lost to Joe Biden. And despite Bondi saying in her hearing that she abhors violence against police officers and would look at every January 6th pardon on a “case-by-case basis,” Trump just granted sweeping pardons to over _1,600_ January 6th insurrectionists. **As Attorney General, it’s clear that Pam Bondi will go along with Trump’s every whim without holding him accountable.** So much for the party of law and order, Peter. [**We cannot let Donald Trump and Pam Bondi go unchecked. Peter,
---
Please know this letter I’ve written you comes entirely from the heart...
---
I always knew the price I could one day pay for defending President Trump from one of the most vile witch hunts in American history. And like I’ve always said, it’s a fight I’d wage over and over again.
---
But even now, after President Trump resoundingly won back the White House and DEFEATED the Democrat Swap, __there are still Deep State holdouts hellbent on**JAILING** me for the rest of my life. __
---
**I face an outstanding _INDICTMENT_ in Arizona at the hands of the Left’s cronies and accomplices that is scheduled to go to trial. **
---
But I’ll tell you what: While this case means the Left is _still_ seeking to utterly ruin me, it also means I’m just _one final step_ away from VINDICATION!
---
**Just look at the second MUGSHOT they took of me when I was booked in Maricopa County, Arizona.__Do I look scared of the Deep State to you?__**
---

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=dfed8605937e4d328ab082373e03f615&_e=RRwaztzuEThLBb4gm-1DK41QYs0XJpcrGKSLHTufJuLJNuezPzvYYyUPnHs-5wT_A6amWqKn5sLxT_qH3JqW5pFMEstGL6bips9lX-d_YWg9ur86Bs9vIq3--Lutz-FNpq_GEhpmLQL5E4KYiIA4ilLJ2DndWkgGuEWLY_4Hkm-bh8sLCeZonaS1Ha20pABmZRK4aSKi1g_-VwipO_niRwRW-mabgOE1e45NcqmRtXS6oYoMjmdSDdSp-SN8Tls134HIgLTUwBRXvPcTcE743ereukvIpNFeX551G-wJs7M0YVt1PSeiJ5YPH9tkVibOZocRp2a-SP5-Ijg7-KMloo_Gjr4PfEFkHElLNzwxoefhDt5E8KOkINEp4HT-vZSkpU_t1JtOCYJB2GKUI_NVLNi1B1aUbTDpgrRDn1pgUFHQgBkSFGVb9i2RvxcNEgt2)
__
---

My resolve to fight this injustice – not _just_ for my freedom, but for the freedom of ALL Americans – will **_NEVER_** waver.
---
And despite the Fake News calling me “a dead man walking,” I’m still standing strong without an ounce of fear – _thanks to unbelievably kind and generous souls like _YOU_ who have given me the resources and support I need to remain a FREE man._
---
_If you can afford to contribute, please know any contribution you can make to my Legal Defense Trust will be greatly appreciated to fight this sham INDICTMENT – the Deep State’s FINAL witch hunt against me._

clean_body: This final case is my path to vindication. | Peter, Please know this letter I’ve written you comes entirely from the heart... I always knew the price I could one day pay for defending President Trump from one of the most vile witch hunts in American history. And like I’ve always said, it’s a fight I’d wage over and over again. But even now, after President Trump resoundingly won back the White House and DEFEATED the Democrat Swap, there are still Deep State holdouts hellbent onJAILING me for the rest of my life. I face an outstanding INDICTMENT in Arizona at the hands of the Left’s cronies and accomplices that is scheduled to go to trial. But I’ll tell you what: While this case means the Left is still seeking to utterly ruin me, it also means I’m just one final step away from VINDICATION! Just look at the second MUGSHOT they took of me when I was booked in Maricopa County, Arizona.Do I look scared of the Deep State to you? My resolve to fight this injustice – not just for my freedom, but for the freedom of ALL Americans – will NEVER waver. And despite the Fake News calling me “a dead man walking,” I’m still standing strong without an ounce of fear – thanks to unbelievably kind and generous souls like YOU who have given me the resources and support I need to remain a FREE man. If you can afford to contribute, please know any contribution you can make to my Legal Defense Trust will be greatly appreciated to fight this sham INDICTMENT – the Deep State’s FINAL witch hunt against me. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |

Friend,

America's golden age is here.

And a new year and a new government means a fresh start, _and a new Speaker 's Survey._

That's right \- now that our GOP trifecta is off to the races, it's time for Americans to set the agenda.

**[Complete the Speaker's Survey today and be one of the FIRST responses my team lays eyes on.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c82e732d2c1344f5b85344d8403b9c53&_e=fCnpclnmguyEognmURXKwsUrH8GejrS3MUsH1IKPlfec94TtnHg2LjAOrcvU2xQ0BmiTUqPra68Vrwc0eAXbmy45UwmUr8s1q1eu-LCJQQOOCvEMQxkCfeiNFTemk1le5Y5yDRGwmhnm5zHbmZaqb_uK2akfokLz07GVZmuIFIJfWOPX-3-B4kNj_UwXwxh3lylByZYKKdN4dM-OD1V83pJtbbFRQasj2wO_-yEqjMLiioCzFfDjDZZ5AMnHfvPfveRGCjPzqrRp-iluljbEoAny1kpwX_mLvJAbGlqGfRI08zMOh1N-aD1v9sjqULOCOzEINgaJa_nWADuS5JHpNvbXjiPbSU5OZWkQhsnu0JHTotsPBIksKzNP7P-gWVptygBYHly21KeHC0S_4b-utQ%3D%3D "Complete the Speaker’s Survey today and be one of the FIRST responses my team lays eyes on.")**

Make no mistake about it, Friend, there is a LOT of work to be done if we're to undo all the harm Joe Biden has done and get our country back on track.

_**And these first 100 days are PIVOTAL.**_

Which is why my team and I have issued the Speaker's Survey- to see what the American people have to say on all the important issues of the day. **[Can I ask you to complete this important Survey today?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c82e732d2c1344f5b85344d8403b9c53&_e=fCnpclnmguyEognmURXKwsUrH8GejrS3MUsH1IKPlfec94TtnHg2LjAOrcvU2xQ0BmiTUqPra68Vrwc0eAXbmy45UwmUr8s1q1eu-LCJQQOOCvEMQxkCfeiNFTemk1le5Y5yDRGwmhnm5zHbmZaqb_uK2akfokLz07GVZmuIFIJfWOPX-3-B4kNj_UwXwxh3lylByZYKKdN4dM-OD1V83pJtbbFRQasj2wO_-yEqjMLiioCzFfDjDZZ5AMnHfvPfxrG4sUwSigtSr4etWBeG1Q9sZ6rOBAuOl8jcjhaLszUj-KvKGSS9DoNxGJ6Iqz0BZ3Q9b-1xfP6yAe6yxoiFDdIjXJYuVDi1biqWN7QgUESQEDb0yC1ohq5K4rURNtR-3r9PxPdZJCd7lMJE03mQEA%3D%3D "Can I ask you to complete this important Survey today?")**

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Trump Begins to Clean House!
body:
Mass Deportations Begin!

[INSIDE JW]

Trump Persevered and Triumphed against Lawfare

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72053&L=34319&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vbGl2ZS9ROGUtaVlLQm5nMD9zaT1wUXg2UVB5emk4MUVPV0VXJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=1b59aabdf849862e67c164645dbd6a1bc133481c5ff98ca7bc205dfeddc83b98]

The Left tried through lawfare and every other trick in the book to
derail President Trump’s electoral victory, but the voters
essentially found President Donald Trump “innocent” of his
political opponents’ fake charges. Trump persevered and triumphed in
the courts, as well as in the court of public opinion. Let us hope
that his success puts an end to the practice of lawfare for good.

Democrat-allied prosecutors and judges did their best to derail this
presidency, but the people have spoken and now the reversal of the
failed (and frequently unconstitutional) policies of the Biden
administration are being reversed. America has reason to hope again
for a country that is led by the rule of law.

President Trump’s first-day executive orders correctly address the
border, rule of law, and constitutional crises created by the Biden
regime. And his pardons and commutations related to the January 6
defendants are fair, just and brave.

Judicial Watch remains ready, willing and able to help (and sue) for
government accountability as we continue our mission to ensure clean
elections, secure borders, and transparency in government – and to
thwart the Left’s attack on our constitutional republic through
their censorship of free speech and abuse of power.

We are pushing for accountability and transparency in Fulton County,
GA, where the court recently issued an order
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72053&L=34320&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmljdG9yeS1hZ2FpbnN0LWZhbmktd2lsbGlzL11ncmFudGluZz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=35508271ebf6e2921570b7347d406f9f5a6fedf9a08901338dfa858522b6054f
“attorney’s fees and costs” in an open records lawsuit for
communications Willis had with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the
House January 6 Committee. Judicial Watch has also filed a motion
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72053&L=34142&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3BlY2lhbC1tYXN0ZXItZmFuaS13aWxsaXMtbGF3c3VpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=92eca92d5601482638ade33244983bdaa35e7f9f3263c7b67e93914506e9d15a]
asking
the court to appoint a special master
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72053&L=34130&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtd2lsbGlzLW1vdGlvbi1mb3ItYWRkLXN1cHBvcnQtMDAyODA1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=05e71cb48ef77d95def1e5e9ba3c222ccbfe27cbf6c081b77ec56e14751b59fc]
to
oversee her search for records.

As you know, we are a national leader in voting integrity and voting
rights. As part of our work, we assembled a team of highly experienced
voting rights attorneys who stopped discriminatory elections in
Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls in California, Ohio, Indiana, and
Kentucky, among other achievements
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72053&L=33927&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFnL2VsZWN0aW9uK2xhdz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=03a9e41170e615b9b89647833814b4689b78fdefa96f8deb87133aa58ad7082c].

For instance, in response to our inquiries
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72053&L=30885&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGMtcmVtb3ZpbmctMTAzMDAwLWluZWxpZ2libGUtbmFtZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=e81fbc7d3f8c3674910717882ce9fea86877f982d87ca6a7e38997b95e9101a3],
Washington, DC, officials admitted that they had not complied with
the National Voter Registration Act
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72053&L=435&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvY3J0L25hdGlvbmFsLXZvdGVyLXJlZ2lzdHJhdGlvbi1hY3QtMTk5My1udnJhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f158da4a5ae1de35e565a6a8f53da89cd8322253d93d918bf210c72ca3be414b],
promptly removed 65,544 outdated names from the voting rolls, promised
to remove 37,962 more, and designated another 73,522 registrations as
“inactive.”

And in November, we filed a petition for a
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72053&L=34321&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcG9zdC1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXktY291bnRpbmcvXV93cml0P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=3a22eb2d242efa1ed159ef465d8bec4d03718a188370753f2f5597e6d745b844
of
certiorari_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72053&L=33940&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcG9zdC1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXktY291bnRpbmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=200db680ce3c703e447d311dde7b46d7b573ff10009ce8fd96a03975cfd9caab]
to the
United States Supreme Court challenging the decision by the U.S. Court
of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit in the case filed on behalf of
Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors from Illinois to
prevent state election officials from extending Election Day for 14
days beyond the date established by federal law.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES CHICAGO MAYOR FOR RESISTING TRUMP’S DEPORTATIONS

We will see much resistance to President Trump’s policies at every
level of government, something we expected, and Judicial Watch taking
steps to uncover the lawlessness, especially the massive resistance
expected over President Trump’s mass deportations, which have
already begun.

We sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72053&L=34302&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtY2hpY2Fnby1tYXlvci1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDAzNDcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2aa87fbe57448c7cf1111f7da0f7791c71cebde446ae329919f6e4547521db58]
Chicago
Mayor Brandon Johnson for records regarding his vow to resist the
Trump administration’s mass deportation and other immigration law
enforcement activities (_Judicial Watch Inc. v. Office of the Mayor_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72053&L=34302&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtY2hpY2Fnby1tYXlvci1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDAzNDcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2aa87fbe57448c7cf1111f7da0f7791c71cebde446ae329919f6e4547521db58]
(No.
2025-CH-00347)).

On November 11, 2024, the mayor held a press conference at which he
stated that Chicago would remain a so-called “sanctuary city” and
that city officials “will continue to shield all immigrants in
Chicago from federal agents, regardless of whether they are citizens,
permanent residents or asylum seekers, despite the election of
President-elect Donald Trump.”

According to a WTTW News report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72053&L=34322&F=T&&hash=a5057586412a2da02d68e4b305d30df94c876a0ff479fb66f26ec8a214f7b3da],
Mayor Johnson said he “was prepared to fight any effort to stop
federal funds from flowing to Chicago because it will not cooperate
with mass deportation efforts, and would work to stop the arrival of
immigration agents.”

“We will not bend or break,” Johnson said. “Our values will
remain strong and firm. We will face likely hurdles in our work over
the next four years but we will not be stopped and we will not go
back.”

The firm Chalmers, Adams, Backer & Kaufman filed the lawsuit on our
behalf in the Circuit Court of Cook County, Illinois County Department
Chancery Division after the mayor’s office failed to adequately
respond to a November 27, 2024, Freedom of Information Act (FOIA)
request for records or communications of Mayor Johnson or his
designated representative about plans or preparations to resist
federal efforts to enforce immigration laws or not cooperate with
Immigration and Customs Enforcement deportations.

The new Trump Justice Department initiated a policy directing federal
prosecutors to investigate and consider prosecuting “resistance,
obstruction, and other non-compliance with lawful immigration-related
commands and requests from federal authorities.” Fox News reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72053&L=34305&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vdXMvY2hpY2Fnby1yZXNpZGVudHMtcmlwLW1heW9yLW92ZXItc3BlbmRpbmctbWlncmFudHMtd29yc3QtbWF5b3ItYW1lcmljYT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=2f84a6f5b9a7d61b84ae7addf312b5de556c11479c1cbd012cb1b4adec05aab2]
last
month that since August 2022 Chicago has spent $574.5 million on
sheltering migrants.

Johnson announced himself and his city government to be outlaws on
illegal immigration as they plan to help illegal aliens resist the
rule of law. Sure enough, this scandal is worsened by the evident
cover-up of the full scope of Mayor Johnson’s lawlessness, which we
aim to remedy with our open records lawsuit.

DRIVER’S LICENSE SECURITY LAW PASSED AFTER 9/11 DELAYED TWO MORE
YEAR

As you might have suspected, your federal government doesn’t take
your security seriously. It has yet to begin a secure driver’s
license system enacted after 9/11, as our _Corruption
Chronicles_ blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72053&L=34301&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZHJpdmVycy1saWNlbnNlLXNlY3VyaXR5LWxhdy0yLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=8c762105b27e9c3bbcaaad5cd5e60619c3b2a42997c7384f60e2f73a43a33bd2].
And
it has just delayed the program once again.

> In what has become a decades-long joke, the Department of Homeland
> Security (DHS) is once again postponing the deadline to fully
> enforce a law requiring driver’s license security standards
> designed to prevent another terrorist attack. Unbelievably, among
> the reasons for the latest delay is that the public expects it based
> on the government’s history of repeatedly extending enforcement
> deadlines. The measure, REAL ID Act
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72053&L=20514&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTA5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC80MTg/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e8103587e464df10ea4f31b6481f870a9e917688f23ca6966fd2a05d1a9af9d8],
was
> passed by Congress after 9/11 to establish a more secure national
> system less prone to fraud after several of the hijackers exploited
> loopholes to obtain dozens of driver’s licenses from various
> states. The cards allowed the terrorists to take flight lessons and
> board planes to carry out the 2001 attacks. At the recommendation of
> the 9/11 Commission Congress passed the REAL ID Act in 2005 and
> states originally had until 2011 to comply.
>
> Two decades later it has yet to be enforced. The Obama
> administration tried to drastically weaken the legislation with DHS
> Secretary Janet Napolitano granting a 20-month extension on the
> deadline as she worked behind the scenes to undermine the law,
> asserting that it violates civil liberties and privacy. During the
> first Trump administration DHS announced
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72053&L=34323&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGhzLmdvdi9hcmNoaXZlL3JlYWwtaWQvbmV3cy8yMDIwLzA5LzEwL2FsbC11cy1zdGF0ZXMtbm93LWNvbXBsaWFudC1haGVhZC1yZWFsLWlkLWRlYWRsaW5lP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=a4c9ffa85bfa0bac613e3345685fde3894ab5c202031bbbca83e0a4c57a62743]
that
> full enforcement of REAL ID would take effect at all federally
> regulated airports, federal facilities, and nuclear power plants by
> the fall of 2021 since all 50 states were finally in full compliance
> with the law. It never materialized, however. Biden got elected and
> used COVID-19 as an excuse to postpone the security measure’s
> implementation, extending the deadline by two years to address the
> lingering impacts of the pandemic on the ability to obtain a
> compliant license. Less than a year later, the Biden DHS again
> delayed enforcing REAL ID, claiming that it could cause “undue
> burden and confusion
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72053&L=34324&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZHJpdmVycy1saWNlbnNlLXNlY3VyaXR5LWxhdy9d4oCdP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=65ea4b6d2e13a937640e6f3ffb1b84d81a14a1a9046d9de0df9c5269faeb3222
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72053&L=29872&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZHJpdmVycy1saWNlbnNlLXNlY3VyaXR5LWxhdy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=43db120492f0da7ce084981d487b3f23eadff7733219e28eb17f05d7fa1a22d4]
for
> those using licenses that fail to meet federal standards.
>
> Somewhere along the way, May 2025 became DHS’s target date to
> finally enforce the measure but this month the agency issued yet
> another two-year extension, giving federal agencies the choice to
> begin full enforcement by May or implement a “phased enforcement
> plan” as they see fit. Created after the 2001 terrorist attacks to
> protect the nation from new and emerging threats, DHS justifies the
> delay in the Federal Register
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72053&L=34325&F=T&&hash=93c66df4def57769cdb6603d3e82b250c0074b6c64f0faa85fa91c34f98a9bff]
by
> explaining that the public may not feel an urgency to obtain a REAL
> ID-compliant card because there is a history of enforcement
> deadlines being extended and residents may continue to expect
> additional extensions. “DHS believes this lack of urgency is
> likely to delay increased adoption in many States despite best
> efforts to inform the public, potentially leading to last-minute
> surges in demand for REAL ID-compliant IDs leading up to the
> deadline,” DHS writes. The surge could overwhelm states and result
> in backlogs and delays in REAL ID issuance, according to the agency.
> “In light of this, DHS anticipates that a significant number of
> individuals seeking to use their DL/ID for a REAL ID official
> purpose on and after May 7, 2025, may not have a compliant DL/ID.”
>
> Although the law was enacted two decades ago only around half of the
> U.S. population with a state-issued driver’s license or
> identification card is REAL ID-compliant, DHS reveals. As of January
> 2024, states, territories, and the District of Columbia have issued
> approximately 162 million REAL ID-compliant cards and data from
> states indicates that around 124 million noncompliant licenses and
> ID cards are still in circulation. “DHS recognizes that this could
> result in a situation where individuals are unable to present a
> compliant DL/ID to access a Federal facility, board a federally
> regulated commercial aircraft, or enter a nuclear power plant on a
> large scale,” the new rule states. “For some agencies, this
> scenario may raise serious concerns related to security, agency
> operations, and potential impact to the public.” The newly issued
> rule recognizes the concerns, DHS writes, and provides flexibility
> by giving federal agencies another two years to implement REAL ID
> card-based enforcement “using a phased approach tailored to their
> specific operations.”
>
> DHS estimates the cost of the rule, over two years, is $1.73
> million. The agency fails to offer details but says the expense is
> related to “facilitating phased enforcement” while offering
> federal agencies flexibility that may reduce operational
> disruptions. DHS assures it is working hard to “raise awareness”
> about the 20-year-old driver’s license security law by, among
> other things, engaging in a print, social and digital media
> campaign.

Until next week,

clean_body: Mass Deportations Begin! [INSIDE JW] Trump Persevered and Triumphed against Lawfare [] The Left tried through lawfare and every other trick in the book to derail President Trump’s electoral victory, but the voters essentially found President Donald Trump “innocent” of his political opponents’ fake charges. Trump persevered and triumphed in the courts, as well as in the court of public opinion. Let us hope that his success puts an end to the practice of lawfare for good. Democrat-allied prosecutors and judges did their best to derail this presidency, but the people have spoken and now the reversal of the failed (and frequently unconstitutional) policies of the Biden administration are being reversed. America has reason to hope again for a country that is led by the rule of law. President Trump’s first-day executive orders correctly address the border, rule of law, and constitutional crises created by the Biden regime. And his pardons and commutations related to the January 6 defendants are fair, just and brave. Judicial Watch remains ready, willing and able to help (and sue) for government accountability as we continue our mission to ensure clean elections, secure borders, and transparency in government – and to thwart the Left’s attack on our constitutional republic through their censorship of free speech and abuse of power. We are pushing for accountability and transparency in Fulton County, GA, where the court recently issued an order [ “attorney’s fees and costs” in an open records lawsuit for communications Willis had with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee. Judicial Watch has also filed a motion [] asking the court to appoint a special master [] to oversee her search for records. As you know, we are a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. As part of our work, we assembled a team of highly experienced voting rights attorneys who stopped discriminatory elections in Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls in California, Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky, among other achievements []. For instance, in response to our inquiries [], Washington, DC, officials admitted that they had not complied with the National Voter Registration Act [], promptly removed 65,544 outdated names from the voting rolls, promised to remove 37,962 more, and designated another 73,522 registrations as “inactive.” And in November, we filed a petition for a [ of certiorari [] to the United States Supreme Court challenging the decision by the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit in the case filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors from Illinois to prevent state election officials from extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES CHICAGO MAYOR FOR RESISTING TRUMP’S DEPORTATIONS We will see much resistance to President Trump’s policies at every level of government, something we expected, and Judicial Watch taking steps to uncover the lawlessness, especially the massive resistance expected over President Trump’s mass deportations, which have already begun. We sued [] Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson for records regarding his vow to resist the Trump administration’s mass deportation and other immigration law enforcement activities (Judicial Watch Inc. v. Office of the Mayor [] (No. 2025-CH-00347)). On November 11, 2024, the mayor held a press conference at which he stated that Chicago would remain a so-called “sanctuary city” and that city officials “will continue to shield all immigrants in Chicago from federal agents, regardless of whether they are citizens, permanent residents or asylum seekers, despite the election of President-elect Donald Trump.” According to a WTTW News report [], Mayor Johnson said he “was prepared to fight any effort to stop federal funds from flowing to Chicago because it will not cooperate with mass deportation efforts, and would work to stop the arrival of immigration agents.” “We will not bend or break,” Johnson said. “Our values will remain strong and firm. We will face likely hurdles in our work over the next four years but we will not be stopped and we will not go back.” The firm Chalmers, Adams, Backer & Kaufman filed the lawsuit on our behalf in the Circuit Court of Cook County, Illinois County Department Chancery Division after the mayor’s office failed to adequately respond to a November 27, 2024, Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request for records or communications of Mayor Johnson or his designated representative about plans or preparations to resist federal efforts to enforce immigration laws or not cooperate with Immigration and Customs Enforcement deportations. The new Trump Justice Department initiated a policy directing federal prosecutors to investigate and consider prosecuting “resistance, obstruction, and other non-compliance with lawful immigration-related commands and requests from federal authorities.” Fox News reported [] last month that since August 2022 Chicago has spent $574.5 million on sheltering migrants. Johnson announced himself and his city government to be outlaws on illegal immigration as they plan to help illegal aliens resist the rule of law. Sure enough, this scandal is worsened by the evident cover-up of the full scope of Mayor Johnson’s lawlessness, which we aim to remedy with our open records lawsuit. DRIVER’S LICENSE SECURITY LAW PASSED AFTER 9/11 DELAYED TWO MORE YEAR As you might have suspected, your federal government doesn’t take your security seriously. It has yet to begin a secure driver’s license system enacted after 9/11, as our Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports []. And it has just delayed the program once again. In what has become a decades-long joke, the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) is once again postponing the deadline to fully enforce a law requiring driver’s license security standards designed to prevent another terrorist attack. Unbelievably, among the reasons for the latest delay is that the public expects it based on the government’s history of repeatedly extending enforcement deadlines. The measure, REAL ID Act [], was passed by Congress after 9/11 to establish a more secure national system less prone to fraud after several of the hijackers exploited loopholes to obtain dozens of driver’s licenses from various states. The cards allowed the terrorists to take flight lessons and board planes to carry out the 2001 attacks. At the recommendation of the 9/11 Commission Congress passed the REAL ID Act in 2005 and states originally had until 2011 to comply. Two decades later it has yet to be enforced. The Obama administration tried to drastically weaken the legislation with DHS Secretary Janet Napolitano granting a 20-month extension on the deadline as she worked behind the scenes to undermine the law, asserting that it violates civil liberties and privacy. During the first Trump administration DHS announced [] that full enforcement of REAL ID would take effect at all federally regulated airports, federal facilities, and nuclear power plants by the fall of 2021 since all 50 states were finally in full compliance with the law. It never materialized, however. Biden got elected and used COVID-19 as an excuse to postpone the security measure’s implementation, extending the deadline by two years to address the lingering impacts of the pandemic on the ability to obtain a compliant license. Less than a year later, the Biden DHS again delayed enforcing REAL ID, claiming that it could cause “undue burden and confusion [ [] for those using licenses that fail to meet federal standards. Somewhere along the way, May 2025 became DHS’s target date to finally enforce the measure but this month the agency issued yet another two-year extension, giving federal agencies the choice to begin full enforcement by May or implement a “phased enforcement plan” as they see fit. Created after the 2001 terrorist attacks to protect the nation from new and emerging threats, DHS justifies the delay in the Federal Register [] by explaining that the public may not feel an urgency to obtain a REAL ID-compliant card because there is a history of enforcement deadlines being extended and residents may continue to expect additional extensions. “DHS believes this lack of urgency is likely to delay increased adoption in many States despite best efforts to inform the public, potentially leading to last-minute surges in demand for REAL ID-compliant IDs leading up to the deadline,” DHS writes. The surge could overwhelm states and result in backlogs and delays in REAL ID issuance, according to the agency. “In light of this, DHS anticipates that a significant number of individuals seeking to use their DL/ID for a REAL ID official purpose on and after May 7, 2025, may not have a compliant DL/ID.” Although the law was enacted two decades ago only around half of the U.S. population with a state-issued driver’s license or identification card is REAL ID-compliant, DHS reveals. As of January 2024, states, territories, and the District of Columbia have issued approximately 162 million REAL ID-compliant cards and data from states indicates that around 124 million noncompliant licenses and ID cards are still in circulation. “DHS recognizes that this could result in a situation where individuals are unable to present a compliant DL/ID to access a Federal facility, board a federally regulated commercial aircraft, or enter a nuclear power plant on a large scale,” the new rule states. “For some agencies, this scenario may raise serious concerns related to security, agency operations, and potential impact to the public.” The newly issued rule recognizes the concerns, DHS writes, and provides flexibility by giving federal agencies another two years to implement REAL ID card-based enforcement “using a phased approach tailored to their specific operations.” DHS estimates the cost of the rule, over two years, is $1.73 million. The agency fails to offer details but says the expense is related to “facilitating phased enforcement” while offering federal agencies flexibility that may reduce operational disruptions. DHS assures it is working hard to “raise awareness” about the 20-year-old driver’s license security law by, among other things, engaging in a print, social and digital media campaign. name: Eleni Kounalakis - Californians for Choice
subject: Sign up to help wildfire relief efforts >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Californians for Choice (www
body:
Californians for Choice [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62802/images/ca4c-edited.png]

Peter,

Try to imagine over 13 thousand homes reduced to ash. Schools, hospitals, shops, churches, and temples demolished along with them.

As a housing developer I could visualize it, but even I was astonished at what I saw when I visited Altadena and Palisades last week. Mass destruction of neighborhoods and communities - heartbreaking and terrifying.

But this is California. The sun will keep coming up every day - and these communities will come back, too. Plans are already underway to remove debris, clear out hazardous materials, rebuild infrastructure, and clear the way for fast-tracking the rebuilding efforts. And when we rebuild, we have the tools and technology to harden and fire-proof homes in new and more effective ways.

Meanwhile, the outpouring of support for those affected by the fires has been truly remarkable. In California, we will never stop caring for our neighbors. It’s the source of our strength and defines us all around the world.

Peter, I’m reaching out today to ask you to join the volunteers who are supporting neighbors and assisting in the rebuilding effort.

Use this link to learn more about how you can help Californians impacted by the wildfires — whether you can give time, resources, gratitude, or something else, your support can make a difference. [https://www.californiavolunteers.ca.gov/wildfire-recovery/]

GET INVOLVED [https://www.californiavolunteers.ca.gov/wildfire-recovery/]

Thank you, stay safe, and more soon.

- Eleni Kounalakis

Paid for by Californians for Choice (www.californiansforchoice.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815

# **Ready to Get to Work!**
**Senator Vincent Hughes has been sworn in to serve another term for the 7th senatorial district** This term his top priorities will be:
* Continuing to fight for 21st century public education for all students
* Getting more affordable housing, for owners and renters, in our communities
* Protecting the Affordable Care Act and finding new ways to help Pennsylvanians with the cost of healthcare
* Investing more in anti-gun violence and anti-crime efforts to keep communities safe

**Senator Hughes is ready to fight for YOU** Subscribe to our e-newsletter and follow us on social media to see what we're up to throughout the year. [Twitter](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169371.172646.48&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13362)| [Bluesky](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169371.172646.48&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13363) | [Facebook](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169371.172646.48&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13364) | [Instagram](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169371.172646.48&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13365) | [TikTok](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169371.172646.48&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13366)

name: Senator Marsha Blackburn
subject: Here’s the truth, even though it’spainful to admit
body:
| Not interested? [Unsubscribe here](https://links.marshablackburn-emails.com/unsubscribe?e=ca6287b42448012db49621d88fe21f32&utm_source=hdblackburnvictoryfund&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_aa2f2b9ab4d987d8fcda5ff95e3&n=1).
---
| _Peter, here’s the truth, even though it’s painful to admit._

I emailed and texted you about our major deadline to break a fundraising RECORD in honor of Donald Trump’s return to the White House.

I thought we’d see a SURGE of support from MAGA Republicans and top patriots following Donald Trump’s historic Inauguration. However, that couldn’t be further from the truth.

**We’re now about to fall short of our FIRST goal since Trump officially became the 47th President of the United States.**

_**[I’d really hate to follow up such a momentous day for our country on such a bad note, so I’m hoping you can help me out before midnight tonight.](https://links.marshablackburn-emails.com/r?u=ZmzflAUbFSUyrM44uTeLiZfWYUCl0NKXe-6aXwKSXNieJFXoj8XyPXlQOiyENXLI84wiOHmZu1lG-1295u3jxHb396_6Cmt9XpEl0j5Wyl1ATvVkw8ta1vhgS9OB85fGaO4G--j3NHlckifUmLOUDsmN3iYjMjV2baB1Y98hpV_omHbFQ4C-XYSeeAVl33JMQwsgVkZEPoJlptZMjiX5JxBjoXi9LOAC8N-DOem7CJgrKx6CbUHCVxjLJdRdibliZEo9kqi5tstQOcuIWX9fgg&e=ca6287b42448012db49621d88fe21f32&utm_source=hdblackburnvictoryfund&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_aa2f2b9ab4d987d8fcda5ff95e3&n=2 " I’d really hate to follow up such
a momentous day for our country on such a bad note, so I’m hoping you
can help me out before midnight tonight.")**_
---
| | | [HELP BREAK A MAGA FUNDRAISING RECORD](https://links.marshablackburn-emails.com/r?u=ZmzflAUbFSUyrM44uTeLiZfWYUCl0NKXe-6aXwKSXNieJFXoj8XyPXlQOiyENXLI84wiOHmZu1lG-1295u3jxHb396_6Cmt9XpEl0j5Wyl1ATvVkw8ta1vhgS9OB85fGaO4G--j3NHlckifUmLOUDsmN3iYjMjV2baB1Y98hpV_omHbFQ4C-XYSeeAVl33JMQwsgVkZEPoJlptZMjiX5JxBjoXi9LOAC8N-DOem7CJgrKx6CbUHCVxjLJdRdibliZEo9kqi5tstQOcuIWX9fgg&e=ca6287b42448012db49621d88fe21f32&utm_source=hdblackburnvictoryfund&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_aa2f2b9ab4d987d8fcda5ff95e3&n=3 "HELP BREAK A MAGA FUNDRAISING RECORD")
---
Right now, we’re pacing to only raise 82% of our goal, so I’m emailing my top supporters and those who I know are true supporters of Donald Trump to make up the final 18% we need to raise.

_**[Even just $5, $10, or $15 will help us inch closer to our goal, Peter. Can we count on you?](https://links.marshablackburn-emails.com/r?u=ZmzflAUbFSUyrM44uTeLiZfWYUCl0NKXe-6aXwKSXNieJFXoj8XyPXlQOiyENXLI84wiOHmZu1lG-1295u3jxHb396_6Cmt9XpEl0j5Wyl1ATvVkw8ta1vhgS9OB85fGaO4G--j3NHlckifUmLOUDsmN3iYjMjV2baB1Y98hpV_omHbFQ4C-XYSeeAVl33JMQwsgVkZEPoJlptZMjiX5JxBjoXi9LOAC8N-DOem7CJgrKx6CbUHCVxjLJdRdibliZEo9kqi5tstQOcuIWX9fgg&e=ca6287b42448012db49621d88fe21f32&utm_source=hdblackburnvictoryfund&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_aa2f2b9ab4d987d8fcda5ff95e3&n=4 "Even just $5, $10, or $15 will help us inch closer
to our goal, Peter. Can we count on you?")**_

This is a perfect opportunity for MAGA patriots nationwide to rally and show a united grassroots movement in support of the new Trump Administration.

I really hate to put you on the spot like this, but we can’t come up short of our first critical fundraising goal following Trump’s historic inauguration.

Doing so would be a HUGE setback for our new Republican TRIFECTA and President Trump’s agenda!
---
| | | [HELP BREAK A MAGA FUNDRAISING RECORD](https://links.marshablackburn-emails.com/r?u=ZmzflAUbFSUyrM44uTeLiZfWYUCl0NKXe-6aXwKSXNieJFXoj8XyPXlQOiyENXLI84wiOHmZu1lG-1295u3jxHb396_6Cmt9XpEl0j5Wyl1ATvVkw8ta1vhgS9OB85fGaO4G--j3NHlckifUmLOUDsmN3iYjMjV2baB1Y98hpV_omHbFQ4C-XYSeeAVl33JMQwsgVkZEPoJlptZMjiX5JxBjoXi9LOAC8N-DOem7CJgrKx6CbUHCVxjLJdRdibliZEo9kqi5tstQOcuIWX9fgg&e=ca6287b42448012db49621d88fe21f32&utm_source=hdblackburnvictoryfund&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_aa2f2b9ab4d987d8fcda5ff95e3&n=5 "HELP BREAK A MAGA FUNDRAISING RECORD")
---
I know you won’t let this happen, so I’m asking...no I’m pleading with you to do what I know will be no small favor: _**[Will you click this link to pitch in even just a few bucks before our deadline?](https://links.marshablackburn-emails.com/r?u=ZmzflAUbFSUyrM44uTeLiZfWYUCl0NKXe-6aXwKSXNieJFXoj8XyPXlQOiyENXLI84wiOHmZu1lG-1295u3jxHb396_6Cmt9XpEl0j5Wyl1ATvVkw8ta1vhgS9OB85fGaO4G--j3NHlckifUmLOUDsmN3iYjMjV2baB1Y98hpV_omHbFQ4C-XYSeeAVl33JMQwsgVkZEPoJlptZMjiX5JxBjoXi9LOAC8N-DOem7CJgrKx6CbUHCVxjLJdRdibliZEo9kqi5tstQOcuIWX9fgg&e=ca6287b42448012db49621d88fe21f32&utm_source=hdblackburnvictoryfund&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_aa2f2b9ab4d987d8fcda5ff95e3&n=6 "Will you click this link to pitch in even just a few bucks
before our deadline?")**_

Thank you,

Marsha Blackburn
_U.S. Senator from Tennessee
Top Trump Ally_
---
| | | [HELP BREAK A MAGA FUNDRAISING RECORD](https://links.marshablackburn-emails.com/r?u=ZmzflAUbFSUyrM44uTeLiZfWYUCl0NKXe-6aXwKSXNieJFXoj8XyPXlQOiyENXLI84wiOHmZu1lG-1295u3jxHb396_6Cmt9XpEl0j5Wyl1ATvVkw8ta1vhgS9OB85fGaO4G--j3NHlckifUmLOUDsmN3iYjMjV2baB1Y98hpV_omHbFQ4C-XYSeeAVl33JMQwsgVkZEPoJlptZMjiX5JxBjoXi9LOAC8N-DOem7CJgrKx6CbUHCVxjLJdRdibliZEo9kqi5tstQOcuIWX9fgg&e=ca6287b42448012db49621d88fe21f32&utm_source=hdblackburnvictoryfund&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_aa2f2b9ab4d987d8fcda5ff95e3&n=7 "HELP

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Get the facts about our immigration crisis
body:
The American immigration system is broken.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znql6u5ol3jvf36useripvqe624ja1aget8gpkb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieaor1cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

The American immigration system is broken.

**Our border?**

It is wide open with millions of migrants pouring in each year.

**Our cities and towns?**

They are flooded with fentanyl and overwhelmed by crime.

**Our jobs?**

They are being taken by cheap foreign labor.

And yet almost nobody in Washington, D.C. seems to care. The permanent ruling class remains silent while millions of illegal immigrants come into our country.

**But Americans like you care a great deal about what is happening to our country. **

In fact, you're the one who is harmed by the ongoing mass illegal immigration. Drugs, thefts, and violent crime are no longer contained on our southern border.

**In response, Hillsdale College has created a FREE online learning series, "[Mass Immigration and the Border Crisis](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmeli0km1d2v0781g09o53vb8v9pn2slpbhk78h8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieaor1cph2bs)." **

In this series--which was designed for concerned Americans like you--you will learn the truth about our nation's border crisis and what we can do about it today.

We'll send you an online issue of _Imprimis_ , a podcast episode, and a video from a recent Hillsdale conference--all on the topic of immigration--so that you can start learning today.

Many journalists continue to cover up the failures on the border. They tell Americans that the term border crisis is misleading or even a hoax.

But this FREE online learning series will help you learn the facts about this perilous situation, including...

* What did the American Founders think about immigration?
* What is the effect of millions of illegal immigrants moving into communities across the United States?
* How does illegal immigration threaten the citizenship of Americans and our national sovereignty?

**I invite you to learn more about this critical topic through our free online learning series, "Mass Immigration and the Border Crisis."**

**You can receive instant access to this series right now using this secure link: **

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/immigration-learning-series](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5hbmknsvtvnqpp1hskum95318b4kl5go6gnj2t0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieaor1cph2bs)

The illegal immigration crisis is a stark example of the failure of the administrative state to protect the citizens of our nation. To save America, we must educate ourselves about this crisis before it's too late.

That's why it's so important that you learn the truth. I urge you to sign up for your free online learning series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Americans like you have everything to lose from the mass invasion of our country.

Drugs and violent crime are spreading into our communities, and our national sovereignty and your rights are under serious threat.

**That 's why I invite you to access our FREE online learning series, "Mass Immigration and the Border Crisis."**

When you do, you'll receive two videos and an issue of _Imprimis_ so you can learn about this urgent topic.

**Receive instant access to this free online learning series right now using this secure link:**

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/immigration-learning-series](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfnja35dv6io8mdc5h60eriuv13j2o8d9dknglo0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieaor1cph2bs)

Thank you!
---

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze5r58mffj103kg2qe9h5i4lpurti0jn7tad5oig_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieaor6cth2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmhg73tojll375k0pq59s5dai7g0qr07iefj5pb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieaor6cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu9d420ai00vl4kmupr7vftkg1fgegr6b24b3mm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieaor6cth2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3m5s1mhp23j17otnl23jp12lr5101k7nk811fi8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieaor6cth2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5pj6k8249n3qroprshe9ajsaclhqu78rt2u2sdg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieaor6cth2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zipjum3gd3csfup45m2s3feulhn60vlh4vfh8nlg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieaor6cth2bs) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z65teqgclegd4li7oan5b0vthff1sc2v5ons9ang_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieaor6cth2bs) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z49j2vtjdigd9lkvund592stoa80pvsvuf6gk990_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieaor6cth2bs)
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za9esdn8pnk5b1vgca7ujj0n34jhll5q0cos165g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieaor6cth2bs)
What makes [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1afdsq58igfvtnn8mar6erb0eocu3qs8fbbij5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieaor6cth2bs) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbvbap3th7i2mraj8nvh3qi8092kigldfn5gkqn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieaor6cth2bs) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6t0qh7vmrteiuqbs3okc8b1sa7tuf7190pet848_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieaor6cth2bs) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsi1ll7mss1r96idjm9i7uta4bqslng2qn3rud2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieaor6cth2bs)

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zggbgjeqivs4l7ss3dvqq6v6536cdue581n814fo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkjrrasjk6mqj4t5m6gpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshj69oj3c5im48d245p25oh4ctj6epr4slhmcpr24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh0ejc7m6tgcbl1976j8ekq3sqtg3ves9vsaeq88_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieaor6cth2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7ide42ts64s0cslreho72gte9rtd0f70jokbm98_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6ctjm9pb3cpjm49fg)

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Some social media companies won’t let us tell you this
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoeifnk6ug3om8vv18hqb16hqdko728efbj3sd80_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieeob6clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl8bjuv69c1ln00mgucmgh5mmb2id4rojfbhvme8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieeob6clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoka6uilos8u8kkq83lguc8e4iv55i0hn2b77ldo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctieeob6clh2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |

name: STEVE SCALISE
subject: Before it’s too late…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If you want to help save our House Majority before it is too late, I’m pleading with you to read this memo from start to finish.

| |
---
| | | TO: Concerned American Patriots
FROM: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
RE: The State of Our Pro-Trump Majority
* * *

If you want to help save our House Majority before it is too late, I'm pleading with you to read this memo from start to finish.

_Our House Majority is on the brink of collapse._ The margins are closer than ever, three must-win Special Elections are closing in, and the Democrats are spending MILLIONS to overtake us.

**> >>> Where we stand:**

- President Trump was JUST sworn in as Commander-in-Chief and our Republican Trifecta is in full swing

- Mike Waltz JUST resigned from Congress to serve in the Trump Administration. As of right now, the size and strength of our House Majority FULLY DEPEND on Special Elections FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21

- House Democrats JUST launched a 10 million dollar smear campaign to undercut our House Majority and kneecap Trump's legislative agenda

**> >>> What's at stake:**

Our House Majority is one of the closest margins in 100 years. Don't forget - it's also the last line of defense standing between us ushering in the Great American Comeback and House Democrats completely dismantling EVERYTHING we just fought to win.

**> >>> Our plan of action:**

_The FIRST monthly deadline since President Trump took control is just days away and we 're dangerously behind our goal._

We need to rally between 10,000 and 20,000 Conservative donors to get back on track before it's too late. _**[I hate to ask this, but can you please help us out?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj1ium1pv3idqb8m38d9916p9fe40rje2pj9p260_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie1pj6c9h2bs "I hate to ask this, but can you please help us out?")**_
| | [CHIP IN NOW](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1uh7d5fpkg2cjanpm4m1k5u7mc33hea41ad34o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie1pj6c9h2bs "CHIP IN NOW")
---

Time is of the essence.

**IF WE SUCCEED:** We'll have the resources to help our Special Election candidates fund the critical campaign infrastructure they need to WIN.

**IF WE FAIL:** We might as well kiss our House Majority goodbye and brace ourselves for a DEMOCRAT BLOCKADE.

The pressure is on so we need your help right here and right now. **_[I am asking you to chip in a few bucks to help save our Pro-Trump House Majority.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z87i24uo75hp5l3b2iiuup0dau4lm7opgi4ktl2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie1pj6c9h2bs "I am asking you to chip in a few bucks to help save our Pro-Trump House Majority.")_**
| [CHIP IN NOW](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z658iokhuso6gngtnkhor4fvelevps0ereogvo1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie1pj6c9h2bs "CHIP IN NOW")
---

Thank you,
Steve Scalise

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkdcjdksitrek5pcs4j9siqg6h45drjk5hfq2qdo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie1pj6c9h2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmbs1vk89k2o2r3jusc5oto2eq8felenmhu2u15g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie1pj6c9h2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_
---
| | | [RESPOND NOW ->](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5ipveo0cg5hh5i0kte6b84j8t1mq34dcvo6h7c8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie1pj6c9h2bs "RESPOND NOW →")
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_
---

---

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhsbs7lupibj8haed5knejfprj2gifk2b74i1trg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcmscbk8sauaacqq7kmealch61bnts9scqvn3gho_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj9a4se8b7fms8io3l9jv84ae6496st8vfd6pfoo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zic5vnat5j33r8tvqeal2l9jg6rk5i5vb0k1fh1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgpt87g0m654b9682lknq2es4jjtq3uhm030mfag_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs)

GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

subject: Top secret memo shared with you

body:
