---
| | |
---
Patriot,
|
---
The fight for freedom never ends!

We delivered one of the great American victories in the history of politics, but the battle is not over. The resistance is alive and well. Trust me!

This is Rep. Ryan Zinke (USN-Ret), Navy SEAL Commander and Chairman of SEAL PAC.

Our mission to Make America Great Again in 2024 had three components and we accomplished all of them!

We strengthened our Conservative House Majority!

We won a Conservative Senate Majority!

We elected Donald Trump as President of the United States!
|
---
[STAY IN THE FIGHT](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrvcq2g73n1r2qea1agiemcpjh77m5n7voa0msq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs)
|
---
Now we are gearing up for the next phase of the SEAL PAC battle plan and we once again are calling on America First Patriots like you.

SEAL PAC’s mission is to send Conservative Military Veterans to Congress who will defend our Constitution and stand with President Donald Trump as we enact his MAGA agenda.

These warriors took a blood oath to protect our country and freedom.

**_[We can’t re-elect these accomplished military veterans without your immediate support.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z92ffstbnnqssat88ko2t0clh3k9mjj907cs70po_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs)_**

name: OFFICIAL REPUBLICAN COMMUNICATION [From Team Scalise]
subject: This is our FIRST deadline since Donald J. Trump retook the Oval Office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We can’t hand power over to the Democrats who could completely SABOTAGE President Trump’s entire term!

| |
---
| | | This is our **FIRST** deadline of the New Year. This is our **FIRST** deadline since the 119th Congress was sworn in. And this is our **FIRST** deadline since Donald J. Trump was sworn in as our 47th President.

_But we 're pacing 13% behind this must-hit fundraising goal!!!_

We won't beat around the bush: Everything comes down to what we do in the next few days.

**Our House Majority is hanging on by paper-thin margins.**

Not to mention, House Democrats just unloaded millions to drag House Republicans' names through the mud and initiate their plot to take over the Majority. We can't hand power over to those who could completely SABOTAGE President Trump's entire term!

_**[If there's any hope to save our Pro-Trump House Majority, we need your help before our FINAL January deadline. If not enough American Patriots step up, they could very well:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg5jam8qltjg8nej4jots1gb373idruu380n5n48_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs "If there’s any hope to save our Pro-Trump House Majority, we need your help immediately. Because if not enough American Patriots step up, they could very well:")**_
>>> WIN BACK the House of Representatives
>>> TAKEOVER every House Committee
>>> JAM UP Trump's entire legislative agenda
>>> INVESTIGATE the Trump Administration
>>> LAUNCH phony Trump impeachments all over again
We need urgent reinforcements to stop all of this from ever happening. Can you help us out?
| | [PITCH IN BEFORE 1/31](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgbtvplmtfgsqgbv4ppl213pu0vf6f00mg4v4o78_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs "PITCH IN BEFORE 1/31")
---

**On November 5th, the American People issued a mandate to save America. **

But if we sit back, relax, and leave our House Majority up to fate, there is ZERO chance we can fulfill our promises or help usher in the Golden Age for America. This is our first shot to prove to the Democrats that, despite their best attempts:

We will _never_ give up, we will _never_ surrender, and we will _never_ be intimidated by their political games.

We're not asking you to put your savings on the line.

_**[If everyone reading this email pitches in JUST 10 or 25 bucks, we can get back on pace and hit our goal in the nick of time!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl3sa56idg0p283n5nrd6ci577p5n69hg59s5kno_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs "If everyone reading this email pitches in JUST 10 or 25 bucks, we can get back on pace and hit our goal in just the nick of time!")**_

_Will you do what it takes to help save our Pro-Trump Majority?_
| [PITCH IN BEFORE 1/31](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z73p2v0lkd61476edo09a14eud3u87qgrg2q0508_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs "PITCH IN BEFORE 1/31")
---

Thanks for all you do for freedom.

- House Republicans

| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zll99rkuaqca7o9i7aitavo4rf0kkotqgru6ohp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zukpspkfo8hks7n6kele5pvov9fboj08qcrd02eo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

body:
If Democrats take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

| |
---
| | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because...

_We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat!_

**Remember:** We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

**_[Friend- we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the month to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zlb935pgh4q6o16l1ner6lov269fnjrp5um63o98_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs "Friend – we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the month to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.")_**

_This deadline was important before but now that our House Majority may depend on winning three Special Elections ..._

name: STEVE SCALISE
subject: Before it’s too late…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If you want to help save our House Majority before it is too late, I’m pleading with you to read this memo from start to finish.

| |
---
| | | TO: Concerned American Patriots
FROM: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
RE: The State of Our Pro-Trump Majority
* * *

If you want to help save our House Majority before it is too late, I'm pleading with you to read this memo from start to finish.

_Our House Majority is on the brink of collapse._ The margins are closer than ever, three must-win Special Elections are closing in, and the Democrats are spending MILLIONS to overtake us.

**> >>> Where we stand:**

- President Trump was JUST sworn in as Commander-in-Chief and our Republican Trifecta is in full swing

- Mike Waltz JUST resigned from Congress to serve in the Trump Administration. As of right now, the size and strength of our House Majority FULLY DEPEND on Special Elections FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21

- House Democrats JUST launched a 10 million dollar smear campaign to undercut our House Majority and kneecap Trump's legislative agenda

**> >>> What's at stake:**

Our House Majority is one of the closest margins in 100 years. Don't forget - it's also the last line of defense standing between us ushering in the Great American Comeback and House Democrats completely dismantling EVERYTHING we just fought to win.

**> >>> Our plan of action:**

_The FIRST monthly deadline since President Trump took control is just days away and we 're dangerously behind our goal._

We need to rally between 10,000 and 20,000 Conservative donors to get back on track before it's too late. _**[I hate to ask this, but can you please help us out?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7ov0nkie3540loin68h5j4ebr3n6ps6og54v8og_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs "I hate to ask this, but can you please help us out?")**_
| | [CHIP IN NOW](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z55scsdl64pvbagg4o0bifhgo3bu122hjoka6st8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs "CHIP IN NOW")
---

Time is of the essence.

**IF WE SUCCEED:** We'll have the resources to help our Special Election candidates fund the critical campaign infrastructure they need to WIN.

**IF WE FAIL:** We might as well kiss our House Majority goodbye and brace ourselves for a DEMOCRAT BLOCKADE.

The pressure is on so we need your help right here and right now. **_[I am asking you to chip in a few bucks to help save our Pro-Trump House Majority.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zelp25f773pf1n3id0en4vcl1lcsg0dfulqcfhu0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs "I am asking you to chip in a few bucks to help save our Pro-Trump House Majority.")_**
| [CHIP IN NOW](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb1rk038stmjmnb9k733ubsfujnadmeideuia6d0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs "CHIP IN NOW")
---

Thank you,
Steve Scalise

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfn8k2vjapfbfg6co02mab5ogk7m20daqqt54evo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9jvbl2h95121bfobq6fgnu4p9vaqrjee2l5hc80_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_
---
| | | [RESPOND NOW ->](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztrhs83n5steh5ubjitrf30vj4d5s4htcaib7dm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7ctie9oj2clh2bs "RESPOND NOW →")
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

---

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zquoep7fb5847c0gdcolv3vuqdgrcitct1b6o00g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3g68p72cth2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z38s9ibknsmlmdu0ab7ein989guq4iiei5ovg1hg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3g68p72cth2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zava9eubv2fg7tgldsf2kspafo5umjb0c5k3d3l8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3g68p72cth2bs) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zppi06gf8q4k2fm23qdtauusbor2aalb5b1urlng_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3g68p72cth2bs) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjfv991qm31087ecsr5jo9rkdbtr0vmvpl2gkscg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3g68p72cth2bs)
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrftsc47a4r4lp6uovtsk2ihqvepm0665i36l9cg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3g68p72cth2bs)
What makes [hear.com's](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7jpm8eoirlquf494bp08iqkc5mpka7gg60plqvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3g68p72cth2bs) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1u0ushvag4gmnti4jp79nad6bu2qp45gncrnsm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3g68p72cth2bs) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfmr0703d42mgc6r05frhu5m0d2vfamaegj0mh30_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3g68p72cth2bs) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1nahd4jvvqbod5kr54t8booc2mq7f7mncpsb4qg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3g68p72cth2bs)

Trump Train News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn82e5f0kmv26dr46pmnvemacj4suo650t3r7pu0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6ctge0p34s9jm49fg)

body:
If Democrats take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

| |
---
| | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because...

_We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat!_

**Remember:** We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

**_[Friend- we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the month to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi9nsapn6qabluk88fqk7fkjvg3n1ipig2rvjm10_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3g64o76c9h2bs "Friend – we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the month to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.")_**

If there was ever a moment to pitch in a few bucks, that moment is right now. Our Conservative House Majority - and the fate of President Trump's legislative agenda - hangs in the balance.
_***** CALLING ALL CONSERVATIVES *** **_
**THREE SPECIAL ELECTIONS**
| | [CONTRIBUTE 10 BUCKS](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0pbje1dn7413sbp62rruugscjniljnlcshhuvso_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3g64o76c9h2bs "CONTRIBUTE 10 BUCKS")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE 20 BUCKS](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqb0s4tjpqktqok0nt1o611d9aehsebp35imsf78_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3g64o76c9h2bs "CONTRIBUTE 20 BUCKS")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE 50 BUCKS](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9sb1sqi1csfboo22pohoh5rl5ghb7uv19k5hkn0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3g64o76c9h2bs "CONTRIBUTE 50 BUCKS BEFORE 12/31")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zogq70ioj040t20ku0mi6v8nj9r5rahoqns2pvq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3g64o76c9h2bs "CONTRIBUTE MORE")
---

Listen -

_This deadline was important before but now that our House Majority may depend on winning three Special Elections ..._

**THIS IS THE MOST IMPORTANT DEADLINE YET! **

Majority Leader Steve Scalise agreed that 20,000 more contributions is the bare minimum we need to help jumpstart our efforts to hold FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21.

Every contribution helps us refuel our voter contact budgets, recruit volunteers, and get our positive message out to voters - that's how we win key races like these.

Please don't underestimate the seriousness of the situation.

_**[Our deadline is closing in! We're PLEADING for your help right here and right now.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1m1b7rtjjht32i750tuc0ii0nh1c12an04r2u38_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3g64o76c9h2bs "Our deadline is closing in! We’re PLEADING for your help right here and right now.")**_

Thanks for all you do.

**- SPECIAL ELECTION ALERTS - **
_From House Republicans_

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu4pokgbjeaq8k29peturrq4niflqmub1doac7t0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3g64o76c9h2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfag5e56u9h9kv48e72l6mej03uu2jst0ih344ko_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3g64o76c9h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq5kcrg9c5fuldmnj66jtf36srj9tqmckvkje3lo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3g64o76c9h2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---
- STEVE SCALISE
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

# **[Pope Francis tells journalists to build communion, 'give reasons for hope'](http://trk.libertyledger.-A)**
---
Pope Francis speaks to journalists aboard the papal plane during an in-flight press conference on Friday, Sept. 13, 2024, on his return from his nearly two-week tour of Southeast Asia. / Credit: Daniel Ibañez/CNA Vatican City, Jan 24, 2025 / 09:15 am (CNA). In his message for the 59th World Day of Social Communications on Friday, Pope Francis encouraged journalists to build communion in the world through sharing stories of goodness and hope.“I dream of a communication that does not peddle illusions or fears but is able to give reasons for hope,” the pope said. “I encourage you to discover and make known the many stories of goodness hidden in the folds of the news, imitating those gold-prospectors who tirelessly sift the sand in search of a tiny nugget. It is good to seek out such seeds of hope and make them known.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-A)

name: Trump Knife Set
subject: Elevate Your Collection with the Exclusive Trump Knife Set
body:
Limited Edition Trump Knives – Claim Yours Before They're Gone!...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20002/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/5aa91a5e5f8faca93a6e829db096450d131be2c7). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20002/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/5aa91a5e5f8faca93a6e829db096450d131be2c7?message_id=ImQ3MmNhMDEwLWJkNDMtMDEzZC1mZWNlLTQyYzMzNmExMDJjMkBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).
---
| | [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20002/6374453/8e2aaef9ee3a4f9ae4c540e4b73eb4bf735cf756/5aa91a5e5f8faca93a6e829db096450d131be2c7)
---
---
|
---
| | Dear Reader, Introducing a unique opportunity to own a distinguished piece of American history. The **[Limited Edition Trump Knife Collection](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20002/6374453/8e2aaef9ee3a4f9ae4c540e4b73eb4bf735cf756/5aa91a5e5f8faca93a6e829db096450d131be2c7)** is not just a collectible—it’s a legacy of patriotism, precision, and exquisite craftsmanship. Reserved for those who appreciate the finer things in life, this set is the ultimate tribute to the 45th President of the United States.
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20002/6374453/8e2aaef9ee3a4f9ae4c540e4b73eb4bf735cf756/5aa91a5e5f8faca93a6e829db096450d131be2c7)
---
**Why the Trump Knife Collection Stands Apart:****8 Distinctive Knives, Each Telling a Story** This collection is thoughtfully[ designed to commemorate pivotal moments from Trump’s presidency](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20002/6374453/8e2aaef9ee3a4f9ae4c540e4b73eb4bf735cf756/5aa91a5e5f8faca93a6e829db096450d131be2c7). Each month, a new knife arrives at your door, featuring a full-color image of President Trump paired with one of his defining messages—from “Keep America Great” to “Save America Again.” Each piece is more than a knife; it’s a statement of American pride.
* **Premium Pakkawood Handles** : Hand-polished with a rich cherry stain, each knife handle is crafted to reflect both strength and elegance, offering a balanced, luxurious feel in your hand.
* **Razor-Sharp Stainless Steel Blades** : Each blade is forged with precision, ensuring durability and a sharp edge, reflecting the steadfast spirit of American craftsmanship.
* **American Craftsmanship** : Designed and forged in the USA, each knife is a testament to American quality, pride, and tradition.

---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20002/6374453/8e2aaef9ee3a4f9ae4c540e4b73eb4bf735cf756/5aa91a5e5f8faca93a6e829db096450d131be2c7)
---
**A Showcase of Elegance: The LED Display Case** The collection comes complete with a **[custom-designed wooden display case](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20002/6374453/8e2aaef9ee3a4f9ae4c540e4b73eb4bf735cf756/5aa91a5e5f8faca93a6e829db096450d131be2c7)** , made from premium cherry wood and featuring a shining gold strip with a hinged glass cover. The addition of **eight built-in LED lights** enhances the beauty of each knife, casting a soft glow that captures the essence of this elegant tribute.
* **Protective and Elegant** : The hinged cover provides easy access to your knives while ensuring they remain protected from dust and wear.
* **Showcase Presidential Pride** : The display case is adorned with a raised golden medallion, inspired by the American presidential seal, making it a stunning centerpiece for any home or office.

---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20002/6374453/8e2aaef9ee3a4f9ae4c540e4b73eb4bf735cf756/5aa91a5e5f8faca93a6e829db096450d131be2c7)
---
**An Heirloom for Generations** This collection is more than a tribute to Trump’s presidency—it’s an heirloom piece that captures a moment in history with elegance and pride. Each knife's patriotic theme is carefully chosen to resonate with the values that define America: freedom, strength, and resilience. Displayed together, they create a narrative that will be admired for generations. **What Our Collectors Are Saying:**
* **“The detail and craftsmanship are unparalleled. Each knife is a conversation starter, and the display case elevates them to a true work of art.” – Lisa M., Verified Buyer**
* **“I’ve never seen anything like it. Each delivery brings a new piece of history to my collection, and the quality is outstanding.” – Tom L., Verified Buyer**

**Secure Your Place Among History’s Collectors** The **Limited Edition Trump Knife Collection** is available for a short time. With each knife delivered monthly, anticipation builds until your set is complete. This isn’t just about owning knives; it’s about curating a piece of history. **[CLICK HERE TO CHECK AVAILABILITY AND ORDER YOUR SET](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20002/6374453/8e2aaef9ee3a4f9ae4c540e4b73eb4bf735cf756/5aa91a5e5f8faca93a6e829db096450d131be2c7)** Sincerely,
TrumpKnifeSet.com P.S. Each knife is delivered in a custom box, making it an exquisite gift for those who hold America's values close to their hearts.
---
|
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20002/6374453/8e2aaef9ee3a4f9ae4c540e4b73eb4bf735cf756/5aa91a5e5f8faca93a6e829db096450d131be2c7)

name: STEVE SCALISE
subject: Before it’s too late…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If you want to help save our House Majority before it is too late, I’m pleading with you to read this memo from start to finish.

| |
---
| | | TO: Concerned American Patriots
FROM: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
RE: The State of Our Pro-Trump Majority
* * *

If you want to help save our House Majority before it is too late, I'm pleading with you to read this memo from start to finish.

_Our House Majority is on the brink of collapse._ The margins are closer than ever, three must-win Special Elections are closing in, and the Democrats are spending MILLIONS to overtake us.

**> >>> Where we stand:**

- President Trump was JUST sworn in as Commander-in-Chief and our Republican Trifecta is in full swing

- Mike Waltz JUST resigned from Congress to serve in the Trump Administration. As of right now, the size and strength of our House Majority FULLY DEPEND on Special Elections FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21

- House Democrats JUST launched a 10 million dollar smear campaign to undercut our House Majority and kneecap Trump's legislative agenda

**> >>> What's at stake:**

Our House Majority is one of the closest margins in 100 years. Don't forget - it's also the last line of defense standing between us ushering in the Great American Comeback and House Democrats completely dismantling EVERYTHING we just fought to win.

**> >>> Our plan of action:**

_The FIRST monthly deadline since President Trump took control is just days away and we 're dangerously behind our goal._

We need to rally between 10,000 and 20,000 Conservative donors to get back on track before it's too late. _**[I hate to ask this, but can you please help us out?](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkbGO3CAQhp8Gd1gw2LAUFKec3EQXRWlSIgyzPrQYW4D37vEjr3LVVVvPfPPPN_P3zb65mGJefrkVzc0XW6ptd1u9S3TG61aQAk2uoQUGI2WcwmhFF0zQXjrZoeFKKKW1Hln3btAjE6i5UAHxEsZRBHVV_CoGweZB6y6acw7jMLLLcOFDr7ib2VXPHjRXTgEZmEtYWn9D3P2Wl4K1FtyPOUXvcu-3tUvmvbW9EvFCYCIwVfRHwf4j5oLh7CAwNXQrPTViRQLTf5fYKm3b9jA6WTGVky0xL0S8tnIgAXm01Xq37i4umYjXr4Xt7xf688cf3nMu5AC28VErpS6Uq1ESkPhpWwxPAI-cLTfM7Qy_05sv9AsmID-PfP9e6IoJ-0dMKVapyMCW1cX0OEt74oF3A_8CAAD__wONm1s "I hate to ask this, but can you please help us out?")**_
| | [CHIP IN NOW](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkbGO3CAQhp8Gd1gw2LAUFKec3EQXRWlSIgyzPrQYW4D37vEjr3LVVVvPfPPPN_P3zb65mGJefrkVzc0XW6ptd1u9S3TG61aQAk2uoQUGI2WcwmhFF0zQXjrZoeFKKKW1Hln3btAjE6i5UAHxEsZRBHVV_CoGweZB6y6acw7jMLLLcOFDr7ib2VXPHjRXTgEZmEtYWn9D3P2Wl4K1FtyPOUXvcu-3tUvmvbW9EvFCYCIwVfRHwf4j5oLh7CAwNXQrPTViRQLTf5fYKm3b9jA6WTGVky0xL0S8tnIgAXm01Xq37i4umYjXr4Xt7xf688cf3nMu5AC28VErpS6Uq1ESkPhpWwxPAI-cLTfM7Qy_05sv9AsmID-PfP9e6IoJ-0dMKVapyMCW1cX0OEt74oF3A_8CAAD__wONm1s "CHIP IN NOW")
---

Time is of the essence.

**IF WE SUCCEED:** We'll have the resources to help our Special Election candidates fund the critical campaign infrastructure they need to WIN.

**IF WE FAIL:** We might as well kiss our House Majority goodbye and brace ourselves for a DEMOCRAT BLOCKADE.

The pressure is on so we need your help right here and right now. **_[I am asking you to chip in a few bucks to help save our Pro-Trump House Majority.](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkbGO3CAQhp8Gd1gw2LAUFKec3EQXRWlSIgyzPrQYW4D37vEjr3LVVVvPfPPPN_P3zb65mGJefrkVzc0XW6ptd1u9S3TG61aQAk2uoQUGI2WcwmhFF0zQXjrZoeFKKKW1Hln3btAjE6i5UAHxEsZRBHVV_CoGweZB6y6acw7jMLLLcOFDr7ib2VXPHjRXTgEZmEtYWn9D3P2Wl4K1FtyPOUXvcu-3tUvmvbW9EvFCYCIwVfRHwf4j5oLh7CAwNXQrPTViRQLTf5fYKm3b9jA6WTGVky0xL0S8tnIgAXm01Xq37i4umYjXr4Xt7xf688cf3nMu5AC28VErpS6Uq1ESkPhpWwxPAI-cLTfM7Qy_05sv9AsmID-PfP9e6IoJ-0dMKVapyMCW1cX0OEt74oF3A_8CAAD__wONm1s "I am asking you to chip in a few bucks to help save our Pro-Trump House Majority.")_**
| [CHIP IN NOW](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkbGO3CAQhp8Gd1gw2LAUFKec3EQXRWlSIgyzPrQYW4D37vEjr3LVVVvPfPPPN_P3zb65mGJefrkVzc0XW6ptd1u9S3TG61aQAk2uoQUGI2WcwmhFF0zQXjrZoeFKKKW1Hln3btAjE6i5UAHxEsZRBHVV_CoGweZB6y6acw7jMLLLcOFDr7ib2VXPHjRXTgEZmEtYWn9D3P2Wl4K1FtyPOUXvcu-3tUvmvbW9EvFCYCIwVfRHwf4j5oLh7CAwNXQrPTViRQLTf5fYKm3b9jA6WTGVky0xL0S8tnIgAXm01Xq37i4umYjXr4Xt7xf688cf3nMu5AC28VErpS6Uq1ESkPhpWwxPAI-cLTfM7Qy_05sv9AsmID-PfP9e6IoJ-0dMKVapyMCW1cX0OEt74oF3A_8CAAD__wONm1s "CHIP IN NOW")

Our House Majority is on the brink of collapse. The margins are closer than ever, three must-win Special Elections are closing in, and the Democrats are spending MILLIONS to overtake us. >>> Where we stand: - President Trump was JUST sworn in as Commander-in-Chief and our Republican Trifecta is in full swing - Mike Waltz JUST resigned from Congress to serve in the Trump Administration. As of right now, the size and strength of our House Majority FULLY DEPEND on Special Elections FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21 - House Democrats JUST launched a 10 million dollar smear campaign to undercut our House Majority and kneecap Trump's legislative agenda >>> What's at stake: Our House Majority is one of the closest margins in 100 years. Don't forget - it's also the last line of defense standing between us ushering in the Great American Comeback and House Democrats completely dismantling EVERYTHING we just fought to win. >>> Our plan of action: The FIRST monthly deadline since President Trump took control is just days away and we 're dangerously behind our goal. We need to rally between 10,000 and 20,000 Conservative donors to get back on track before it's too late. IF WE SUCCEED: We'll have the resources to help our Special Election candidates fund the critical campaign infrastructure they need to WIN. IF WE FAIL: We might as well kiss our House Majority goodbye and brace ourselves for a DEMOCRAT BLOCKADE. The pressure is on so we need your help right here and right now. body:

---|---
| | |
---
| |
# _Weekly Recap_
Things are in full swing at 200 W Washington St. as the 124th General Assembly continues to pick up steam.

I had a rewarding week in committees this week with Tax and Fiscal, Pensions and Labor, Education and Career Development, Utilities, and Commerce and Technology all meeting.

As a reminder, committees are an important step in a bill becoming law, and any legislation must go before a committee before being heard in front of the full Senate.

Look for more updates on my social media platforms as more legislation from me, and my colleagues from the Indiana Senate Democrats, moves through the legislative process.
---
#
* * *
---
|
---
| | | **🚨 Protecting your DNA Privacy. **
Tens of millions of people in the United States have undergone direct-to-consumer genetic testing with the rise of companies like 23andMe and Ancestry. But what happens when [one of these companies gets hacked](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b4e800b50ca75c346cb9a18b45d17f1708ffd127e69f213295fab56b265003c77b06e3b4b8e5caf412f4ae7a715e210f71cd615cbb2fd98b " one of these companies gets hacked"), or [faces the threat of bankruptcy](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b4e800b50ca75c34430005f19f293d54e6da41f1ca124066a4e0151fab8e0e1ea51db9dc6e7ff5cefc559f35561537ccd290308be1461003 " faces the threat of bankruptcy")?

Indiana is falling behind a growing list of states who have worked to answer these questions, which compromises the privacy of Hoosiers and their genetic data.

**I have authored[SB 33](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b4e800b50ca75c34973851fa46f75d295afff3b8adb1b3ffde75955d6ea0da8cb9e9af1dedb3f6a9b0564476dc07a36abe767fd864db5368 "SB 33") to address this issue head-on.**

This bill would not only put regulations on how these companies store your data, but also that a person may not discriminated against for using these tests or the results of them.

It is essential that our most private information is secure, and the right to privacy is protected in our State.

Keep a close eye on my social media for announcements on what is next for this crucial piece of legislation.
---
#
* * *
---
**Governor Braun's Troubling Executive Order** This past week Governor Braun sent a message to Hoosiers that we should all be worried about. He signed a slew of Executive Orders, the most alarming of which was [EO 25-20,](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b4e800b50ca75c34e06fa6e0dec8ba9f596e817406d0587553125179b41433d41360e5dc7285d7428bff823382e630d3080c02c454ad4793) which could compromise confidentiality of Hoosiers and deter women from getting the health care they need. _See my full statement below: _
---
|
---
#
* * *
---
**Discussing my Vision for the 124th General Assembly**
I had the opportunity to sit down for _Statehouse Conversations with Jon Schwantes_ to discuss my legislative priorities for this session and how we can empower the families, futures and freedoms of every person in Indiana. **Click below to watch!**
---
| [](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b4e800b50ca75c342c22008946cb035015bfa0cbc793560bc530083443f806580ed3e5c2771f3e12aa37090426115511de17cd0dc49b4e83)
---
#
* * *
---
| | |
### ☕ Monthly Coffee Meet-Up: Neidhammer Coffee Co. ☕
---
|
---
| | Thank you to those of you who spent a part of your Friday morning sharing your ideas, concerns and hopes all while supporting local business in Indianapolis.

It is such an honor to represent you in our Statehouse, and events like this help me keep a finger on the pulse of all of the ways we can work together to make District 46, and Indiana as a whole, even better.

I am so appreciative of Neidhammer Coffee Co. for hosting our first coffee meet-up of session. Their work to support and provide employment opportunities to at-risk and unhoused young adults is such a vital investment in our young people and serves as a bright spot in our community.

_Missed January's coffee meet-up? Stay tuned for more information for February! _
---
#
* * *
---
| | | |
---
|
# Take my Pre-Session Survey: Deadline Jan. 31, 2025!
I want to continue to hear from you!

Though session has started, there is still time to submit your response to my pre-session survey. This information helps me best represent District 46 in the Statehouse.

Thank you for sharing your thoughts and using your voice to help create change.
---
| | [Take My Survey](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b4e800b50ca75c344ee20a1955199d77b73a0751f6177c366d3022787eeee377f3a1cb2f394a424a58f7f9686a4bf4336a1a051ccc62b827)
---
#
* * *
---
# _In the News_
[Social media ban for Hoosier youth gets the Senate greenlight](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b4e800b50ca75c34331af0645033bfee95f3e6237bc5c397d3c032395e3b9c2ceb1b35abd5ab37eb2082df475b16970c77b586c1653a7558 "Social media ban for Hoosier youth gets the Senate greenlight") [Braun's latest order calls for full reports on pregnancies terminated in Indiana](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b4e800b50ca75c34a097b75f7d45eb42e3baca8b9d8f1a92e9bcb89b3d525dd4d2c1e10730dd369616ba04fd1dfcaeb2deddceda785f3c78 "Braun's latest order calls for full reports on pregnancies terminated in Indiana") [Immigration notice proposal raises racial profiling fears amid border security push](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b4e800b50ca75c34a12a941aa49b46ec2bff61c659f88fdacaadae8c215edceb79bddcafc6aa37c3cdb27c6fd1811c8624ddc782dbb62609 "Immigration notice proposal raises racial profiling fears amid border security push")
---

name: Amy Carnevale
subject: The Perfect Recipe for Disaster
body:
Who ordered fiscal instability & higher taxes?
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TqUhwWm9QcxoFw45ppqOT8lbhRjDJfgBsh1_KpJnCFduv-DeNCuclxezpBYcBBHOrb58_vy12aOeHiP0SwknIfcgiadUAdEUuwN9NisrJPzsgK-Hnm8gOVoQ0tZ_iGby-Q_JO8xw86ej849_MAMh4A==&c=N65Yt_rhIxYwegG0myuhtsGfgnU5p5WRRzcnQcZBH57_7ZF2AdHvuA==&ch=HihiUx3jmhcwfxirRfZShbnEoFsdciATOvt61aXXBuX64fBF_x9E4Q==)
---
| Dear Peter,
Governor Maura Healey's annual budget proposal is out - and it's the perfect recipe for fiscal instability and higher taxes.
$62,000,000,000 Gov. Healey's proposed FY2026 budget, representing a 7.4% increase from the 2025 budget.
Harmful tax proposals The new tax on candy & capping charitable donation deductions punishes Massachusetts residents while enabling unchecked spending on Beacon Hill.
Back-door tax increases Allowing local governments to raise taxes is a political maneuver that avoids accountability while forcing families to be on the hook.
Fiscal recklessness & missed opportunities Governor Healey's proposals are disconnected from the realities faced by Massachusetts families and businesses.
The MassGOP is calling on the Healey-Driscoll Administration to prioritize sustainable, transparent, and responsible budgeting that respects taxpayers and supports long-term stability.
Our State Leaders should be focused on reform, efficiency, and fiscal discipline -- not one-time fixes and political posturing.
[AGREE?](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TqUhwWm9QcxoFw45ppqOT8lbhRjDJfgBsh1_KpJnCFduv-DeNCucl112bgFePj4wztgA8Hru59oa9D_qI2ScTtcoWtkBJ3iUA0uJZvxMPu9-urnZpAIqAcq7NTgtGamoMKYskVktGZD8cn5Zc1c5rAySlDCrnn4gyz6Nty65gGat76Wwnwf-1o2fsslhvqBc&c=N65Yt_rhIxYwegG0myuhtsGfgnU5p5WRRzcnQcZBH57_7ZF2AdHvuA==&ch=HihiUx3jmhcwfxirRfZShbnEoFsdciATOvt61aXXBuX64fBF_x9E4Q==)
---
| | [FUND COMMON SENSE REPUBLICANS RUNNING ACROSS MA](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TqUhwWm9QcxoFw45ppqOT8lbhRjDJfgBsh1_KpJnCFduv-DeNCucl112bgFePj4wztgA8Hru59oa9D_qI2ScTtcoWtkBJ3iUA0uJZvxMPu9-urnZpAIqAcq7NTgtGamoMKYskVktGZD8cn5Zc1c5rAySlDCrnn4gyz6Nty65gGat76Wwnwf-1o2fsslhvqBc&c=N65Yt_rhIxYwegG0myuhtsGfgnU5p5WRRzcnQcZBH57_7ZF2AdHvuA==&ch=HihiUx3jmhcwfxirRfZShbnEoFsdciATOvt61aXXBuX64fBF_x9E4Q==)
---
Thank you,
---
| |
---

Amy Carnevale
Chair, MassGOP

P.S. - We're laser focused on peeling back the Democrats' supermajority one race, one candidate, and one VICTORY at a time.
Chip in to help us recruit Republican candidates across the state (no amount is too small) -> [https://secure.winred.com/massachusetts-gop/2026](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TqUhwWm9QcxoFw45ppqOT8lbhRjDJfgBsh1_KpJnCFduv-DeNCucl112bgFePj4wztgA8Hru59oa9D_qI2ScTtcoWtkBJ3iUA0uJZvxMPu9-urnZpAIqAcq7NTgtGamoMKYskVktGZD8cn5Zc1c5rAySlDCrnn4gyz6Nty65gGat76Wwnwf-1o2fsslhvqBc&c=N65Yt_rhIxYwegG0myuhtsGfgnU5p5WRRzcnQcZBH57_7ZF2AdHvuA==&ch=HihiUx3jmhcwfxirRfZShbnEoFsdciATOvt61aXXBuX64fBF_x9E4Q==)

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: AG Platkin vs. Common Sense
body:
Peter, President Trump has wasted no time cracking down on the border crisis – as voters overwhelmingly elected him to do.
|
---
| Peter, President Trump has wasted no time cracking down on the border crisis – as voters overwhelmingly elected him to do. He declared a national emergency, stopped use of the Biden-era CBP app, reinstated ‘Remain in Mexico’ and put an end to birthright citizenship. And that’s just the beginning. What has been the reaction of New Jersey officials – who should be on notice with an election upcoming? Well, AG Matt Platkin and Governor Phil Murphy are using their power and platform to push back on President Trump’s border crackdown, even though [an estimated 10%](https://xtz223.keap-link013.com/v2/click/223df42c12b576e56c18f7f9e9fad5d3/eJyNkMFOwzAQRP_F57hOnIBQblVVVVHaHhCckRVvqWliW_a2JlT5dzaAegKJ6-6bmZ29MgSrLDaa1ewdP6QsWcYCdMYbsLhyFlX3tZV3VVEWGeuNPW2CO3tWX38V34B5XFYPMmM4eiDk6XG5apv95mXb7FsivQqU8U-f_P7ms94tmy2bpj-NYTC4vpB3ZDWGM8yNtKFW-Bx64o-IPtZCpJQWScWjsa9ITc0AcdG5QVhIUchcVmJQoyhyQWp0waieQyRMIWhe5NwdOKH8DUKEkQeIRs-hvDcXQWco78Hqnx-2MH4fM30Ca_J7qA==) of New Jersey’s population is illegal. This week, AG Platkin joined California and a slew of blue states (and of course, the city of San Francisco) in challenging his executive order on birthright citizenship. More challenges are expected to follow, as once again, New Jersey’s leadership misses what voters care about.
---
| | [ I’m tired of the lunacy. I’m ready to become a member!](https://xtz223.keap-link013.com/v2/click/58cba4ab1bd4146e056338ef1ce2b9a1/eJyNkMsKglAQht9l1pJ5qcCdiIhoLqLW4WXIQ54LxzGy8N07XahNQTCrmW--4Z8rEIpSUNpAAGe6uK4HFmismWIoKJKCyvoxdRe-4zkWdEwcEy0HBcH16_IbuLc9f7W0gEaFBtluwihLi2Sfp0VmSFVqc-NPz_zjiddhmsM0_RQjZxSfjLuHgPSA90QNM6lopzvDt0SqD2y7lpxL0aOpuhuqmdQHmyOvUPctU7YxlUqhaF5vyHB8-qYbsh5mZw==)
---
| Trump’s Deputy Press Secretary, Harrison Fields, had these strong words in response to the Leftist freakout. "These lawsuits are nothing more than an extension of the Left’s resistance – and the Trump administration is ready to face them in court," he said. Let’s face it. The Left has _never_ cared about the threat of an open border and the many loopholes used to game and overwhelm our immigration system. They only had to begin to pretend to care during the election when common sense voters rose up en masse and said “enough!” But the attraction of suing Trump is simply too strong for partisans like Platkin to resist, and so once again they retreat to their radical ideological corner, with no thought for the voters who elected Trump and are preparing to kick many of them out of Trenton in 2025. The wave is coming. JOIN the fight and engage as a voter. body:

| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20003/6374453/741f0deb02fba05b1d26f9aeb65daa31d01eb756/c431944d4c9c17dc023d767ae6cfaa74381f7625)

_January 25th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
Hey there, Meet the Tomahawk that’s a cut above the rest - a tool that perfectly merges rugged durability, slick design, and multi-purpose functionality. Please, allow us to introduce [the Steel River Tomahawk. ](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20003/6374453/741f0deb02fba05b1d26f9aeb65daa31d01eb756/c431944d4c9c17dc023d767ae6cfaa74381f7625) But be warned, this isn't your run-of-the-mill tool - it's a workhorse wrapped in sleek sophistication, ready to accompany you on your most exciting adventures. Crafted from top-notch forged steel, this tomahawk isn't just built to last; it's built to conquer. Its 3.5” blade provides precision cutting, chopping, and hacking capabilities. It's finished with a sexy black coating, giving it a distinct, stealthy appeal. No more unnecessary exertion - whether you're felling small trees or splitting firewood, [the Steel River Tomahawk](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20003/6374453/741f0deb02fba05b1d26f9aeb65daa31d01eb756/c431944d4c9c17dc023d767ae6cfaa74381f7625) is designed to work with you, not against you. And that's not all. The handle of our tomahawk is wrapped in **military-grade paracord**. You never know when you might need some sturdy cordage in the wild. Want to see it for yourself? [Click here](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20003/6374453/741f0deb02fba05b1d26f9aeb65daa31d01eb756/c431944d4c9c17dc023d767ae6cfaa74381f7625) to get a closer look. But be quick - a tool this extraordinary won't stay in stock for long! Adventure awaits, and the Steel River Tomahawk is ready to take you there.

name: Troy Downing
subject: We need a UNITED Conservative movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Show the left that Conservatives are united

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._H75VZumVMh_FEx1lVnuw)
---
Peter,

Just days into President Trump’s term, the left is already launching vicious attacks – not just on him, but on all Conservatives. They’re using the same tired tactics, labeling us as racists and fascists, hoping to divide and silence us.

But let me be clear: **WE WON’T BACK DOWN**.

As a freshman member of Congress, I’ve seen firsthand how critical it is for Conservatives to stand united. The left wants to see us fractured, but we know that unity is our greatest strength. Together, we can fend off these attacks and defend the America First values we believe in.

[**Will you chip in today to help me send a powerful message of Conservative UNITY to the left?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

Thank you,

Congressman Troy Downing

name: STEVE SCALISE
subject: Before it’s too late…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If you want to help save our House Majority before it is too late, I’m pleading with you to read this memo from start to finish.

| |
---
| | | TO: Concerned American Patriots
FROM: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
RE: The State of Our Pro-Trump Majority
* * *

If you want to help save our House Majority before it is too late, I'm pleading with you to read this memo from start to finish.

_Our House Majority is on the brink of collapse._ The margins are closer than ever, three must-win Special Elections are closing in, and the Democrats are spending MILLIONS to overtake us.

**> >>> Where we stand:**

- President Trump was JUST sworn in as Commander-in-Chief and our Republican Trifecta is in full swing

- Mike Waltz JUST resigned from Congress to serve in the Trump Administration. As of right now, the size and strength of our House Majority FULLY DEPEND on Special Elections FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21

- House Democrats JUST launched a 10 million dollar smear campaign to undercut our House Majority and kneecap Trump's legislative agenda

**> >>> What's at stake:**

Our House Majority is one of the closest margins in 100 years. Don't forget - it's also the last line of defense standing between us ushering in the Great American Comeback and House Democrats completely dismantling EVERYTHING we just fought to win.

**> >>> Our plan of action:**

_The FIRST monthly deadline since President Trump took control is just days away and we 're dangerously behind our goal._

name: Eva Piatek, Evergreen
subject: Quick temperature check 🌡️
body:
We want to hear from you, friend
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3272233/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi there,

It’s been a few days since President Trump’s inauguration and the flurry of horrific executive orders that immediately followed. We’ll have more for you on what it all means for climate next week.

With everything going on right now, it’s okay to feel overwhelmed. We’re all in this together, which is why we want to check in.

**How are you feeling? What do you need from our movement?**[**Take our brief survey and let us know where you’re at.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3272234/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3272235/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| We’re gearing up for a lot of fights in the coming weeks—from defending key programs of the Inflation Reduction Act to fighting for low-cost clean energy solutions—but none of it works without your input and support.

[**Take a minute to share your thoughts with us today**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3272236/87SdQ4wZ)**—because you’re an essential part of the Evergreen community.** |
---
| With hope and gratitude, |
---
| | |
---
### Eva Piatek
Email Production Manager
Evergreen Collaborative
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |

name: Hillsdale College via Inside Scoop Politics
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Inside Scoop Politics is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkUGL3SAQxz-NuRl0jEn2kMOWvMBC97XwCj2K0XmJYFTUtF-_ZNm99zr_4f_7MfP7Xb1r513Y7vrAyZWiclFBq915T7dcaUZqQs1eAQNJGacgFW_sJIGPz7HBiQ9iGFkvO2j2qR_5C3bs2ZlutWIYAQe7jus4doIDX7Fx09XDOEjOJJOyHRC4Zi9m6HsrQTxJx85kdcXWheIsFhNjStG76kxpY94aP-21pkLEK4GFwOJTe9kWqz22aE8CS92Rbhn1pV-wUmP0tSuWYoiYGeMg7gw6-M76-cd8uz0I9Gc9VIlnNkjEnHIsCU11YfuMDrTuPIiY8dDOfw6NPpJ2WyBirjt-ED-AX3EMFUMlYv52u9-Wt18P9fOVvj0e9OsITZ5s-uu8d6UfSMe2q7w18Wjq_z_jzwT_AgAA___tdJDt)
---
| | [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkUGL3SAQxz-NuRl0jEn2kMOWvMBC97XwCj2K0XmJYFTUtF-_ZNm99zr_4f_7MfP7Xb1r513Y7vrAyZWiclFBq915T7dcaUZqQs1eAQNJGacgFW_sJIGPz7HBiQ9iGFkvO2j2qR_5C3bs2ZlutWIYAQe7jus4doIDX7Fx09XDOEjOJJOyHRC4Zi9m6HsrQTxJx85kdcXWheIsFhNjStG76kxpY94aP-21pkLEK4GFwOJTe9kWqz22aE8CS92Rbhn1pV-wUmP0tSuWYoiYGeMg7gw6-M76-cd8uz0I9Gc9VIlnNkjEnHIsCU11YfuMDrTuPIiY8dDOfw6NPpJ2WyBirjt-ED-AX3EMFUMlYv52u9-Wt18P9fOVvj0e9OsITZ5s-uu8d6UfSMe2q7w18Wjq_z_jzwT_AgAA___tdJDt) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkUGL3SAQxz-NuRl0jEn2kMOWvMBC97XwCj2K0XmJYFTUtF-_ZNm99zr_4f_7MfP7Xb1r513Y7vrAyZWiclFBq915T7dcaUZqQs1eAQNJGacgFW_sJIGPz7HBiQ9iGFkvO2j2qR_5C3bs2ZlutWIYAQe7jus4doIDX7Fx09XDOEjOJJOyHRC4Zi9m6HsrQTxJx85kdcXWheIsFhNjStG76kxpY94aP-21pkLEK4GFwOJTe9kWqz22aE8CS92Rbhn1pV-wUmP0tSuWYoiYGeMg7gw6-M76-cd8uz0I9Gc9VIlnNkjEnHIsCU11YfuMDrTuPIiY8dDOfw6NPpJ2WyBirjt-ED-AX3EMFUMlYv52u9-Wt18P9fOVvj0e9OsITZ5s-uu8d6UfSMe2q7w18Wjq_z_jzwT_AgAA___tdJDt)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Inside Scoop Politics
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Some social media companies won’t let us tell you this
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Vm5r8V-DiAwRzRw8fQnwog~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Vm5r8V-DiAwRzRw8fQnwog~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Vm5r8V-DiAwRzRw8fQnwog~~/AARclAA~~~)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation

[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d470e0e498f44971b3f37d2ab1979fde&_e=DpEHP4KqRL2uI0Y4cSOX12BjnFL_pra_LJu55yyAKOTJDRDQyBrxObgTFkquBwkfXiqOcN3qs5QeFSv61XSkl1qV76LpXeB4vugbiiMYe_rSZa4bzLVLc_mMDwznFZ711hipbyNtizmmkVWkJCbQrswaEJlIaxuaXADI6imMzHv0mYNVpD7SI-w48yoHVQBjkm7l6xpgRIWevG6ijyRIojMWg4B46eHgJxgK6JeaCPSg-0vCmeJGJVRfV9JQ8Yzn-dMG8myPB4vw3QfXQEQnP3UE9NY52VuSwDO92-my3G30rjt8rtgJmca9EfHxVz7oTrZ1HaYMhwOVb3uLWKZgX5sQbYlkgW4XSf5KdAg-YsE-CAo3sJSbItGqtWTWWU7pp3tzYmRiTCX-GwkDmIi90SQPtl7PUBODWfjHC5kEKGD5I6LPomOVkCjTpYV_aamjkeaO5cigw_4J4cHJ6hUG6DxoEUbnfX8zgNdnL8-2Zr8%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d470e0e498f44971b3f37d2ab1979fde&_e=DpEHP4KqRL2uI0Y4cSOX12BjnFL_pra_LJu55yyAKOTJDRDQyBrxObgTFkquBwkfXiqOcN3qs5QeFSv61XSkl1qV76LpXeB4vugbiiMYe_rSZa4bzLVLc_mMDwznFZ711hipbyNtizmmkVWkJCbQrswaEJlIaxuaXADI6imMzHv0mYNVpD7SI-w48yoHVQBjkm7l6xpgRIWevG6ijyRIojMWg4B46eHgJxgK6JeaCPSg-0vCmeJGJVRfV9JQ8Yzn-dMG8myPB4vw3QfXQEQnP3UE9NY52VuSwDO92-my3G30rjt8rtgJmca9EfHxVz7oTrZ1HaYMhwOVb3uLWKZgX1cU4h6eunb5USLez4Ebe6N5qoB4INoYdPgtbPB0-NSHBdXG2qXgo4fHtk0OaTgeuz4pdkrPeSkKIbpwg_AtlsMtlu549dCB6skfi2qo9hmxe-x1DTFvztU86K4AFRn4URW6SwtCmOR5PR-gBslrIX8%3D) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **[hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d470e0e498f44971b3f37d2ab1979fde&_e=DpEHP4KqRL2uI0Y4cSOX12BjnFL_pra_LJu55yyAKOTJDRDQyBrxObgTFkquBwkfXiqOcN3qs5QeFSv61XSkl1qV76LpXeB4vugbiiMYe_rSZa4bzLVLc_mMDwznFZ711hipbyNtizmmkVWkJCbQrswaEJlIaxuaXADI6imMzHv0mYNVpD7SI-w48yoHVQBjkm7l6xpgRIWevG6ijyRIojMWg4B46eHgJxgK6JeaCPSg-0vCmeJGJVRfV9JQ8Yzn-dMG8myPB4vw3QfXQEQnP3UE9NY52VuSwDO92-my3G30rjt8rtgJmca9EfHxVz7oTrZ1HaYMhwOVb3uLWKZgX5ma256rfRfZrsbFIDjLyUO_hMfXLkFKjCP2splcP7OggleT0X6qGDQydffpiYdrInEUABzxtKFVFYYTWTGxXK1r24_zW1eAgE6x7SZxUD0DKEJyJfwGOPAm_vz19XaORo06znHmv9QapJylTiaAC-s%3D) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d470e0e498f44971b3f37d2ab1979fde&_e=DpEHP4KqRL2uI0Y4cSOX12BjnFL_pra_LJu55yyAKOTJDRDQyBrxObgTFkquBwkfXiqOcN3qs5QeFSv61XSkl1qV76LpXeB4vugbiiMYe_rSZa4bzLVLc_mMDwznFZ711hipbyNtizmmkVWkJCbQrswaEJlIaxuaXADI6imMzHv0mYNVpD7SI-w48yoHVQBjkm7l6xpgRIWevG6ijyRIojMWg4B46eHgJxgK6JeaCPSg-0vCmeJGJVRfV9JQ8Yzn-dMG8myPB4vw3QfXQEQnP3UE9NY52VuSwDO92-my3G30rjt8rtgJmca9EfHxVz7oTrZ1HaYMhwOVb3uLWKZgX100Ix2Sy56Wzw-QlPDPd19oTWhP0FJyewYN-crNcZ7thAQo_uFcL0MbY5twb1rGb7joe35i0pbDzabfhZKcrW5Xm95EvzcKN-pu6RNX25-I2KECcUus1U5cwP4bRAhPrXN9BaZWBkLQJ-MVYcsqqpQ%3D)
[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d470e0e498f44971b3f37d2ab1979fde&_e=DpEHP4KqRL2uI0Y4cSOX12BjnFL_pra_LJu55yyAKOTJDRDQyBrxObgTFkquBwkfXiqOcN3qs5QeFSv61XSkl1qV76LpXeB4vugbiiMYe_rSZa4bzLVLc_mMDwznFZ711hipbyNtizmmkVWkJCbQrswaEJlIaxuaXADI6imMzHv0mYNVpD7SI-w48yoHVQBjkm7l6xpgRIWevG6ijyRIojMWg4B46eHgJxgK6JeaCPSg-0vCmeJGJVRfV9JQ8Yzn-dMG8myPB4vw3QfXQEQnP3UE9NY52VuSwDO92-my3G30rjt8rtgJmca9EfHxVz7oTrZ1HaYMhwOVb3uLWKZgXxudXUPbEtQS6ECqfljvEU2Q2o48QGnLZIZ6wxbazzrT3Nq6aXGJDlx2-BQ3AAojwedFM2KEWdxhMKq0KsugUEsDXVkX2eLrcfeftHPUANgoHQr3g5zeMl408DoxhVG2OFVW48FJ4lGM0BEqYYnc8Mc%3D)
What makes [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d470e0e498f44971b3f37d2ab1979fde&_e=DpEHP4KqRL2uI0Y4cSOX12BjnFL_pra_LJu55yyAKOTJDRDQyBrxObgTFkquBwkfXiqOcN3qs5QeFSv61XSkl1qV76LpXeB4vugbiiMYe_rSZa4bzLVLc_mMDwznFZ711hipbyNtizmmkVWkJCbQrswaEJlIaxuaXADI6imMzHv0mYNVpD7SI-w48yoHVQBjkm7l6xpgRIWevG6ijyRIojMWg4B46eHgJxgK6JeaCPSg-0vCmeJGJVRfV9JQ8Yzn-dMG8myPB4vw3QfXQEQnP3UE9NY52VuSwDO92-my3G30rjt8rtgJmca9EfHxVz7oTrZ1HaYMhwOVb3uLWKZgX_IPB0nWMPMMKKbZqo8k8CZsl16Pt-9iUX-0FVwxlcKamJtR23hnOFBDc9rd6Bh6lbSVITKJ793BBw4MYl3kRu2XAjgfW0_PmlU7BzUMzlabEle1m3NPWKAD7L9sr-pe-4AxBeU1NbUQcyk1y4K0bDs%3D) IX hearing aid so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it's the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d470e0e498f44971b3f37d2ab1979fde&_e=DpEHP4KqRL2uI0Y4cSOX12BjnFL_pra_LJu55yyAKOTJDRDQyBrxObgTFkquBwkfXiqOcN3qs5QeFSv61XSkl1qV76LpXeB4vugbiiMYe_rSZa4bzLVLc_mMDwznFZ711hipbyNtizmmkVWkJCbQrswaEJlIaxuaXADI6imMzHv0mYNVpD7SI-w48yoHVQBjkm7l6xpgRIWevG6ijyRIojMWg4B46eHgJxgK6JeaCPSg-0vCmeJGJVRfV9JQ8Yzn-dMG8myPB4vw3QfXQEQnP3UE9NY52VuSwDO92-my3G30rjt8rtgJmca9EfHxVz7oTrZ1HaYMhwOVb3uLWKZgX86SXrOnDqs8q07U5AwTzWir90_dM_iG19N-P0nZsgEzxEtFikKbHzjDqnT09c3a2MVJ4NGSw1squHYGdmtTofLxoJMG6t-RGLqnOq_8JTloRiD638IDudlWKgHYXM9I1B7np68Z2uhEotqXMVvkijo%3D) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d470e0e498f44971b3f37d2ab1979fde&_e=DpEHP4KqRL2uI0Y4cSOX12BjnFL_pra_LJu55yyAKOTJDRDQyBrxObgTFkquBwkfXiqOcN3qs5QeFSv61XSkl1qV76LpXeB4vugbiiMYe_rSZa4bzLVLc_mMDwznFZ711hipbyNtizmmkVWkJCbQrswaEJlIaxuaXADI6imMzHv0mYNVpD7SI-w48yoHVQBjkm7l6xpgRIWevG6ijyRIojMWg4B46eHgJxgK6JeaCPSg-0vCmeJGJVRfV9JQ8Yzn-dMG8myPB4vw3QfXQEQnP3UE9NY52VuSwDO92-my3G30rjt8rtgJmca9EfHxVz7oTrZ1HaYMhwOVb3uLWKZgX7qDUe7vA6pcA6lkg_AAvKA7ojl_3XDiFATvhrfK-BFvh_AbqTudr6ULVK5_ZQd03C5PQWmcDoCaiCbcdC2uWO7Q3j4KoTdgEHAnc1dQU8ajzERhHLb5erZlLLln7QD2Gi8FFHovRWiEKNn_X5sC1Yw%3D) founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

clean_body: Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's new IX hearing aid. And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It's no wonder IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes IX hearing aid so special? It's one of the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it's the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. "It's not just about volume," explains founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize." In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design! A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ac5a93f22ccb4793aff99376a2f37905&_e=qpmULtXMJD_yHfdT-ZgPhOr3Siqj4TwC6lTm0DUmmLgIMnYrEjXEG5hk_iCgCa9zJ0YKqQh5XZhz6vPHrqwod8XBetcjdfYY5eTzPL5fP8GXCTerKgtH01n9WQpa9CzsysUY8OFOU9XzvEGJHsTG1j5_8PUJqFaeCwPKNpNe82g5XmjTqxBMfxZcyjwHruGzn2w8XJDN5hcwPP0vUlWDEnO4-yOpptrtbMDsuOSVuDDbHUzR9PEyGHHFKkq5LeA8KUtqCYYxsbB7IyYLQX9ASgTwg4DW63m1JlrDlSx0lmXViXxpz92K1_IQw-BJSAK9GbtnxACkltPou1dj3MHbhQqKViwkltrpNDWxgV0NHM1_adOrAiNnfwhSTfHoVvHSAMARNWLsjyaaNG_q0lMbmQ%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

## Cowboys Tap Schottenheimer As Head Coach
The Dallas Cowboys have named [Brian Schottenheimer](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp8Gb1hwDTYeGLqwpWtHi5-bgIRNBCiO375K986f9J2j83PbbjbldDy-7Y66v-9lAwaSMk5BbsGmfG1iCNqxsPIBNV-mRTGhuByiXt3ig-JS4eJQBOFXDGKZICzzJJWzQ9KfM8ZBcg6zWMdJrYqHwNzs1CwsJ4JhSL3UsUfs-Lbtnq_ywjr6sg9Zx96fjUxfBAwBc57niO15fEYC5rhnAqb1Ui8CZiNgUiBgxCTlB0rA-HK6cjUaU0XqS6khHbaXSl1N9qDNx9I7HhHTjpVGtIH6Yn0cqg7PM-Wc2rwQwR67TflPqf_b6KXhNwAA__-Qy2lm) as their next head coach, promoting him from his offensive coordinator role after multiple interviews this week. Schottenheimer has held an [offensive coordinator position](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO5CAQRL8GZ4ygjQEHDi5xtpdeOGrczYLEmBGg9c7fn-Z06YalKpX03p-P-wfmks_P3_jgbXzHegcFi1RawnInzOV1NxNtQdGqJ960m51XxutlSpt1bMkrxxj0rEJkJu2WaJd5ZqMUTnl7nykNi9ZgzXqb_eo1kQo2eGtQC6OY8qjtNhIP_sYey6t-cbsd9TGVLY3x7GL-JWAXsF_Xdbsi4rsUsGMb-SgsYO_P2kYXsJ-xCNiPeoX6eucrVZm7DC3jKfuR6hh8Js4PbpKwFOzy_1gmRpJHxSPJztiOJGAH76RnQm_AyYCOpLHRy1UDSFLzskZLaBRNbaPnlUvJ3Tph1OcDc_mHMH50-rXB3wAAAP__VOd4LA) in the NFL since 2006 and has been in Dallas for two years. Initial reaction from the Cowboy fan base was not enthusiastic as the deal was taking shape, deeming it [a safe pick](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L-OhCAYBPCnwY4NfCpqQXEN3V57peHvSoJg4Muuvv3F66-bZJJfJvPzXJ86pphf33r3Es9QVmAwUsYpjKvTMV3r0DlpmFt45yWf-mlmw8zHbpPGujC5ifUs-LAYEbgwYQwLaMHAwNhFeWOMw8g5iGF59PMyc-eYEWYWg-ZkYN5FLPWBm0d_6hbSVd6-PmzZuyQ3xKOR_ouAIqDydZSGd0VA3TIBxfidewKqHaViI6Bs-ZhyNWpTaTG_aMy0ZGpq1Jk2uxVEnzcfd1-pbjT7E6kt2m4EVFelOz4xpdjERAb22nVMf1vw33PeEn4DAAD__8xvZrw) for owner Jerry Jones who reportedly conducted the coaching search almost single-handedly. The Cowboys also interviewed Seattle Seahawks assistant Leslie Frazier, Philadelphia Eagles offensive coordinator Kellen Moore, and former New York Jets head coach Robert Saleh.
## Abbott Seeks $11B for Securing Border
Gov. Greg Abbott has requested an [$11 billion reimbursement](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O5CAQhJ8GZ4zo5sc4ILjE2V564Qjc7R102Iwws955-5M3v6ykkupTfX8-7h8xl7x__o4bh_691jsqtFKBRHunmMv7bgYKSdEEAwcY9eiV8WCHR1gdGgfAbP2EE0zgorIEkdmRXbUecrjGFKAFQGemm_aTByKVXPLORBBGMeVe260_uPN3PNbyrl_cbkvdhhIevT8PoX8JnAXO53ne_j7q6yoFzrH1vBQWOO98HgLnZy255-WKMaXau1yZZMql5LrLVBtxkwcvr5b7WzbOW3q1gzfeu_yBy5SJd9nba3sKnNFbiZMf9aJHaXxCaZJmGSmBpESaGIg9LUML9DwvzOFGYdTnFnP5edD_q_Qr4L8AAAD__8lLeOA) from the federal government for the cost of stepping up border security during the Biden administration, saying the former president "left Texas and the rest of America defenseless." Abbott outlined his request in a letter to members of U.S. Congress on Thursday, arguing that the measures taken by the state to secure the border should have been covered by the federal government. The costs incurred include [$3 billion for wall](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GSgyAYhJ8GOhz-X1AoKK6xy7VXOiCoTBAzyoTk7W9Mn_7bb3f_buPNxhTz8mu3YMpr3kfkKBkHhnL0Nqb3KKg3jnsNNBjo215xoUDS1eA0e-Wcwy70fauF1MC1nMHODr2TkkZzyTigBMBO6KZVWoH33HVOdcICETz4WPajKWso4WXPOb33Zziaad9oMmspj5O0PwQHgkOttcmhnjWE-wUQHD4ZVm0uJwNgLqYU98ycne5suUR5C7kw5HitoIfxj3oxZ9cTwZfNxvSpKl-_Pw3-BwAA__9miVux) construction and $6 billion for deploying the National Guard and law enforcement to the border. Operation Lone Star, launched by Abbott in 2021, has [reduced illegal immigration](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu4yAURL8Gd1hAAOOCYht32XZL6xKuY7TYWHATJ3__lPSvHB3NaHT-XecrpJz2-1_Y0NNrKbMSynAhuTJzhJTfs-6iDyKOskMvh8vghHbSdKs32lotgzWjC6A0jE6MYFSUSxyChqFL_jMmpDJSKqvH_uJGJ2MUwQZnNUimBcZEpfa0IuEL2pLf5Ym1v5Wty34lOhq7_GFqYmo6z7NfymvHs304U9NRcqJ0a0xN3za_lyeHEAoRh_b_m7HuG-7EK6YtPGpD3ggIuZSBt-NDGt4eFXkrD1qx7jyUGrF21cfjTDmnZgemxX2DlL-_6FdRT69-AgAA___JcG4X) into Texas by 87% over the last four years.
## Texas Restaurants Make James Beard List
The [James Beard Awards](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2LhDAQhn9N7JR8aNQixcFit9deKRMTdY7ELElcd__9oRzXXTMDMy8vD8_XfbwDOtyWT_BW5dccRk55U1JW8mY0gO491oVRmpqeFVaxVrQdrTvWFKvS0yy7pgctoOX9RBut21ky2fbSzsKYAtVZRhlvGOOy7ivR9R0zhmqpO1kDIzW1BnOIVV5tti9Is3uHp43VFHzh1JrzIxHxQfhA-HAcR_UN3iZtIZoqxIXwQbtwrrza8iK_AuWVKOE4Z7IeZ9zAYcqJiGHPfkxhj5Ml4oZbyrBE8ITL8-Gtwd0TcUthQnC_1wn8A3DZiLj96eFFVOZxoHOYZEtqunhAd4Hnf00-Ff8JAAD__0bNdqc), honoring outstanding restaurants and people in the U.S. food industry, included a host of Texas names among its semifinalists for 2025. Houston boasts 10 semifinalists in the list and Austin and San Antonio both added six. Best New Restaurant semifinalists include Ema in Houston, Lao’d Bar in Austin, and Mābo in Dallas, while Bar Colette in Dallas was the lone Texas representative for Best New Bar. You can see the full list of [James Beard semifinalists here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2LhDAQhn9N7JR8aNQixcFit9deKRMTdY7ELElcd__9oRzXXTMDMy8vD8_XfbwDOtyWT_BW5dccRk55U1JW8mY0gO491oVRmpqeFVaxVrQdrTvWFKvS0yy7pgctoOX9RBut21ky2fbSzsKYAtVZRhlvGOOy7ivR9R0zhmqpO1kDIzW1BnOIVV5tti9Is3uHp43VFHzh1JrzIxHxQfhA-HAcR_UN3iZtIZoqxIXwQbtwrrza8iK_AuWVKOE4Z7IeZ9zAYcqJiGHPfkxhj5Ml4oZbyrBE8ITL8-Gtwd0TcUthQnC_1wn8A3DZiLj96eFFVOZxoHOYZEtqunhAd4Hnf00-Ff8JAAD__0bNdqc).

Initial reaction from the Cowboy fan base was not enthusiastic as the deal was taking shape, deeming it for owner Jerry Jones who reportedly conducted the coaching search almost single-handedly. The Cowboys also interviewed Seattle Seahawks assistant Leslie Frazier, Philadelphia Eagles offensive coordinator Kellen Moore, and former New York Jets head coach Robert Saleh. Abbott Seeks $11B for Securing Border Gov. Greg Abbott has requested an from the federal government for the cost of stepping up border security during the Biden administration, saying the former president "left Texas and the rest of America defenseless." Abbott outlined his request in a letter to members of U.S. Congress on Thursday, arguing that the measures taken by the state to secure the border should have been covered by the federal government. The costs incurred include construction and $6 billion for deploying the National Guard and law enforcement to the border. Operation Lone Star, launched by Abbott in 2021, has into Texas by 87% over the last four years. Texas Restaurants Make James Beard List The , honoring outstanding restaurants and people in the U.S. food industry, included a host of Texas names among its semifinalists for 2025. Houston boasts 10 semifinalists in the list and Austin and San Antonio both added six. | **_A PRIVATE MEMO FROM HOUSE GOP LEADERSHIP_**

Friend,

The American people may have defeated the Left’s most tyrannical LAWFARE against President Trump – including the 4 sham criminal cases that could have wrongfully JAILED him for LIFE.
---
**_But as of now, radical New York Attorney General Tish James’ bogus civil lawsuit – and the unconstitutional fine of nearly HALF A BILLION DOLLARS that a corrupt Democrat judge imposed on him as a result – still remains active!_**
---
**NBC News:
_Trump's criminal cases fading away, but some legal perils still loom in 2025_ **
_“The soon-to-be president still faces numerous lawsuits that could cost him hundreds of millions of dollars.”_
---
The most disturbing part? The ruling is written in such a way that demands President Trump pay **_INTEREST_** on the record-breaking fine...
---
**_...Meaning that unless the ruling is overturned on appeal, he’ll effectively be fined nearly $112,000 _PER_ _DAY_ while he serves as President of the United States! _**
---
The Left failed to lock President Trump in JAIL as an innocent man, so they’re pivoting to their next best option: _Using this sham case to financially bleed him dry!_
---
But there’s one way to stop this witch hunt.
---
**Millions of Americans like _YOU_ need to speak out and DEMAND that the appeals court intervene to stop this tyranny before these corrupt Far Left extremists can BANKRUPT the sitting President of the United States! **
---

[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9SqS/?__vbtrk=MjcxNzE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxNzE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---

President Trump is so selfless that he’s even waived his own salary as president – _all while knowing he could be FINED $112,000 per day because of Tish James’ sham case._
---
**Now, it’s time for _WE THE PEOPLE_ to selflessly stand with _him_.**
---

---

Remember, Tish James has threatened to seize President Trump’s bank accounts and confiscate his iconic home Trump tower.
---
You’re probably thinking there’s no way that could ever happen to the sitting President of the United States...
---
_...but the Left has already shattered political norms and ripped the Constitution to SHREDS in their quest to destroy President Trump. We can’t assume anything._
---
[**So please, add your name to sign our petition DEMANDING that the appeals court OVERTURN this plot to financially bleed President Trump dry.**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9SqS/?__vbtrk=MjcxNzE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxNzE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

# Saturday, January 25, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1924, the [first Winter Olympics](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwyAQQL8Gb0RwnIMZGLp4S9eOFoFzfBWYCKOk-fsq3Ts_6T29r8tyCZx5v32GQr6vdQEFo1RawrikwPm14JD8SgRkBvLaGjsptHgeNh90umLQNk7TiAkhok0mTeCuxiSj3MD-bVMaRq2NMuqkHF5TNDFSIARSAhUl7rWdvivvfaM1v-qD2inWMmS_9X4_hPkQMAuYOxd6AwEzOmdGAAHzyu3o8sl7pyZrfpU7x0NqByjjFkrd-UeuLeyRBMxD8-n-5Jz5OFuB6lYC579W_-_94eE3AAD__5ASWk4) took place in Chamonix, France, lasting 10 days. Sixteen countries participated in 16 events, including figure skating, speed skating, hockey, curling, and bobsledding. Panda diplomacy made a return to Washington, D.C., on Friday as the National Zoo welcomed Bao Li and Qing Bao, a pair of giant pandas on loan from China. ## Trump Threatens FEMA
President Donald Trump visited [areas affected by natural disasters](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGvpSAQhX8NdphhRPEVFNvQvW23NAjjdTYoBrnX-O83bv-6rzg55-T78z19e068v377jWxd8oSAvQQlsZ-i53RPuol2IULqGrLKdGYEbfTQrFYRzcM49oAz6OhHP0M0MQ44DDrADA3bpw0U9kp10EELX3qOoQuBPGkkEBoocs2l_Zt5ryst6c4fKm3IW5PsWutxiu6XQCfQXdfVvk9fc_T3ExDozprLLdDtdJ0C3ZETVw4PPsMCHaiHtUCX-EPyfURf6ZQx7z5FWct7O-SeS11l8CUn3r0MPvGSy85e1sKHQGfMl1IACGAEuqbYeFycEp-DERpem-f0_3D9SeDH4r8AAAD___8ZcX4) in California and North Carolina on Friday, suggesting that an overhaul of FEMA may be necessary to improve federal disaster relief efforts. Speaking to reporters in North Carolina, [Trump criticized FEMA](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3O4yAQAJ8Gd0SwYDsuKK5xl2uvtDZmCXvix8IkUd7-lOu_eqTRaP7cthty4vL4jZlcD3UDBaNUWsK4eeT02ezgXSACMgM5PZv5quxspyG6MM4YAt79oq2ByQDB4heaJjNdNelpYPe1KQ2j1kYZdVGLvfvd7DshWSAlrCLPvbbL38qlRwrpU1_ULnvNQ3Kx9-MU5peAVcDaI0VO6csErLFmKvQ-BazoMxc-e8POtQhYR63ssmjZ2zMfMlBGWWrrUe7YauKCMj5b4x0LyUiJCslG51HLSXLHxKG2wihgHZrzx5tT4nOahVWPjPw_YOg_zXo5-BcAAP__N-xuPA), calling the agency “not good” and vowing to draft an executive order to reform or dissolve FEMA altogether. Trump praised the disaster recovery models of the governors in North Carolina and Florida, [emphasizing state-led responses](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L9utDAQBPCnMZ3RsjbHd4WLr6G7tCmRsdfHRv5zMg7o3j4ifbqRRvppNJ-P5WE5cn5-2ESmhbIg4ChhkDgu3nJ8L7rzJhAhqY7MMKnpH-hJ37rNWBpBIfmAtN7h5sMd9TpO4JyewhhCx-bSYMBxGBQo6OGuV--Uc2RJI4HQQJ5bqf1X4dw2CvFdDqq9K6mLZmvttQv1X-AscD7Ps3d5dVcpcL5ogTMMV9YC51a_00tWciUlyn6XlD3npwyUrLQbWS9LkM5GDqVmtjJwJblzI3nwzq3fWopdNf51coy83yah4Zksx9857a97DoM_AQAA___Cw2f3) over reliance on external aid. He added that aid should go through the government, not a middleman like FEMA. The president [also listed changes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQAL8Gd1jLLsZJQfEad3ntlRZn1vGewESYi5W_P-X6q0eakebjNt-CJNnv_0Nm39YyI-CgwWgc5hgkvWbbRb8yI1PH3ow0XsCO1nWbJxiiDbSyIRrRXgDRORvdwtERu0sn_m0Dg4MxBAQ9XO1nXGhZOLBFBmWBo7RS-68ie9t4Ta_y5NovJXfJb609DkX_FE4Kp_M8-1fYSnlThdPO56FwavU7P3TkHPZ46CUkWUvdJehnaVy1RG0cjcMAV-i3llNXfXyckpIcblQW7jlI-g22vwY8Pf4EAAD__57NXLs) he would like to see in California, stating the Golden State should implement voter ID laws and adopt less restrictive water regulations.
## Target Rolls Back DEI Programs
Target announced on Friday that it’s [reversing its diversity](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFuwyAQxvGngY0I7sBOBoYu3tK1o4XN2b4KgoVporx95e4dP33Sb_h_3cd74MSP9TNk8m0pI2hwShsFboyB03u0MvqFCAgledNjf9W2t53c_HSFYKlH7HBBZ9FpxGvX3aY4mf7WoWR_atqAMwY16ou-2SnOOM8UyAJpYTVFbqVevgs_2kZLepcn1ctcskx-a20_BH4IGAQMbaONUzo_AcNWMj3odQgYaphJ7SVx4_nczmjnjFUt1JWaisRqr2WtIR-q1Z-8Cxhk9XF_cUp8dL2wes2B_2jZ_svw9PAbAAD__3BJXmI), equity, and inclusion (DEI) policies, becoming the latest corporation to take such action following President Trump's election. In a memo sent to employees, Target announced it will [discontinue its DEI goals](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOszAQBOCnMZ2RvbsEUrj4G7r87ZXIWZawOYMjsILy9ieuv26kkb6R5us23KImXR__4yKhTHkAB4113kIzjFHTZ6BqDJMICFYSfItt56ilSzUHxIY7bvDqqUHE7tIR8dSyw45bgqnScGrOQ-M9OnS1u9J9ZGSWKATiDDkZteStfmZdyyxT-uS3bDXnpUphLuW1G_xnoDfQH8dR83rnszTQn7SB3vkzk4G-xO0hxW45pd3eI3_bJT7zZkdRq6sWjUXfstdzWVK1hfF1aEq6X1pD7rFETb-r5a8X3gF-AgAA__9wkF0n), stop reporting to external diversity organizations, and cancel a program aimed at increasing products from black- or minority-owned businesses. Officials stated that the changes were [based on years of data](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb_G7oiGAYwpKF6TLq_d0sIwJLPCwcIkUf5-le23vLrS0dH5uiyXwIXv1_9hI99zXRDQCJACzZICl_eix-QzEZIayUur7Aza6mm8ebA2YXCrkdKZGDPODmAFE1CZnNw8sv_QQKKRUoGCEzi9pqhipEAaCQYNlLjXdvqufO83yuVdn9ROsW5j8bfe92NQ_wY8D3gO-51ex-f6jNY5Fhrw3EO7UheJWByPvdFGItZH6yLxk9rB_S1shmlOmWiSYZqDCzLPuDpNUplVoRqbT_uLS-FjsoOG6xa4_Dr0v5o8Pf4EAAD__-gDYp8), insights, listening, and learning, which will align the retailer with consumer demands today and in the future. Target has joined Ford, Amazon, Walmart, and Harley-Davidson, along with [other prominent companies](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQhX-NvTk6DjBkYOiSLV07WhiO5CpsXEMS5d9X7t7p6elJT5--r-t09Zx5vX36hVxLZUJAPYAYUE_Rc35Pqo8uESHJnpww0lhQRo393Y3BaEhJBbRi9mDELJNP_hyDl1pH27M73kCgFkKChBOc1RyDDIE8KSToFFDkVvbTd-G13Snld3nSfgpl6bO7t7bVTn50eOnw4reVXvWYjrI3Dpk6vER-0l65vQf6eRzBa8iPymUdHnUIZdn8ylQHK4Q9mxGSmi1KiShQeA8JtbQEAfvdxe3FOXMdTafgtnjOfyDtPzFPh78BAAD__62QZLY), that have scaled back or abandoned their DEI initiatives that gained popularity following the death of George Floyd in 2020.

body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=760f4f55a1284c49af50582a1b5dae39&_e=GZICHhmWMxPxgy3NDvcLF5tM7_3Om-skZ07pkaL8h5eZsrCB1Erbcv7MKTs0x99_M5YIz4hnmMBzcxz4v9tmDUG_00h4eqeL72rWQz-SKhrRDic2JG4pyI_fl31oVQy_wPNYbsA8glST5Z9A_2dXg9uL-kLCb91djM3ODYW5PueFoXUkVJCYsyMN2poX4UmeCF37ZbuO2pj5_K6KNPKnufBkdLJzsa5NLTu-COkVC77QUQg_XAsEHuB8hjq6Fi5BLJks7CxpvPx4Y1UzJWyjQoMoHhWkvTCiR7diZoE4802FFC8PcDLYgRwWcAxDylO7BjX5IS2OeYeG0p1ZO3Lr1gagBe33mXE0pz3N9LRgUw1AB-3oa0ynvTLdb3gl7TumuGp_JlQVdaY164EEpgghUPDVslOngOEUMCGngs4SLRjhtnIGoVaw0Z1RzB7jdGiVBpTPjSH2sPUmuvdHDJyOCw3vrT0HvRbqQDpYfoM9da4%3D)
