| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=760f4f55a1284c49af50582a1b5dae39&_e=GZICHhmWMxPxgy3NDvcLF5tM7_3Om-skZ07pkaL8h5eZsrCB1Erbcv7MKTs0x99_M5YIz4hnmMBzcxz4v9tmDUG_00h4eqeL72rWQz-SKhrRDic2JG4pyI_fl31oVQy_wPNYbsA8glST5Z9A_2dXg9uL-kLCb91djM3ODYW5PueFoXUkVJCYsyMN2poX4UmeCF37ZbuO2pj5_K6KNPKnufBkdLJzsa5NLTu-COkVC77QUQg_XAsEHuB8hjq6Fi5BLJks7CxpvPx4Y1UzJWyjQoMoHhWkvTCiR7diZoE4802FFC8PcDLYgRwWcAxDylO7BjX5IS2OeYeG0p1ZO3Lr1ncCnxjRltcY9L2PPHH91w6mFNEaMIUZeGsqh3DfVi28acs5NjjDre4H5idhDI0QBrbNv1yufBSix8tWibzBzNQ4VD7JDoxkcxL7ME548wGyd5E1pAyCHkTxT1SPHvMFX1xICCo_a8qLq1Gw737h5FM%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=760f4f55a1284c49af50582a1b5dae39&_e=GZICHhmWMxPxgy3NDvcLF5tM7_3Om-skZ07pkaL8h5eZsrCB1Erbcv7MKTs0x99_M5YIz4hnmMBzcxz4v9tmDUG_00h4eqeL72rWQz-SKhrRDic2JG4pyI_fl31oVQy_wPNYbsA8glST5Z9A_2dXg9uL-kLCb91djM3ODYW5PueFoXUkVJCYsyMN2poX4UmeCF37ZbuO2pj5_K6KNPKnufBkdLJzsa5NLTu-COkVC77QUQg_XAsEHuB8hjq6Fi5BLJks7CxpvPx4Y1UzJWyjQoMoHhWkvTCiR7diZoE4802FFC8PcDLYgRwWcAxDylO7BjX5IS2OeYeG0p1ZO3Lr1oVGFzdCfOZNzPwx_F-88nA3yWpYe5HGNNssd6lIaA-iqa1KLQZyalssAHM5dA2cq1d5Ap1qLPaGJ49NdrBJygPQjjcHCvMWcKv9OfO3dhuZ5v9_j8ODLpOz4dKLfSEsMnDqvf0kDJvIdJ-vP2ef5_E%3D) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=760f4f55a1284c49af50582a1b5dae39&_e=GZICHhmWMxPxgy3NDvcLF5tM7_3Om-skZ07pkaL8h5eZsrCB1Erbcv7MKTs0x99_M5YIz4hnmMBzcxz4v9tmDUG_00h4eqeL72rWQz-SKhrRDic2JG4pyI_fl31oVQy_wPNYbsA8glST5Z9A_2dXg9uL-kLCb91djM3ODYW5PueFoXUkVJCYsyMN2poX4UmeCF37ZbuO2pj5_K6KNPKnufBkdLJzsa5NLTu-COkVC77QUQg_XAsEHuB8hjq6Fi5BLJks7CxpvPx4Y1UzJWyjQoMoHhWkvTCiR7diZoE4802FFC8PcDLYgRwWcAxDylO7BjX5IS2OeYeG0p1ZO3Lr1iovyXkgcQloj2oJN-Vayjc3WCEKvNiDBZYkn0kDWyh5wjhSRyWkGUrHA-d8PERQ0woOBh3Bwwhk9_XsmaYpPrhVgDRdFViRO0_AMfLkDPprSBvgl4naXBzFQrpXKo26oDLwqDbj2Rec0usFZx6hECA%3D) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=760f4f55a1284c49af50582a1b5dae39&_e=GZICHhmWMxPxgy3NDvcLF5tM7_3Om-skZ07pkaL8h5eZsrCB1Erbcv7MKTs0x99_M5YIz4hnmMBzcxz4v9tmDUG_00h4eqeL72rWQz-SKhrRDic2JG4pyI_fl31oVQy_wPNYbsA8glST5Z9A_2dXg9uL-kLCb91djM3ODYW5PueFoXUkVJCYsyMN2poX4UmeCF37ZbuO2pj5_K6KNPKnufBkdLJzsa5NLTu-COkVC77QUQg_XAsEHuB8hjq6Fi5BLJks7CxpvPx4Y1UzJWyjQoMoHhWkvTCiR7diZoE4802FFC8PcDLYgRwWcAxDylO7BjX5IS2OeYeG0p1ZO3Lr1o2u6qYktRzkqYfMSMo_YW2labezCtf03uO5MS0HYmYidDZHNaKsr3MhCzIsURWc91t96gU5lPs_9hG1bwLDmnLLrIN7lW06zNhVV89ejkAB5b8WrIwANb170esbDI4KicBZwHdwqgnq3Yglnh985UA%3D)
[ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=760f4f55a1284c49af50582a1b5dae39&_e=GZICHhmWMxPxgy3NDvcLF5tM7_3Om-skZ07pkaL8h5eZsrCB1Erbcv7MKTs0x99_M5YIz4hnmMBzcxz4v9tmDUG_00h4eqeL72rWQz-SKhrRDic2JG4pyI_fl31oVQy_wPNYbsA8glST5Z9A_2dXg9uL-kLCb91djM3ODYW5PueFoXUkVJCYsyMN2poX4UmeCF37ZbuO2pj5_K6KNPKnufBkdLJzsa5NLTu-COkVC77QUQg_XAsEHuB8hjq6Fi5BLJks7CxpvPx4Y1UzJWyjQoMoHhWkvTCiR7diZoE4802FFC8PcDLYgRwWcAxDylO7BjX5IS2OeYeG0p1ZO3Lr1nYDHYuA-wpfaZnZ-XtOrib2D_5kIXKnm4CkscD9vebjHXtu0HeV19eZO-qkDE8-9ihHqBVO19plpvbyLyMPT3Y-9LVr8gy5ASEH76JqyK83MZVMgx6JFjLQCh9t2Ks4jLeXHS-LOVW1mJO5EXxQzpw%3D)
What makes [hear.com's](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=760f4f55a1284c49af50582a1b5dae39&_e=GZICHhmWMxPxgy3NDvcLF5tM7_3Om-skZ07pkaL8h5eZsrCB1Erbcv7MKTs0x99_M5YIz4hnmMBzcxz4v9tmDUG_00h4eqeL72rWQz-SKhrRDic2JG4pyI_fl31oVQy_wPNYbsA8glST5Z9A_2dXg9uL-kLCb91djM3ODYW5PueFoXUkVJCYsyMN2poX4UmeCF37ZbuO2pj5_K6KNPKnufBkdLJzsa5NLTu-COkVC77QUQg_XAsEHuB8hjq6Fi5BLJks7CxpvPx4Y1UzJWyjQoMoHhWkvTCiR7diZoE4802FFC8PcDLYgRwWcAxDylO7BjX5IS2OeYeG0p1ZO3Lr1sSEHx_4jAJp7WpLbDECoN14BVmkZuS9SSjIJjRYomfVQpbkU8_F86t_42W913LawcrBWSA95wP8pqX8GSPxVEN4Xz8ItL4mEOtMatSLAJo9HyakLUY7UfwxzHZ6P0wDUtipD3UEOZ32P1pjnUl3ghY%3D) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=760f4f55a1284c49af50582a1b5dae39&_e=GZICHhmWMxPxgy3NDvcLF5tM7_3Om-skZ07pkaL8h5eZsrCB1Erbcv7MKTs0x99_M5YIz4hnmMBzcxz4v9tmDUG_00h4eqeL72rWQz-SKhrRDic2JG4pyI_fl31oVQy_wPNYbsA8glST5Z9A_2dXg9uL-kLCb91djM3ODYW5PueFoXUkVJCYsyMN2poX4UmeCF37ZbuO2pj5_K6KNPKnufBkdLJzsa5NLTu-COkVC77QUQg_XAsEHuB8hjq6Fi5BLJks7CxpvPx4Y1UzJWyjQoMoHhWkvTCiR7diZoE4802FFC8PcDLYgRwWcAxDylO7BjX5IS2OeYeG0p1ZO3Lr1uQwUhkNNOxGxm3g-su20H9bL4ibPr0AcdCR9QBT0_YWx_AC96-2PiGi00wEEAOn8EoqixmGToE4Ix4i_u_Em9dy2NvpozwWifoWlsi-fum9dn9WuUDLwevkRtPMs4Ch-Vx_MjQjm_gxgr2IVS25Ux4%3D) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=760f4f55a1284c49af50582a1b5dae39&_e=GZICHhmWMxPxgy3NDvcLF5tM7_3Om-skZ07pkaL8h5eZsrCB1Erbcv7MKTs0x99_M5YIz4hnmMBzcxz4v9tmDUG_00h4eqeL72rWQz-SKhrRDic2JG4pyI_fl31oVQy_wPNYbsA8glST5Z9A_2dXg9uL-kLCb91djM3ODYW5PueFoXUkVJCYsyMN2poX4UmeCF37ZbuO2pj5_K6KNPKnufBkdLJzsa5NLTu-COkVC77QUQg_XAsEHuB8hjq6Fi5BLJks7CxpvPx4Y1UzJWyjQoMoHhWkvTCiR7diZoE4802FFC8PcDLYgRwWcAxDylO7BjX5IS2OeYeG0p1ZO3Lr1oVYwjmj8yTQe09BK5ZdUhY5fLmW2mQ_PE8O8t4s8FYfPDsDOW52tJezE4H3Z8DQGz7VJLNfNA8xgzBOxi_olgpXsvY6fnIAIK0g0qig01C7vmzn1xN5WkMoCPTF92lj9walcbAkLUptGkfAcCfb6mc%3D) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**

clean_body: Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's new IX hearing aid. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.” In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design! Limited no-risk trials now available Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. Get started today. Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: History Facts
subject: How long ancient Romans lived
body:
The Roman Empire is responsible for countless innovations that are still used on a daily basis, but it would be putting it lightly to say that medical science has advanced quite a bit since Rome fell. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68d7iyeb5pff2al47xwg3tofyolukuje5re2t65mqu6bce88bk2r038esddllypnx9zj3wa67zkmjqo7kpbelokfzbjqxyrjj2sesux5hrnja7zjqyigpvqpny8r72dh3b7m02s21fqroxy5k&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqn8e9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

# [The average life expectancy in ancient Rome was 35 years.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqn8e9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqn8e9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqn8e9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T he Roman Empire is responsible for countless innovations that are still used on a daily basis, but it would be putting it lightly to say that medical science has advanced quite a bit since Rome fell. Given that — as well as all the [gladiators](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1n3yr048yvnd75jw4jzbxdgok2x7dt6hovzeqoohqmbiqzkw9uasdk3xpvdv8xnsht3pwutuytgfdx6nqwb3nb6rnd23v7fgz773sbc28k44tckelm2a0iaawgu5oa8d1y32d3zmtzl47yyrqj8vy10rsxc19dompvr9kqi1fdvi00zdbdpjjfyvy2q2gl9309bf142enyf139kqktv8zcknd9eopsocfur3accaj5hrwbuwf9y1s1lz9blyc566h7s2aid02nz8psk69u8js197&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqn8e9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), wars, and assassinated emperors — it shouldn’t come as too much of a surprise to learn that life expectancy in ancient Rome was just [35 years](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqn8e9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Yet the real culprit behind that figure is actually the infant mortality rate at the time, as some 25% of babies born in the first century CE didn’t make it past 1 year old, and only half survived past the age of 10.
---
Life expectancy is an average, and one that has tended to increase over time, but life _span_ hasn’t actually changed much in human history. Indeed, it was not uncommon for ancient Romans to live to a ripe old age. Gordian I was 81 when he became emperor of Rome, and Roman statesman Cicero’s wife Terentia lived to be 103, for instance. Pliny the Elder (who, despite his moniker, lived to be just 55 before dying in the eruption of Mount Vesuvius) was particularly impressed by one centenarian he studied. He [wrote](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqn8e9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), “The solitary instance of Xenophilus, the musician, who lived one hundred and five years without any infirmity of body, must be regarded then as a kind of miracle.”
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqn8e9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqn8e9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## The king of Pontus consumed small amounts of poison to develop an immunity to it.
History is written by the victors, but even Rome had to have been impressed by one of its greatest foes: Mithridates VI Eupator, who led the Kingdom of Pontus for nearly six decades and regularly waged war against the Roman Republic. The Romans considered him their most formidable opponent since Hannibal, with the three Mithridatic Wars fought between 89 BCE and 63 BCE to show for it. As he rightly believed he had a target on his back, Mithridates began [ingesting](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqn8e9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) small quantities of poison on a regular basis in order to develop an immunity to its effects. According to Roman physician Aulus Cornelius Celsus, this toxic concoction consisted of 36 different ingredients that were ground into a powder before being mixed with honey and formed into chewable tablets the size of an almond. It seems to have been effective: Mithridates tried to take his own life via poison after being soundly defeated by Pompey, but it didn’t work. More than 2,000 years later, the term “mithridate” survives to describe an antidote against poison.

body:
If Democrats take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

| |
---
| | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because...

_We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat!_

**Remember:** We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

**_[Friend- we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the month to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/G-eahaaTUz9FabPZzvoM6Q~~/AARclAA~-vZd9JSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Friend – we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the month to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.")_**

If there was ever a moment to pitch in a few bucks, that moment is right now. Our Conservative House Majority - and the fate of President Trump's legislative agenda - hangs in the balance.
_***** CALLING ALL CONSERVATIVES *** **_
**THREE SPECIAL ELECTIONS**

_This deadline was important before but now that our House Majority may depend on winning three Special Elections ..._

**THIS IS THE MOST IMPORTANT DEADLINE YET! **

Majority Leader Steve Scalise agreed that 20,000 more contributions is the bare minimum we need to help jumpstart our efforts to hold FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21.

Every contribution helps us refuel our voter contact budgets, recruit volunteers, and get our positive message out to voters - that's how we win key races like these.

Please don't underestimate the seriousness of the situation.

_**[Our deadline is closing in! We're PLEADING for your help right here and right now.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/G-eahaaTUz9FabPZzvoM6Q~~/AARclAA~-vZd9JSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Our deadline is closing in! We’re PLEADING for your help right here and right now.")**_

body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=114699bf76f6492d87310d17c44ac3e9&_e=0mf1SLOfKjzHIMrUu9Qdkfb4HgHHw9ViIByTcbkRhUwQbL5uJY6d9AiNEl_IuNIXb7p_PWAnwmVF034DRWfruqytvtNBbYy6tRRWVbHjePl5GGE9Doce-qkdt7vAP3NUDH33emwNK_2cFHTyUIlAsej_9hWHjGJZGXZHu-foe7UXwyzIzJSfboYkya7pXR1i2QwDQ8wRbf_1XzegQ4ct2_Kr06SN2zSzmsiTKGgSmyxAyD5HyaHerFOB4vdM1d60cW-jmrKWOVuVMCogAPBoaPzsDdZKJKsfOC5jeg2yAn2mI4Llq6aGBr-j3Yb01mwGgWiS4BNgKIvvkxVyBNgCmPFW3oj7o5yu1vLG1wsAWZF6y7u-ABSE82Bji8Cz3OnH3SsPDqGPItSbC0fPG-drxY-cB3zZESLin5iagfwoLF5sYqVaaj6sf_qQowMIVaoEFo0-nQwIecZvropPcvepfuaKD_O5OIlOC2ySPO98hoI%3D)

[ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=114699bf76f6492d87310d17c44ac3e9&_e=0mf1SLOfKjzHIMrUu9Qdkfb4HgHHw9ViIByTcbkRhUwQbL5uJY6d9AiNEl_IuNIXb7p_PWAnwmVF034DRWfruqytvtNBbYy6tRRWVbHjePl5GGE9Doce-qkdt7vAP3NUDH33emwNK_2cFHTyUIlAsej_9hWHjGJZGXZHu-foe7UXwyzIzJSfboYkya7pXR1i2QwDQ8wRbf_1XzegQ4ct2_Kr06SN2zSzmsiTKGgSmyxAyD5HyaHerFOB4vdM1d60cW-jmrKWOVuVMCogAPBoaPzsDdZKJKsfOC5jeg2yAn2mI4Llq6aGBr-j3Yb01mwGgWiS4BNgKIvvkxVyBNgCmPPt0-Gst_wLpvCzPES2tV-ipfDpNWUfYQ3GJcXbSD6UEjI-GOhmOxuXchlGuBaCEmvUyy3hUCzX3FmrOnD1EkY7txCWSGiQ30nyAwIcw7MomJi7CLk_a0tyuqYzIsiGo1QHE5TQo3ciwpKZ2f6-5Zo%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=114699bf76f6492d87310d17c44ac3e9&_e=0mf1SLOfKjzHIMrUu9Qdkfb4HgHHw9ViIByTcbkRhUwQbL5uJY6d9AiNEl_IuNIXb7p_PWAnwmVF034DRWfruqytvtNBbYy6tRRWVbHjePl5GGE9Doce-qkdt7vAP3NUDH33emwNK_2cFHTyUIlAsej_9hWHjGJZGXZHu-foe7UXwyzIzJSfboYkya7pXR1i2QwDQ8wRbf_1XzegQ4ct2_Kr06SN2zSzmsiTKGgSmyxAyD5HyaHerFOB4vdM1d60cW-jmrKWOVuVMCogAPBoaPzsDdZKJKsfOC5jeg2yAn2mI4Llq6aGBr-j3Yb01mwGgWiS4BNgKIvvkxVyBNgCmB4Z4ljRqk0bBEmJCGjKOPNOKoccHDDQqoYP3vxvWWqN8HPUY-CIwUuU2XUSjs36R7-uIpJfse8UKBCR91Y_UqJY8Wy5IsrKOAGRKKoVbkhLZj86A6kQadMrLC0Ay5HT1V8npxAVsXo2zEgToyzo1Pk%3D) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=114699bf76f6492d87310d17c44ac3e9&_e=0mf1SLOfKjzHIMrUu9Qdkfb4HgHHw9ViIByTcbkRhUwQbL5uJY6d9AiNEl_IuNIXb7p_PWAnwmVF034DRWfruqytvtNBbYy6tRRWVbHjePl5GGE9Doce-qkdt7vAP3NUDH33emwNK_2cFHTyUIlAsej_9hWHjGJZGXZHu-foe7UXwyzIzJSfboYkya7pXR1i2QwDQ8wRbf_1XzegQ4ct2_Kr06SN2zSzmsiTKGgSmyxAyD5HyaHerFOB4vdM1d60cW-jmrKWOVuVMCogAPBoaPzsDdZKJKsfOC5jeg2yAn2mI4Llq6aGBr-j3Yb01mwGgWiS4BNgKIvvkxVyBNgCmGrE4-VruBEG52Nk-DiL2PgFbARcp5PV-ulecn-QxxcdNmq-e3HE76I4CETqs5FKk3f-PuoCNtvdUYOe970TRZ5hTGuWXAqcv_vZc5PZEhE6do7AqAAztGHhbWuo4wH3i2fI8udqqNUC5Cqgi4UREww%3D) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=114699bf76f6492d87310d17c44ac3e9&_e=0mf1SLOfKjzHIMrUu9Qdkfb4HgHHw9ViIByTcbkRhUwQbL5uJY6d9AiNEl_IuNIXb7p_PWAnwmVF034DRWfruqytvtNBbYy6tRRWVbHjePl5GGE9Doce-qkdt7vAP3NUDH33emwNK_2cFHTyUIlAsej_9hWHjGJZGXZHu-foe7UXwyzIzJSfboYkya7pXR1i2QwDQ8wRbf_1XzegQ4ct2_Kr06SN2zSzmsiTKGgSmyxAyD5HyaHerFOB4vdM1d60cW-jmrKWOVuVMCogAPBoaPzsDdZKJKsfOC5jeg2yAn2mI4Llq6aGBr-j3Yb01mwGgWiS4BNgKIvvkxVyBNgCmGt_rcE279hrcqgmzemx6DDizxQ8akoVFrun-GeSyyXFyxz0YKpFtR1FJyidc6xo5Aqb7J5EcvOY-vGTdRt5I_SNMqGsDIQZN_BdaVHBusKVGu7yUWaCz5cgKzPJDUr64r3YieWCyafhnwGJaN8AJXg%3D)
[ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=114699bf76f6492d87310d17c44ac3e9&_e=0mf1SLOfKjzHIMrUu9Qdkfb4HgHHw9ViIByTcbkRhUwQbL5uJY6d9AiNEl_IuNIXb7p_PWAnwmVF034DRWfruqytvtNBbYy6tRRWVbHjePl5GGE9Doce-qkdt7vAP3NUDH33emwNK_2cFHTyUIlAsej_9hWHjGJZGXZHu-foe7UXwyzIzJSfboYkya7pXR1i2QwDQ8wRbf_1XzegQ4ct2_Kr06SN2zSzmsiTKGgSmyxAyD5HyaHerFOB4vdM1d60cW-jmrKWOVuVMCogAPBoaPzsDdZKJKsfOC5jeg2yAn2mI4Llq6aGBr-j3Yb01mwGgWiS4BNgKIvvkxVyBNgCmKnIiWIs_4254QMxc74ytHiT3m4gkbMLyg_2fkTKIwQRWxtrqfOx75rlWhncbAxjf_tnZqvO14o1497F2hdpIPWl-Uik5GvXyXJp8vrNkQq_3kRqv0CEVHRg2J60fR1LKyaMkjVFBaUAGjZZWTQWvQ8%3D)
What makes [hear.com's](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=114699bf76f6492d87310d17c44ac3e9&_e=0mf1SLOfKjzHIMrUu9Qdkfb4HgHHw9ViIByTcbkRhUwQbL5uJY6d9AiNEl_IuNIXb7p_PWAnwmVF034DRWfruqytvtNBbYy6tRRWVbHjePl5GGE9Doce-qkdt7vAP3NUDH33emwNK_2cFHTyUIlAsej_9hWHjGJZGXZHu-foe7UXwyzIzJSfboYkya7pXR1i2QwDQ8wRbf_1XzegQ4ct2_Kr06SN2zSzmsiTKGgSmyxAyD5HyaHerFOB4vdM1d60cW-jmrKWOVuVMCogAPBoaPzsDdZKJKsfOC5jeg2yAn2mI4Llq6aGBr-j3Yb01mwGgWiS4BNgKIvvkxVyBNgCmFw4usWil53NsBTQmJHWPjLYQaEU6cUAcsO34WpMcI2uDUNEmK_OFyKuFZRrNW9LGgWkSQ-CxauBZN75nUj2aJBDy0MzNRTgg8ny1amjPfD-jlU40w7wF7uuh10juq_2_8A3DD9dwnhW9FYM72oOFCw%3D) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=114699bf76f6492d87310d17c44ac3e9&_e=0mf1SLOfKjzHIMrUu9Qdkfb4HgHHw9ViIByTcbkRhUwQbL5uJY6d9AiNEl_IuNIXb7p_PWAnwmVF034DRWfruqytvtNBbYy6tRRWVbHjePl5GGE9Doce-qkdt7vAP3NUDH33emwNK_2cFHTyUIlAsej_9hWHjGJZGXZHu-foe7UXwyzIzJSfboYkya7pXR1i2QwDQ8wRbf_1XzegQ4ct2_Kr06SN2zSzmsiTKGgSmyxAyD5HyaHerFOB4vdM1d60cW-jmrKWOVuVMCogAPBoaPzsDdZKJKsfOC5jeg2yAn2mI4Llq6aGBr-j3Yb01mwGgWiS4BNgKIvvkxVyBNgCmBJ65qgTr5zC7EnlK8oIxKrGz_tXyBmVRg0AwpqLl0O2kFAL1Ivp8VOWlzvSFVPQ34LTKU8wvuGTXlN4wG01Nw-51QSULGg_9wLjiam4EqfbyMl-cc8c71jiG96BtuG0IfekVNRQ0jdqORSNpmYxcYI%3D) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=114699bf76f6492d87310d17c44ac3e9&_e=0mf1SLOfKjzHIMrUu9Qdkfb4HgHHw9ViIByTcbkRhUwQbL5uJY6d9AiNEl_IuNIXb7p_PWAnwmVF034DRWfruqytvtNBbYy6tRRWVbHjePl5GGE9Doce-qkdt7vAP3NUDH33emwNK_2cFHTyUIlAsej_9hWHjGJZGXZHu-foe7UXwyzIzJSfboYkya7pXR1i2QwDQ8wRbf_1XzegQ4ct2_Kr06SN2zSzmsiTKGgSmyxAyD5HyaHerFOB4vdM1d60cW-jmrKWOVuVMCogAPBoaPzsDdZKJKsfOC5jeg2yAn2mI4Llq6aGBr-j3Yb01mwGgWiS4BNgKIvvkxVyBNgCmEYGByA-OwaKgaBEsXj8XgvjlLapA5JzSrOYn0BPsb6O1T9lVUagh2alfltwCEmuMXEzoEFq5DFiYe9u1BPKwae3mE8YAyGinDt665v85SktiSldMu8BI0fu2xF-8W-N54Mv7hkBuuN1nOQ8d2xSmTg%3D) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=114699bf76f6492d87310d17c44ac3e9&_e=0mf1SLOfKjzHIMrUu9Qdkfb4HgHHw9ViIByTcbkRhUwQbL5uJY6d9AiNEl_IuNIXb7p_PWAnwmVF034DRWfruqytvtNBbYy6tRRWVbHjePl5GGE9Doce-qkdt7vAP3NUDH33emwNK_2cFHTyUIlAsej_9hWHjGJZGXZHu-foe7UXwyzIzJSfboYkya7pXR1i2QwDQ8wRbf_1XzegQ4ct2_Kr06SN2zSzmsiTKGgSmyxAyD5HyaHerFOB4vdM1d60cW-jmrKWOVuVMCogAPBoaPzsDdZKJKsfOC5jeg2yAn2mI4Llq6aGBr-j3Yb01mwGgWiS4BNgKIvvkxVyBNgCmPnezBESQ7XlhJ4n-3RrOTnZADa18dP3fuJIfZoH8aoop02OpWGS9ZxO2vyP_jWsRl20OkhyanUg6xubZ464c0ABhyKxXYtSCwZC9zT5hmAayxO3OqKk79UNtUtODuR4Nc3ngwZIH1dujJToOoAGRNo%3D)

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Mass Immigration and the Border Crisis
body:
The American immigration system is broken.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c13e91f53c1b43ee9ad512dee2c93760&_e=X9phOfk2gFtscAQk0nz7k3wte7gtfl8PlK6XCA8ejrbCC3Wb3XS6OtAAsiV7I8FarohWDtjgiQZHg_h8yuErN4xwAKAjA-Y724CcB06xVrI-4pOBNaL2E567JhwOI_Wma_KmvJOqa78CH4BBj_yfRCjk6HnDSRapTCkVFLMgQbB4rKU2bGLPG1dJCHNJ7LwUkTISNOY2X2adAcfSQpUDiV4Om1FduGkMGlCLYlamfmlZE3vNrJZB79Q0lm_Dvb9ao51b4JRsiLMXSp3hBEM9_JioKYtpnF5catO4lpjJdteImI9ZadEQ5SFQbT49wMkXRxl8EAYMrGOJop9d8wdALdhrYB-dUhrguk5gmAntrxmuWzKrq6jON837Tlmf_9vEE-ygqSoF9pjTHp4SMyzbMA%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

The American immigration system is broken.

**Our border?**

It is wide open with millions of migrants pouring in each year.

**Our cities and towns?**

They are flooded with fentanyl and overwhelmed by crime.

**Our jobs?**

They are being taken by cheap foreign labor.

And yet almost nobody in Washington, D.C. seems to care. The permanent ruling class remains silent while millions of illegal immigrants come into our country.

**But Americans like you care a great deal about what is happening to our country. **

In fact, you're the one who is harmed by the ongoing mass illegal immigration. Drugs, thefts, and violent crime are no longer contained on our southern border.

**In response, Hillsdale College has created a FREE online learning series, "[Mass Immigration and the Border Crisis](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c13e91f53c1b43ee9ad512dee2c93760&_e=X9phOfk2gFtscAQk0nz7k3wte7gtfl8PlK6XCA8ejrbCC3Wb3XS6OtAAsiV7I8FarohWDtjgiQZHg_h8yuErN4xwAKAjA-Y724CcB06xVrI-4pOBNaL2E567JhwOI_Wma_KmvJOqa78CH4BBj_yfRCjk6HnDSRapTCkVFLMgQbB4rKU2bGLPG1dJCHNJ7LwUkTISNOY2X2adAcfSQpUDiV4Om1FduGkMGlCLYlamfmlZE3vNrJZB79Q0lm_Dvb9afv0FNlygtH8gwgP0TN_C83bRTubqPBpdaXtks60SDGvPXNf3yOcrF36v8spzRLe5AGGsrSGiElNOjqURJ8Pjc5F9fS61X7UeoYMDDrQOZXZVV0PEoTy4lBoMRSW3fZu0KS5KW7FrPpwbkfZ7_FKGPg%3D%3D)." **

In this series--which was designed for concerned Americans like you--you will learn the truth about our nation's border crisis and what we can do about it today.

We'll send you an online issue of _Imprimis_ , a podcast episode, and a video from a recent Hillsdale conference--all on the topic of immigration--so that you can start learning today.

Many journalists continue to cover up the failures on the border. They tell Americans that the term border crisis is misleading or even a hoax.

But this FREE online learning series will help you learn the facts about this perilous situation, including...

* What did the American Founders think about immigration?
* What is the effect of millions of illegal immigrants moving into communities across the United States?
* How does illegal immigration threaten the citizenship of Americans and our national sovereignty?

**I invite you to learn more about this critical topic through our free online learning series, "Mass Immigration and the Border Crisis."**

**You can receive instant access to this series right now using this secure link: **

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/immigration-learning-series](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c13e91f53c1b43ee9ad512dee2c93760&_e=X9phOfk2gFtscAQk0nz7k3wte7gtfl8PlK6XCA8ejrbCC3Wb3XS6OtAAsiV7I8FarohWDtjgiQZHg_h8yuErN4xwAKAjA-Y724CcB06xVrI-4pOBNaL2E567JhwOI_Wma_KmvJOqa78CH4BBj_yfRCjk6HnDSRapTCkVFLMgQbB4rKU2bGLPG1dJCHNJ7LwUkTISNOY2X2adAcfSQpUDiV4Om1FduGkMGlCLYlamfmlZE3vNrJZB79Q0lm_Dvb9akiPT-zfxdSoQc1WtNhmekSHG_FTPQRvQUjxiCiGm0M4UzeJbLRe1pvuhmZP11CKdI8hjCwHywWamsbYWpQJUlI_4jRg9s5Zw_aVrt96Cg6UxAsbkRq3s9JIibOn6mj-1WgLDEr6XJG9diyUQIZGF8g%3D%3D)

The illegal immigration crisis is a stark example of the failure of the administrative state to protect the citizens of our nation. To save America, we must educate ourselves about this crisis before it's too late.

That's why it's so important that you learn the truth. I urge you to sign up for your free online learning series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Americans like you have everything to lose from the mass invasion of our country.

clean_body: The American immigration system is broken. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend of Liberty, The American immigration system is broken. Our border? It is wide open with millions of migrants pouring in each year. Our cities and towns? They are flooded with fentanyl and overwhelmed by crime. Our jobs? They are being taken by cheap foreign labor. And yet almost nobody in Washington, D.C. seems to care. The permanent ruling class remains silent while millions of illegal immigrants come into our country. But Americans like you care a great deal about what is happening to our country. In fact, you're the one who is harmed by the ongoing mass illegal immigration. Drugs, thefts, and violent crime are no longer contained on our southern border. In response, Hillsdale College has created a FREE online learning series, "." In this series--which was designed for concerned Americans like you--you will learn the truth about our nation's border crisis and what we can do about it today. We'll send you an online issue of Imprimis , a podcast episode, and a video from a recent Hillsdale conference--all on the topic of immigration--so that you can start learning today. Many journalists continue to cover up the failures on the border. They tell Americans that the term border crisis is misleading or even a hoax. But this FREE online learning series will help you learn the facts about this perilous situation, including... What did the American Founders think about immigration? What is the effect of millions of illegal immigrants moving into communities across the United States? How does illegal immigration threaten the citizenship of Americans and our national sovereignty? I invite you to learn more about this critical topic through our free online learning series, "Mass Immigration and the Border Crisis." You can receive instant access to this series right now using this secure link: The illegal immigration crisis is a stark example of the failure of the administrative state to protect the citizens of our nation. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: What’s Cooking at the Capitol?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/whatscookin?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, **Wow! What a start! Donald Trump began his Presidency with a blizzard of Executive Orders. **He’s not holding back on advancing a conservative agenda.

An emergency has been declared to secure the southern border. DEI hires in the federal government are being fired. The renewable energy boondoggle is over. Mass deportations have begun.

**What about Mississippi? Have our lawmakers been using their time in office to deliver the change we need?**

The good news is that two weeks into the 2025 legislative session there are some significant conservative bills at the Capitol under consideration.
**SCHOOL CHOICE**
**HB1435 (Jansen Owen) offers public to public school choice. It would give every Mississippi family the choice options that last year the legislature extended to military families.** HB1433 (Rob Roberson) would allow a limited form of public to private school choice in D and F rated districts. **Shout out to Rep Owen and Rep Roberson! **

Both bills are vitally important, and we strongly support them. Also worth watching are bills to increase the number of Charter Schools and overhaul our phony district grading system.
**INCOME TAX ABOLITION**
**The House has already passed HB1 (Rep Lamar, Speaker Jason White), which offers to eliminate the state income tax over the next decade.** It would be truly awesome if this were to pass.

There is an issue with the fact that the bill frontloads some tax rises early on, but I am confident that good conservatives can make this work. **Kudos to Rep Lamar and Speaker White....**
**ANTI DIVERSITY, EQUITY & INCLUSION**
**SB2223 (Sen Hill), HB1179 (Rep Currie) and HB1416 (Rep Currie) offer comprehensive legislative action to address DEI.** This is timely given that President Trump has just repealed Lyndon Johnson’s Executive Order mandating reverse discrimination.

**Also important is Sen England’s SB2182 bill, which would let sunlight in as an anti DEI disinfectant.** Families would have a right to see what their kids are being taught in the classroom. **Three cheers for Sen Hill, Rep Currie and Sen England!**
**BALLOT INNITIATIVE**
**There is also a bill in the Senate, SB2572, sponsored by Sen Boyd, to restore the ballot initiative. Well done, Sen Boyd. **If you can make this happen, you will be a hero to many.

Given that the Senate has been the place that efforts to restore the ballot initiative have usually gone to die, the fact that this has the sanction of some in the Senate might be significant.

There is also a superb bill to reform Certificate of Need laws (HB922) by Rep Zuber and Rep Creekmore. A thousand cheers to both of them!

There are also some excellent proposals to allow Mississippians to buy wine online. It’s ridiculous we can’t already ...
**WILL ANY OF THIS HAPPEN?**
These are all excellent conservative proposals, but we’ve been here before. Will our lawmakers make any of this happen? **What has already happened to some of the anti DEI bills is instructive. **

**Mississippi Lieutenant Governor, Delbert Hosemann, moved to kill Sen Hill’s anti DEI bill through a procedural sleight of hand.** He did so by double referring the Hill bill, meaning that the chances of it progressing further are tiny.

**_Mr. Hosemann maneuvered to kill the anti DEI bill in Jackson the very week that President Trump issued Executive Orders to combat DEI in Washington. _**

**Fortunately, lurking on the list of bills is a Senate bill (SB2515) called the REFOCUS bill (Sen Boyd).** It proposes a long overdue review of our public universities, and it seems to include a section about tackling DEI. Or at least prevent public universities from maintaining a Diversity, Equity & Inclusion office.

We know that Ole Miss and others have already rebranded their Diversity departments, so the bill could just be symbolic. It might do nothing to counter leftist faculty, while allowing politicians to play word salad on SuperTalk.

**But depending on the language that Sen Boyd uses, her bill might actually be meaningful. This could be the kind of anti DEI bill we need.**

Here at the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, we have built up a large audience across the state. Our weekly email goes out to over 80,000 people In Mississippi. Over the past week, more than ten million viewers across America and beyond saw our digital output.

**As the House and Senate consider these conservative proposals in the weeks ahead, we will let you know who, like President Trump, has been actively on your side, and who continues to frustrate conservative reform. **

Have an awesome weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9e834897bb&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

name: STEVE SCALISE
subject: Before it’s too late…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If you want to help save our House Majority before it is too late, I’m pleading with you to read this memo from start to finish.

| |
---
| | | TO: Concerned American Patriots
FROM: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
RE: The State of Our Pro-Trump Majority
* * *

If you want to help save our House Majority before it is too late, I'm pleading with you to read this memo from start to finish.

_Our House Majority is on the brink of collapse._ The margins are closer than ever, three must-win Special Elections are closing in, and the Democrats are spending MILLIONS to overtake us.

**> >>> Where we stand:**

- President Trump was JUST sworn in as Commander-in-Chief and our Republican Trifecta is in full swing

- Mike Waltz JUST resigned from Congress to serve in the Trump Administration. As of right now, the size and strength of our House Majority FULLY DEPEND on Special Elections FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21

- House Democrats JUST launched a 10 million dollar smear campaign to undercut our House Majority and kneecap Trump's legislative agenda

**> >>> What's at stake:**

Our House Majority is one of the closest margins in 100 years. Don't forget - it's also the last line of defense standing between us ushering in the Great American Comeback and House Democrats completely dismantling EVERYTHING we just fought to win.

**> >>> Our plan of action:**

_The FIRST monthly deadline since President Trump took control is just days away and we 're dangerously behind our goal._

body:
The Trump agenda is going to turn our country around – it’s go time now!

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.-mFfVkuMX5dobUCQ)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, The last few days have been incredible to watch. This is a historic moment.

President Trump has been firing on all cylinders, wasting no time in getting to work to mitigate the immense damage done by the corrupt radical-left Biden-Harris administration _and setting the table to ensure our great nation 's **BEST DAYS** are ahead of us_!

As President Trump said in his second inaugural address on Monday, "the golden age of America begins right now."

**We 're ALL IN here at Team Cruz, charging forward to fully seize this moment.** **[RUSH CRITICAL SUPPORT TO FUEL OUR FIGHT>>>](http://trk.tedcruz.)**
---
[ **DONATE NOW**](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
As I said on NewsNation's _The Hill Sunday_ , President Trump is better positioned now than he was eight years ago. He's coming in having been the #1 target of the Deep State - he's ready to BLOW IT TO PIECES - and he fully understands the dysfunction of our federal bureaucracies and is prepared to level their resistance to fundamental reform.

He has an amazing team of the right people in the right positions...

**And he 's going to be _RELENTLESS_ and _UNWAVERING_ in his resolve to _SAVE AMERICA_!**

**[THANK YOU for any sustaining support you can send at this critical moment>>>](http://trk.tedcruz.)**

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

name: Hillsdale College via Old Glory Today
subject: Some social media companies won’t let us tell you this
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Old Glory Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pR37UxoQwy_nQ3TV88GtrQ~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pR37UxoQwy_nQ3TV88GtrQ~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pR37UxoQwy_nQ3TV88GtrQ~~/AARclAA~~~)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Jeff Younger
subject: Help Me Save My Son
body:
| | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now.
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
| | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=009f9cbcbca74340b1bd60b52b972ff2&_e=J2L4xTa2-iADFy_30uGoq9neXsNeFL_u2x-YJnOIaBLrJctbTJN01ahdWN4eQ7YhddNaSMlsXdpL6Q2NKvhJrBDAvhlKEMTbts9j6Um3dAXrNI944wsKbpF7u0yl4Q0M-oxHiOopIVPM93sqn4XWntbrAeJP4c9bjlIkgdvhscqhbrkKnzdfiAoOS6VhWMbFI4otQKYwLFkbpwNuXuku1nzjiOyMj9vsxgJFPuTbhEhoV4hRkAtWpEW8Nn53KVOG2P2IPpiOM8-YT0O4GJIMs1GVN8XycuDeCyMdiUBnoQY9DAiFp81GkOTuNN1Wcx3WySWkhTq0GR_xl2LAkj-YFpLEqIZKu79cXWX04vscWhP0XNAbE2DapKDQTrRVBpvW)
---
My Dear Friend, My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason.You may have heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or on Fox News.I am James’s father, but because I refused to accept that my 5 YEAR OLD boy should be surgically and chemically castrated......I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James. That’s why I’m writing to you today. **[I need your help.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=009f9cbcbca74340b1bd60b52b972ff2&_e=J2L4xTa2-iADFy_30uGoq9neXsNeFL_u2x-YJnOIaBLrJctbTJN01ahdWN4eQ7YhddNaSMlsXdpL6Q2NKvhJrBDAvhlKEMTbts9j6Um3dAXrNI944wsKbpF7u0yl4Q0M-oxHiOopIVPM93sqn4XWntbrAeJP4c9bjlIkgdvhscqhbrkKnzdfiAoOS6VhWMbFI4otQKYwLFkbpwNuXuku1nzjiOyMj9vsxgJFPuTbhEg8S2Bo4BMOml3QfNhnimlewIBUkLn6EhM3S7qWI2XDNgmfBAQg4jcGZywvCm0DrcGCB5-Uuvmnpr-LmofRN5aa_ac9oOI2l4NHm6CgVDvo_E4Qln67eV-CSuwAYiMPP3fwkdRKsJT3MjiwbSGPUsup)** I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... I want to keep fighting, but I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me in the fight to **Save James** , **[would you consider making a generous $25 contribution to my Legal Defense Fund today?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=009f9cbcbca74340b1bd60b52b972ff2&_e=J2L4xTa2-iADFy_30uGoq9neXsNeFL_u2x-YJnOIaBLrJctbTJN01ahdWN4eQ7YhddNaSMlsXdpL6Q2NKvhJrBDAvhlKEMTbts9j6Um3dAXrNI944wsKbpF7u0yl4Q0M-oxHiOopIVPM93sqn4XWntbrAeJP4c9bjlIkgdvhscqhbrkKnzdfiAoOS6VhWMbFI4otQKYwLFkbpwNuXuku1nzjiOyMj9vsxgJFPuTbhEjoYse7SaPYIYEc6nwp1jBsI9nOs8OWtzCadfaeIPR__taHwANn30YSc6ZDKxjmIXprarX5YheRcESXqkaCSwzAvlLtEXUTyMHKim_V3dxS-Q8o8Uz-z9KZ4jbXqF_JhJNVM5f74IlGu9GH7Vg9cWyS)** But I’m getting ahead of myself...Let me start at the beginning. When James was just two years old, my ex-wife began saying our boy James was actually a girl.I told her she was wrong, and I kept dropping my son off at school in boy’s clothes because **he is a boy**. (I can’t believe I have to say that.) I later found out that the school counselors were changing him into girl’s clothes once he got to school WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE to inflame this delusion.Then during the custody battle, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.The court-mandated supervisor would ONLY let me see James if I put him in girl’s clothes. I have never affirmed the lie that my son is a girl, nor will I ever affirm it.So I was forced to stop visiting him.It broke my heart.**Do you see what we’re up against?** I can confirm that these trans-activist judges are presiding over kangaroo courts where common sense goes right out the window.They need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And **James** needs to be **saved** from their butchery.**[THAT’S why I need your help.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=009f9cbcbca74340b1bd60b52b972ff2&_e=J2L4xTa2-iADFy_30uGoq9neXsNeFL_u2x-YJnOIaBLrJctbTJN01ahdWN4eQ7YhddNaSMlsXdpL6Q2NKvhJrBDAvhlKEMTbts9j6Um3dAXrNI944wsKbpF7u0yl4Q0M-oxHiOopIVPM93sqn4XWntbrAeJP4c9bjlIkgdvhscqhbrkKnzdfiAoOS6VhWMbFI4otQKYwLFkbpwNuXuku1nzjiOyMj9vsxgJFPuTbhEh5hvnkyhbhPsOTonqxDR2XyBtcHyAQiPwQlGyi5A3MbXpyQCvX_mDcotf3WIDLK4N6gb5_x4ab9r7geVZyCU6HQ65l1-LcbMX9dNZn6wcn1hROVjNnppXaFA9yayqnNT7L3s5KGAut-bkNIERJCsU0)** I am under a gag order currently to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Obviously, I’m not abiding by that order because it’s blatantly unconstitutional.But that’s not even the point.If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time. But I’m not just some activist.I’m a Dad.I’m fighting to save my son.And I will never give up on **James**.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I authored the bill in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee that outlawed sex change surgeries for minors.I then spent every dollar I had to make sure cowardly politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, but then my ex-wife just took James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state.And there was nothing I could do to stop it.And that’s the scary part:**If this can happen in Texas, it can happen anywhere.** Then in California, the radical judge railroaded me and gave my ex-wife free reign to proceed with the castration.I can’t even appeal the case because he sealed all the court records...I’ll have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process...On top of that, the other side is trying to make ME pay THEIR legal fees...**Do you see what we’re up against?** But if Conservatives won’t put up a fight, how will we ever win? That’s where Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) comes in. They heard about my case and immediately offered to stand by my side. **[Will you stand with us?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=009f9cbcbca74340b1bd60b52b972ff2&_e=J2L4xTa2-iADFy_30uGoq9neXsNeFL_u2x-YJnOIaBLrJctbTJN01ahdWN4eQ7YhddNaSMlsXdpL6Q2NKvhJrBDAvhlKEMTbts9j6Um3dAXrNI944wsKbpF7u0yl4Q0M-oxHiOopIVPM93sqn4XWntbrAeJP4c9bjlIkgdvhscqhbrkKnzdfiAoOS6VhWMbFI4otQKYwLFkbpwNuXuku1nzjiOyMj9vsxgJFPuTbhEgQfJV-Nd4lbiJDqqixgJC_312gtJdaa2WSEHxRowNqZ49aT01h8XtvbjhVUrOdlQpy_EwsNZGxMg8T7aXFLCVfnfV3MqENy-izZHLMiZ_5epAT56LJ-NVBodrfnQzaZX268vmTFpvDn-6ARiWWs5Yb)**
---

clean_body: | | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now. | | | | | | My Dear Friend, My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason.You may have heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or on Fox News.I am James’s father, but because I refused to accept that my 5 YEAR OLD boy should be surgically and chemically castrated......I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James. That’s why I’m writing to you today. I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... I want to keep fighting, but I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me in the fight to Save James , But I’m getting ahead of myself...Let me start at the beginning. When James was just two years old, my ex-wife began saying our boy James was actually a girl.I told her she was wrong, and I kept dropping my son off at school in boy’s clothes because he is a boy. (I can’t believe I have to say that.) I later found out that the school counselors were changing him into girl’s clothes once he got to school WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE to inflame this delusion.Then during the custody battle, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.The court-mandated supervisor would ONLY let me see James if I put him in girl’s clothes. I have never affirmed the lie that my son is a girl, nor will I ever affirm it.So I was forced to stop visiting him.It broke my heart.Do you see what we’re up against? I can confirm that these trans-activist judges are presiding over kangaroo courts where common sense goes right out the window.They need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And James needs to be saved from their butchery. I am under a gag order currently to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Obviously, I’m not abiding by that order because it’s blatantly unconstitutional.But that’s not even the point.If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time. But I’m not just some activist.I’m a Dad.I’m fighting to save my son.And I will never give up on James.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I authored the bill in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee that outlawed sex change surgeries for minors.I then spent every dollar I had to make sure cowardly politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, but then my ex-wife just took James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state.And there was nothing I could do to stop it.And that’s the scary part:If this can happen in Texas, it can happen anywhere. Then in California, the radical judge railroaded me and gave my ex-wife free reign to proceed with the castration.I can’t even appeal the case because he sealed all the court records...I’ll have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process...On top of that, the other side is trying to make ME pay THEIR legal fees...Do you see what we’re up against? But if Conservatives won’t put up a fight, how will we ever win? That’s where Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) comes in. They heard about my case and immediately offered to stand by my side. | | | | | | | The fact is, if you care about keeping your children or grandchildren safe...If you want to save my son James from castration and make sure this will NEVER happen to ANY child ever again...And if you want to send a message to these radical judges that their day of reckoning has come...Then you’ll need someone who knows how these kangaroo courts ACTUALLY operate, and someone who’s willing to do WHATEVER it takes to save his son and every other kid like him.I humbly submit to you that I am that man. Your Warrior on the Frontlines,Jeff Younger P.S. I need your help to save my son. I have fought for a decade to keep radical activists and judges from transitioning my son against my will and against all reason. I have lobbied politicians, wiped out my life’s savings, and spent thousands of hours in court trying to save my son. Would you please rush me your I need your help, and I need to know that I’m not alone in this fight. Patriot's Legal Defense Fund601 Baffie Avenue Winter Park, Florida 32789

Peter, I set an ambitious goal for our January end-of-month deadline. It’s my first end-of-month deadline as a Congressman, and I want to start on a high note.

Unfortunately, we’re pacing to finish thousands short of this crucial goal. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. I know I can count on a supporter like you to chip in and help us dig out of this hole. **[**Will you chip in now to help me crush the first major goal of 2025?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**

If we can reach this goal, we will send a message to the Washington Establishment that we are ready for change.

Thank you,

Congressman Troy Downing

name: Sign to Save Social Security! (VPP)
subject: Jamie Raskin is SO right >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Keep Trump’s hands off Social Security!
| **_Rep. Jamie Raskin is SO right:_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social_security/?source=VPP_20250125_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=6&akid=18674%2E878179%2EGANp-6) But Elon Musk and Donald Trump want to DESTROY our hard-earned Social Security benefits!

[**So we need to take IMMEDIATE action to fight back: Sign our petition by MIDNIGHT to DEMAND Congress protect Social Security »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social_security/?source=VPP_20250125_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=7&akid=18674%2E878179%2EGANp-6) | [**10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: DEMAND CONGRESS PROTECT SOCIAL SECURITY »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social_security/?source=VPP_20250125_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=8&akid=18674%2E878179%2EGANp-6)
---
**Here’s the AMAZING news:** President Biden just signed the Social Security Fairness Act to expand benefits before leaving office!

**But here’s the TERRIFYING news:** Republicans have already said _“cuts are on the table”_ now that Trump and Musk have seized power.

[**WE WON’T LET THEM: Join 9,999 top Democrats in signing our petition DEMANDING Congress protect our Social Security! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social_security/?source=VPP_20250125_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=9&akid=18674%2E878179%2EGANp-6)
[**TIME RUNNING OUT TO SIGN: DEMAND CONGRESS PROTECT SOCIAL SECURITY »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social_security/?source=VPP_20250125_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=10&akid=18674%2E878179%2EGANp-6)
---
In this together,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18674%2E878179%2EGANp-6). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18674%2E878179%2EGANp-6).**

name: =?utf-8?b?c2hl4oCZcyBiYWNrISEhIFtGRlJd?=
subject: Rachel Maddow is returning to prime time!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
With declining viewership and a potential sale, getting Rachel Maddow to host more frequently could boost ratings for MSNBC!
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22803%2E4449941%2Eq4AwJC)
---
[ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership25?source=FFR_20250125_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=7&akid=22803%2E4449941%2Eq4AwJC) With declining viewership and a potential sale, getting Rachel Maddow to host more frequently could boost ratings for _MSNBC_!

We’re **stunned** to see that MSNBC is struggling after years of being one of the top options for progressive news.

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Right now:
body:
---
Derek, Hours after being sworn in, Donald Trump began signing disastrous executive order after disastrous executive order. Here are just a few of the actions he’s taken so far:
* Attempted to end birthright citizenship, which is in the Constitution.
* Pardoned nearly all of the rioters charged with storming the Capitol on January 6 — including those who committed acts of violence.
* Rescinded President Biden’s executive order to lower prescription drug costs for Americans on Medicare and Medicaid.
* Withdrawn the U.S. from the Paris Climate Agreement, a deal instrumental to combating climate change.

But we won’t give up. Right now, it’s critical that we build the long-term infrastructure to elect Democrats at every level of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. [**To do that, we’ll need your help. So we’re asking: Can you pitch in $3 to the DNC’s new 100-Day Fight Fund? We’ll put your contribution to work right away.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025-100dayfightfund?amount=3&refcode=em_20250125_2642_fr&refcode2=2642_22930333_D5rsfA&akid=2642%2E22930333%2ED5rsfA) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025-100dayfightfund?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250125_2642_fr&refcode2=2642_22930333_D5rsfA&akid=2642%2E22930333%2ED5rsfA)**

name: Gay Valimont
subject: (WHO) is he Kidding?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress
body:
| | |
---
**Trump’s recent executive actions to pull the U.S. from the World Health Organization have left our nation’s health security vulnerable and our global standing in jeopardy. ** Greetings from Gay Valimont, candidate for Florida’s 1st District, reminding Americans that a committed, pro-America candidate exists. We can remain a leader in the fight against pandemics and health crises worldwide, but ignoring our international allies is not the way. **With your support, before April 1st elections are upon us, we can effectively check this man’s unethical behavior.**
---
---
Under the current leadership, we’ve seen a retreat from collaboration with global health organizations, which not only weakens our ability to respond to future crises but also puts our citizens at risk. We cannot afford to continue down this dangerous path. That’s why I’m running—**to restore our leadership, rebuild trust with our allies, and safeguard the health of every American.**
---
**[With your contribution, we can send a strong message that Florida’s 1st District stands for a healthier, more secure future—one where we engage with the world to protect the American people. Pledging $7 can snowball our goals into the Congressional Agenda and ensure safety for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100951084/524464783/181761264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc3NDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmUwYTdkMGItMmRkYi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qM0DfeCKym6ifCwXe9PZa0E_6D5EoS74zHQkZc7EYUk=)**

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a0b8e37018ed49adb9dcf8ff6c554533&_e=8dtUm8MgQhOIHRay2LEVna3Oii_NFWyo7QvM3cBDkVnmISyi7B_6j9n0OxciBzCIdOBBFL5DatCE7f0rNF2P-wAa1APSJG-hYSe-6YLPE1BU4fjFOjUCuIJkkNQzZne-vuGKm5e_woMjVM3B452YEzxneSzZ6EeApXlz6P56faDBHKyu6yDENhsJuGh7tMSmbtB-BdUNxsXySMzwqIwBJmZeKAP3eW7AT05t1bqOWEXmX4V1RDxzzbOtFxrEZYm3vqy5bH5_fK_79B2iLAyRCSmzEu6Nvn1yNRApnaLFU28LTQgcEuSUrwvNIdRnLcxRsHV5CM08nJvmlH684cS8ojPEU7oZzpLph83nhGYmi7jPAcNpFchDQZQhCIxSqAhnJqXPyaN_JdEAt3_hItdIEg%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a0b8e37018ed49adb9dcf8ff6c554533&_e=8dtUm8MgQhOIHRay2LEVna3Oii_NFWyo7QvM3cBDkVnmISyi7B_6j9n0OxciBzCIdOBBFL5DatCE7f0rNF2P-wAa1APSJG-hYSe-6YLPE1BU4fjFOjUCuIJkkNQzZne-vuGKm5e_woMjVM3B452YEzxneSzZ6EeApXlz6P56faDBHKyu6yDENhsJuGh7tMSmbtB-BdUNxsXySMzwqIwBJmZeKAP3eW7AT05t1bqOWEXmX4V1RDxzzbOtFxrEZYm3M107Gk_9xI2Pe68wNvBD0aVwP_BGERmx6Lkw6Ngb64viOnOjv2IRB-XSNF1lHcsHKRFHsYBct0AmrPMKrkhcgJE32phBTnIiXznvxCp1vUR-FEpxC_tbIuIVZLBSt5swq8f1dcVDR5PRu4O7FcVyUg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a0b8e37018ed49adb9dcf8ff6c554533&_e=8dtUm8MgQhOIHRay2LEVna3Oii_NFWyo7QvM3cBDkVnmISyi7B_6j9n0OxciBzCIdOBBFL5DatCE7f0rNF2P-wAa1APSJG-hYSe-6YLPE1BU4fjFOjUCuIJkkNQzZne-vuGKm5e_woMjVM3B452YEzxneSzZ6EeApXlz6P56faDBHKyu6yDENhsJuGh7tMSmbtB-BdUNxsXySMzwqIwBJmZeKAP3eW7AT05t1bqOWEXmX4V1RDxzzbOtFxrEZYm3YP080rYpa-5JZDBhFfFEH0Y6bbesCdQYTQZKykKxy5qFePKpSR-Wc_vEpsY8Cb6x6r_oqhW2CdI0MbCASSdC0z6zhnGVNMBI5uNi_pFlbnkQdFmrvmQW5cHeFzkpU-pO7B_swHTJ-giHdbe3xAlriw%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=a0b8e37018ed49adb9dcf8ff6c554533&_t=MX__roC2kEPOQePWgK2U-tCEFXS5Cm1pJn_5Y5IoguEJ_J0EwXkhH6qyjPo7B2KmJGvHx576nqEBlvovGbPR-ZQrCRRx1FwfrAyRdChdXKppH36CrK7l9iiYy15MJpPs3Z2Lo4tut9fRwsBAooNrPTTLDl_iVRbNlG0Iwcx7iQQ%3D)

name: [New Dems Petition Team:]
subject: Will you sign our "Save Social Security" petition?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
| Hi team,

Now that the Republican trifecta has taken control of Congress and the White House, **they’ve threatened to go after Social Security protections that keep millions of Americans afloat.**

| | When it comes to gear, only the strongest should make the cut.

That's why we're excited to introduce the [**Skull Crusher – the ultimate hand held sword** – the ultimate hand held sword](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20006/6374453/560b43ad65e5b72c66d54348c23ef6c435d5c893/d9bc73ca637d2e2376c78a54f9238594194e20d2) designed for those who demand power, precision, and performance. Crafted for those who understand the value of reliability and strength, the Skull Crusher is more than just a tool – it’s your go-to companion for whatever life throws at you.
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20006/6374453/560b43ad65e5b72c66d54348c23ef6c435d5c893/d9bc73ca637d2e2376c78a54f9238594194e20d2)
---

You don’t settle for mediocrity, and neither should your gear. With the Skull Crusher, you get a tool that’s just as rugged and reliable as you are. **Ready to take your gear to the next level?

[Get the Skull Crusher today and experience the strength and durability that sets it apart.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20006/6374453/560b43ad65e5b72c66d54348c23ef6c435d5c893/d9bc73ca637d2e2376c78a54f9238594194e20d2)**

---
Stay prepared,

~John G. **P.S.** The Skull Crusher is in high demand and won't last long. [**Order now** before it sells out!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20006/6374453/560b43ad65e5b72c66d54348c23ef6c435d5c893/d9bc73ca637d2e2376c78a54f9238594194e20d2)

_**Support Mayor Giuliani with your subscription to PolitiBrawl. We cannot let the left 's bullying tear down a great American leader! **_
* * *
**By Rudy Giuliani**
As I stand here today, with the dust of the political battlefield settling, I can't help but feel a surge of pride and vindication. President Donald Trump, with unwavering courage, has corrected one of the gravest injustices of our time by pardoning nearly 1,500 individuals swept up in the aftermath of January 6, 2021. These are not criminals; these are patriots, and they have been wrongfully labeled as insurrectionists by a system determined to vilify dissent.
From the very beginning, the imprisonment of peaceful participants in the January 6th events was an affront to American justice. This was no insurrection; it was a passionate display of concern for the integrity of our democratic process. These Americans were exercising their First Amendment rights, expressing their grievances against what many believed was a flawed electoral process. Yet, they were met not with understanding but with handcuffs, cages, and years behind bars for what should've been treated as civil disobedience at worst...

We’re livid.

HOURS after being sworn in, Donald Trump signed a slew of HORRIFIC executive orders. So far, he has:

– PARDONED nearly all of the Jan. 6th rioters – even those who committed acts of violence.

– ATTACKED birthright citizenship, a constitutional right.

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: You’re not the only one who is concerned, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
Please, will you share your input by midnight?
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100953225/524469800/1742461687?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5438-su-nd&code=jtk5438-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjQ4OGU2ZS0yZWRiLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gzfPLCjq4dW_i4X2SyVSN6NHSE7DsE7-RAjPTw5Vekk=)

I’ve been hearing from people in Nevada and across the country who are _terrified_ by the news coming out about what Donald Trump is doing during his first days in the White House – and understandably so. From pardoning January 6th insurrectionists to reversing efforts to lower prescription drug prices, Trump’s actions during his first days back in office have been alarming.

But, friend, we can't let fear paralyze us.

Now is the time when we must take action to fight for our freedoms and democracy – and for a future that’s free from the dangerous extremism we’re seeing from this administration. The stakes have never been higher, which means it’s never been more important for everyone to stay engaged.

**That’s why my team has put together a rapid-response focus group for folks like you to help us build a Democratic strategy strong enough to take back the Senate in 2026, and you were** _specifically_**chosen to weigh in, friend. So please, I'm personally asking:**

[**_With the future of our democracy on the line, will you complete our ONE-minute, invite-only focus group now? Your insights are critical to helping Democrats defend Nevada and take back our Senate majority._** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100953226/524469801/422069582?refcode=jtk5438-su-nd&code=jtk5438-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjQ4OGU2ZS0yZWRiLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gzfPLCjq4dW_i4X2SyVSN6NHSE7DsE7-RAjPTw5Vekk=&emci=84744cfd-5dda-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=df488e6e-2edb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=3800590)

body:
You can do your part to help us win in 2025!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100953521/524470386/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODNiYWRkOS0yZWRiLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ylyTzlYYbHnNPZnOPdM4x40wKcmx9A-VorN9iJKbUMM=&emci=58d2fb27-69d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=783badd9-2edb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=15759664)
---
Hey Derek, Virginia’s elections always act as a referendum for the president that was just elected the November prior. This year, it’s more important than ever that we dust ourselves off and get right back to fighting and WINNING elections. We can and will flip VA blue so we can enshrine abortion access across the state and continue delivering for working families. But we can’t do it alone. _**[If you’re interested in volunteering — phone banking, knocking on doors, writing letters to the editor, or anything else — please fill out this form. body:
If you want to help save our House Majority before it is too late, I'm pleading with you to read this memo from start to finish.

| |
---
| | | TO: Concerned American Patriots
FROM: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
RE: The State of Our Pro-Trump Majority
* * *

If you want to help save our House Majority before it is too late, I'm pleading with you to read this memo from start to finish.

_Our House Majority is on the brink of collapse._ The margins are closer than ever, three must-win Special Elections are closing in, and the Democrats are spending MILLIONS to overtake us.

**> >>> Where we stand:**

- President Trump was JUST sworn in as Commander-in-Chief and our Republican Trifecta is in full swing

- Mike Waltz JUST resigned from Congress to serve in the Trump Administration. As of right now, the size and strength of our House Majority FULLY DEPEND on Special Elections FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21

- House Democrats JUST launched a 10 million dollar smear campaign to undercut our House Majority and kneecap Trump's legislative agenda

**> >>> What's at stake:**

Our House Majority is one of the closest margins in 100 years. Don't forget - it's also the last line of defense standing between us ushering in the Great American Comeback and House Democrats completely dismantling EVERYTHING we just fought to win.

**> >>> Our plan of action:**

_The FIRST monthly deadline since President Trump took control is just days away and we 're dangerously behind our goal._

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The Power of Attitude: A Life-Changing Message
body:
Purpose over aimlessness
It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon’s report on my father.
| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=510d9d7ac5f94c09a2b5a6e783d84294&_e=RiIL75pjXjiXUGVdZv98xsnGUQzqDvRzsRfKPjUyGO1zawh41Qjb9IHdrChlBrg1tvYDNrqxt5zRK4CvWXAUnN9uxdgSv1IOHHEHotz2tlBufh5QDI2lEPCL_RSWMnLejrZyKizudz2-ZBY1B_1SOYuiD2uKtR1P2thOpRTEPWJUs74BUiCOk3sIwhC3D9w2KnAWTOV10nrPXZ9MOqmrrtBsxZiJMIGQRe65xmaO6rRgkONHLxmg58tQjIxyUYmWrt7QkOYZVzG1gCgyWdVVPkwZIlJq9cM_U04pvhMlUQKcnbEIrgzfjcaLahKSAWPWK56SfdTfIMO0Urna82ZYSCvSMNzZHNk8jPZq0Hp90aS8ARamAtcA8Ol1w1Z20GseZ0nf0r0zlvbFmoxMJPu5s2Q6wYGLbd2zbDow79earXLuTmeMo2oQdcKMdGhYZL0O)
---
Peter,

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father. My dad had been complaining for several months that he just wasn't feeling well. The doctors couldn't find anything, so they suggested exploratory surgery. When the surgeon came back into the waiting room, he said, "We found that he has pancreatic cancer, and it has spread everywhere. There is nothing we can do."

Of course, my brother, sister, and I asked the inevitable question that every doctor hates to answer: "How long does my dad have, do you think, Doctor?" He replied, "Well, it's impossible to know. It could be weeks. It could be a few months. It might even be a year. But attitude is everything."

That struck me. With all the medical technologies available, the doctor was saying that the greatest variable in my father's longevity would be something immeasurable but very real: his attitude. I immediately thought of a comment by William James: "Perhaps the greatest discovery of this century is that if you can change your attitude, you can change your life."

That statement inspired me to preach a series and write a book about the attitudes Christians should strive to adopt instead of those that come naturally. I'm talking about choosing things like:
---
* Purpose over aimlessness
* Perseverance over defeat
* Faith over worry

---
My book, _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , is being sent as a thank-you gift to anyone who donates to _Pathway to Victory's_ ministry work this month.

Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good. When we make that decision, the ramifications to our life and the lives of those around us are significant. I want to help you make the right choices.
---

clean_body: Purpose over aimlessness It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon’s report on my father. | | | Peter, It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father. My dad had been complaining for several months that he just wasn't feeling well. The doctors couldn't find anything, so they suggested exploratory surgery. When the surgeon came back into the waiting room, he said, "We found that he has pancreatic cancer, and it has spread everywhere. There is nothing we can do." Of course, my brother, sister, and I asked the inevitable question that every doctor hates to answer: "How long does my dad have, do you think, Doctor?" He replied, "Well, it's impossible to know. It could be weeks. It could be a few months. It might even be a year. But attitude is everything." That struck me. With all the medical technologies available, the doctor was saying that the greatest variable in my father's longevity would be something immeasurable but very real: his attitude. I immediately thought of a comment by William James: "Perhaps the greatest discovery of this century is that if you can change your attitude, you can change your life." That statement inspired me to preach a series and write a book about the attitudes Christians should strive to adopt instead of those that come naturally. I'm talking about choosing things like: Purpose over aimlessness Perseverance over defeat * Faith over worry My book, Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life , is being sent as a thank-you gift to anyone who donates to Pathway to Victory's ministry work this month. Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good. When we make that decision, the ramifications to our life and the lives of those around us are significant. I want to help you make the right choices. | | To get your copy of Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life , you can give a gift of any amount here: I pray that it alters the very trajectory of your life and ministry as a believer! name: Team GIFFORDS
subject: Extreme House Republicans just introduced a national permitless carry bill
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We cannot allow extreme Republicans to put the gun lobby’s agenda over public safety.
#

Friends -
Extreme House Republicans just introduced yet another bill that would advance the gun lobby’s “guns everywhere” agenda. This time, they’re pushing for national permitless carry.
Permitless carry allows almost anyone to carry a gun in public without a background check, any training, or having ever fired a gun. This makes it far easier for a gun to end up in the wrong hands.
A variety of research has been conducted about the impact of permitless carry laws on public safety. A comprehensive study from 2019 found that in states with weak permitting laws, violent crime rates were 13% to 15% higher than predicted if these laws had not been in place.
**We cannot allow extreme Republicans to put the gun lobby’s agenda over public safety.**
[**If you are ready to join us in the fight against national permitless carry, please contribute $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250125-1-b&t=1&akid=9885%2E3935704%2EqWFWS8)
