clean_body: How the evil empire co-opted cool to destroy American Independence | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? How the evil empire co-opted cool to destroy American Independence | | | Jan 25 | | | | | | | | | | | | This week America rejected the next generation of energy in favor of fossil fuels. Despite the fact that this initiative was pushed by an institutional industrial class of billionaires, the presentation of the whole thing had a flair of contrarianism. Like at a national level. Rejecting the next generation of energy was framed as if it were the victory of a great rebel alliance rather than what it actually is: embracing a fossil fuel empire focused on maintaining its wealth, power, and influence at the expense of our nation and everyone who lives here. It was disappointing to see how, here in America, supporting the billionaire class somehow become contrarian cool, so I decided to do a little research into the concept of cool itself. Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. I remembered that Matthew McConaughey had rocked some over-the-top cool in Lincoln commercials a few years ago, so I loaded and watched it to see what I could learn. Matthew McConaughey, the epitome of cool careless confidence, slows to a stop at a railroad crossing, empty rows of seats piled up behind him in his Lincoln Navigator. The shot cuts to his eyes, peering through the windshield, as a train approaches. He joins the rhythm of the rails by drumming the steering wheel with his hands. The crescendo rises as the train arrives and thunders through the crossing. He continues to rock out as the train passes. Finally, the gates open, and Mr. McConaughey flips a switch and laughs to himself. The SUV glides swiftly down the rustic rural road into the great unknown, Mr. McConaughey proudly at the helm. The beautiful gleaming body and rows of dark windows stretched gracefully behind him. A modern American peacock, trailing his long sleek steel tailfeathers for all to see. And then, I had an epiphany. A biological theory from the 1970s, called the handicap principle, tries to explain why animals like peacocks, deer, mandrills, and others develop costly and handicapping physical characteristics. It goes something like this: Animals seek the strongest mates. Therefore, animals have an incentive to cheat to look stronger than they actually are to attract a mate. Because of this, potential mates look for strength markers that cannot be cheated. Handicaps that are costly to develop and that have real consequences for the bearer, such as piles of cumbersome tail feathers, a massive rack of antlers, or bright colors. If an individual can survive and thrive despite squandering massive resources on a flashy encumbrance like those, so the theory goes, then that's the type of strength and survivability a mate would want for its children. In 1899, a , and well before the handicapping theory was first proposed for animals, an American economist and sociologist named studied similarly squanderous behavior in humans. He observed that the wealthiest class of people, whom he called the leisure class, demonstrated their wealth and success by spending their money or time wastefully. He labelled the behaviors conspicuous consumption and conspicuous leisure. Veblen believed that this type of behavior, which he considered terribly inefficient and a failure of capitalism, was a negative and costly drag on societies. And he was worried about the impact on society when normal people tried to mimic the leisure class's conspicuous consumption. Of course, in Veblen's time, there wasn't much opportunity for normal people to expend massive resources, even in the aggregate, on conspicuous consumption, so the resource intensive acts were mostly isolated to a small group. However, as parts of our society have become more affluent, conspicuous consumption has expanded across the socio-economic spectrum and is now more widely practiced and recognizable. On the individual level, and setting aside the desire to make moral judgments, a little conspicuous consumption doesn't seem like that big of a deal. If a retired couple wants to spend their money on a six-bedroom seven bath retirement home to heat and cool and live alone in, or a single commuter enjoys spending some of their hard-earned money to drag seven extra seats and an extra ton of metal down the roadway, who are we to judge? Shoot, as a father of three (soon to be four!) I have a three row Chevy Traverse in the driveway, and I drive it solo a significant amount of the time, just as coolly as Mr. McConaughey. (No, really, just like him, lol) Not only that but, like my grandfather before me, I've always been a sucker for cool cars. When I was younger I had a Chevy 350 and 700R4 transmission (the same as the Corvette and Camaro) in a 1974 Jaguar sedan and thought it was SO fun to burn people off the line. To get even more power, I rebuilt a massive 4 barrel Holley carburetor I got off eBay and slapped it on top. Considering how broke I was at the time, these probably weren't the best financial decisions, but the whole point of tailfeathers is that the signal carries a cost! And I was able to carry them, just barely. But the aggregate weight of the millions of tailfeathers we all carry, cultivate, and nurture is catching up to us. If not individually, then certainly at a national scale. And we need policies that incentivize our country overcoming or shedding that weight, not piling more on. In the animal world, the highest cost to building, sustaining, and transporting an ostentatious handicap like ornamental feathers or massive antlers is the extra energy required to grow the feature and then haul it around everywhere the animal goes. The same input, energy, is the primary cost of conspicuous consumption in humans as well. Since we have been talking cars, let's take a closer look at some of the aggregate implications of our perfectly normal individual decisions around what we drive. In 2023, the top three selling automobiles in America (sorry Mr. McConaughey and Lincoln!), were Ford F-Series, Chevrolet Silverado, and Dodge Ram pickup trucks-- vehicles that have gotten so large that many or parking spots anymore. Just like making a badass rack of antlers, making these modern driving goliaths takes a heavy investment of energy. Some back-of-the-napkin math: Using the US auto sales numbers of 726,624 F Series trucks (F-150 Lightning excluded), 444,926 Rams, and 543,319 Silverados, and a rough average weight of 5,000 pounds per truck, the total weight of the top three vehicles sold in 2023 comes to about four million metric tons of material. Uncool sedans like Toyota Corollas, in contrast, weigh about 3,000 pounds each. (Note: I'd use an American made example here, except that I can't, because in 2023 and don't like even giving consumers the choice anymore. The closest thing is a Malibu). So if we swapped out just one year of the top selling trucks for the three thousand pound corolla, as a country we would save around 1.7 million metric tons of material. Using vehicle averages of and , that's a savings of 1.02 million tons of steel and 170,000 metric tons of aluminum. In energy terms, since it takes about to make a ton of hot rolled steel using a basic oxygen furnace and about to make a ton of aluminum, the energy used just to make the additional metal in those 2023 trucks came to 10,028 GWh. From a national perspective, the swap creates enough energy to for that entire year. But that's just the tip of the extra energy iceberg. Let's skip the manufacture, assembly, and shipping part, because that's a lot to figure out on the back of a napkin, and move to the energy cost of moving those millions of tons of extra steel up and down the road every day. I call it "extra steel" because for the vast majority of us, that's all it is. Sure, in some cases a five seat crew cab, truck bed, and hauling power are needed for everyday work duties. In other cases, some of those things might be needed some of the time. But for most of us, they are largely irrelevant outside the occasional craigslist furniture purchase or backpacking trip. That's because most people drive to regular old jobs all by themselves. In 2023, the year we have been looking at, drove alone to work every day. The average number of workers per commuting vehicle was just 1.07, meaning that practically all the non-driver seats in any given commuter car, just like McConaughey's Navigator in the Lincoln ad and my Chevy Traverse when I go to work, are empty basically all the time. On an individual level, depending on your individual circumstances, the cost of buying and then dragging all that extra metal around all the time may not be that big of a deal. The gas to drive a modern full-size pickup versus a Corolla costs about an extra thousand dollars a year, so $12k or so there on the life of a vehicle, and then there's $25k or so in additional purchase price. Most people seem to have decided that the individual convenience and feeling of cool and power that comes from looking down from a massive crew cab is worth that extra dollar cost. Just like I did as a young man with my overpowered Chevy 350 - or the powder blue Dodge Ram I had right before it. | | ---|---|--- Me and my best friend Benyam flashing my Dodge Ram tail feathers in 2006 For our country, however, as Veblen foresaw, the cost of this conspicuous consumption is game changing. And I'm not just talking about the environment or health or any other so-called granola implications, although they are all at play. I'm talking about national security, American independence, war, and world power. In 2023, Americans drove . With 16.6% of vehicles being pickup trucks, and assuming an equal distribution of miles driven, that's 541.7 billion pickup miles consuming 27 billion gallons of gas. Converting just half of those truck miles into Corolla miles would save America 7.74 billion gallons of gas a year. That same year, we imported from Persian Gulf countries, which comes to roughly 6 billion gallons of gasoline. In other words, converting half those trucks to Corollas would save more than enough gasoline to finally flip the middle finger to the Middle East forever, to stop bowing down to the whims of authoritarian states like Saudi Arabia, to stop protecting their supply lines with our Navy, to stop going to war there, to reject their grifting and everything else that goes along with the unbalanced relationship we have with the region. And we could get rid of that dependence, and save trillions in overseas wars and supply chain policing, without even touching Matthew McConaughey's Navigator or a single SUV (like my Traverse, whew!), which there are way more of on the road than pickups. I suspect that everyone reading this agrees that our goal as a nation should be to enact policies that serve the national interest, not the billionaire class. Policies that put America at the lead or even in charge of the next generation of energy before another authoritarian state, like China, captures that lead and controls international security the way the Saudis and OPEC have over the last several decades. But we often do the exact opposite. actually encouraged the expansion of vehicle size by making it easier for larger vehicles to pass emission standards. Making the same branded vehicle longer and wider gave it a relatively larger break on emissions, so Detroit (who, of course, lobbied for the changes), made their vehicles bigger. Americans were simply given larger vehicles to purchase whether they wanted it or not. And as I pointed out with the 2023 American-made car lineup when I couldn't find a 2023 American made Corolla equivalent, Detroit largely stopped making smaller cars altogether, leaving us with few alternatives if we want to support our union brothers and sisters here in America. The Detroit and oil tycoons also secured and protect a for Americans to buy vehicles over 6,000 pounds. A subsidy for large vehicles so lucrative that it as it pushes thousands of Americans to buy one of those top 3 vehicles of 2023 that we have been talking about: the Ram, F-150, or the Silverado. Essentially, if you have a small business, even just a side hustle, you can write off the full cost of a vehicle that weights over 6,000 pounds-- it has to weigh over 6,000 pounds-- the first year you own it. For many thousands of people, that might actually make it cheaper up front to buy an F-150 vs Corolla. And now, this week, at the behest of the industrial class, we have pulled back the only incentives and plans in place to put America first in the next generation of energy and transportation before China secures its place as the world leader and we spend future generations kowtowing to that authoritarian state just like we did the Saudis. Combine all that with the fact that, as cars have gotten larger, it's hard to feel safe on the road in anything too small anymore, and you have the perfect storm for the situation we are currently in. Through policy and economics, our country is quite literally digging its own grave. So, what can we do? I believe it starts with messaging. Given the evil empire at work here, there has to be a way to tap into America's contrarian streak so that the empire is the empire again and future transportation and energy technology is cool and maverick. It actually used to be that way. When I was a kid, the only people who had solar panels were the ones who wanted to stick it to the utility companies because billionaire industrialists were "the man" of that generation that everyone hated. And being contrarian meant getting off the grid. For years, the only wind turbine that stood in mid-Missouri was outside the New Life Evangelical Center in New Bloomfield, owner of the local Christian TV station, Channel 25 KNLJ. The center was led by its contrarian director, Larry Rice, take a group of people into the City Hospital in St. Louis and sleep out front on cardboard with his ten year old kid to persuade the city to let him turn it into a shelter. Or put up crosses on the lawn of City Hall and the state Capitol to draw attention to unhoused people, according to the St. Louis Post-Dispatch. Now, though, solar panels and wind turbines are perceived as the domain of yuppies and activists, fueled in large part by propaganda campaigns led by the fossil fuel industry. Regardless of the reason, however, the narrative has been lost and the mission of anyone wanting to strengthen our country needs to be figuring out how to flip it back. Why shouldn't grid independence be as cool as a pickup truck? Interestingly, going back to the pickup vs Corolla discussion from earlier, the $37k in cost difference between the two would be more than enough for basically anyone who makes the switch to obtain utility independence through a solar system and battery storage. Something that, for most of us here in Missouri, where storms frequently knock out power, would be a lot more useful than being able to haul the occasional Craigslist couch. An anti-corporate power message rooted in American independence and contrarianism might be our best path to turn this ship around before it is too late. I'd love to hear what you think and, as always, please share with anyone you think might be interested in what we are talking about here! Lucas Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. Check this out...

It’s a powerful new security camera that puts YOU in control of your home security...

You control this camera’s every move with your smartphone.

No cords, cables or drilling... no installation required for the Cyclops. Just screw it into any standard light fixture.

Link up to 5 Cyclops Cams together to form a security perimeter around your home or office!

Oh wait, did I forget to mention that I’m giving you free shipping on these?

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: I’m fighting to give everyone the same shot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100968960/524496428/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20250125_FR_SameShot_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmVjNjM3OS0zZmRiLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P48f7RQuOn-blwTzUYltClrmKvgfqhqm8fuFJh5KtMg=&emci=85b28590-07d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=22ec6379-3fdb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=37438246) Hi there,

Jersey has given me so much. I wouldn’t choose anywhere else to raise my family.

But let’s face it: life in Jersey has gotten too expensive. The opportunities that I had as a kid growing up here don’t exist anymore. I hear it all the time – moms, dads, recent grads, and seniors telling me how much they love Jersey, but worry they won’t be able to afford to stay.

**I’m running for Governor to make sure everyone has the same shot I had. Since I first ran for Congress, my campaign signs have always said “Lower Taxes” at the bottom. That’s because I have always known my goal: **to make life in Jersey more affordable for everyone who lives here.**

I’m ready to get to work to protect reproductive freedom, fight crime, expand family leave and Pre-K so it’s universal, improve K-12 education, help parents take care of their aging parents, address the mental health crisis affecting our kids — and so much more.

I will continue to fight every day for Lower Costs, Lower Taxes, and Jersey Values. clean_body: | | Hi there, Jersey has given me so much. I wouldn’t choose anywhere else to raise my family. But let’s face it: life in Jersey has gotten too expensive. The opportunities that I had as a kid growing up here don’t exist anymore. I hear it all the time – moms, dads, recent grads, and seniors telling me how much they love Jersey, but worry they won’t be able to afford to stay. I’m running for Governor to make sure everyone has the same shot I had. In a minute, I’ll tell you more about my plan, but first, | | | | | | | Since I first ran for Congress, my campaign signs have always said “Lower Taxes” at the bottom. That’s because I have always known my goal: to make life in Jersey more affordable for everyone who lives here. I’m ready to get to work to protect reproductive freedom, fight crime, expand family leave and Pre-K so it’s universal, improve K-12 education, help parents take care of their aging parents, address the mental health crisis affecting our kids — and so much more. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: I went where Democrats seldom go

body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Friend,

In case you missed it, I was just on the most recent episode of All In , a conservative podcast, where we had a frank conversation about today’s top issues and I dispelled myths about Democrats and our values.

During the podcast I made something very clear: I don’t give a damn if Donald Trump wants to buy Greenland. What I care about are the Americans still struggling with skyrocketing grocery bills.

The price of groceries is too high. We make it too hard for people to start small businesses. Wages aren’t keeping up with costs. Families are feeling the strain every day. Instead of addressing real problems, the new Trump administration is busy making headlines with ridiculous distractions. Watch the episode here if you want the full scoop. [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X8n06Q4sTDw]

WATCH NOW » [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X8n06Q4sTDw]

We need leaders who will roll up their sleeves and focus on the issues that actually affect our lives. That’s what I’m doing in Congress, and that’s what I’ll continue to do – because you deserve better than this nonsense.

This is our chance to say enough is enough. If you’re ready to join me in fighting for an America that prioritizes people over politics, consider chipping in today. Let’s refocus on what matters and build the future Americans deserve. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2025-FR-January?refcode=E12051-20250125-AllInPodcast-SL-Event&&&&amount=25]

DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2025-FR-January?&refcode=E12051-20250125-AllInPodcast-SB-Event&amount=25]

I’m thankful for you, friend.

— Eric
DONATE TO ERIC » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2025-FR-January?refcode=E12051-20250125-AllInPodcast-footer-Event&amount=25]

name: Fight Oligarchy via Our Revolution
subject: Musk is one strong arm of Trump's Oligarchy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1011?refcode=email-20250125_v&akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Elon Musk is one strong arm of Trump’s Oligarchy, ready to lead the charge
on slashing funding for Medicare, Social Security, and Medicaid — all to
create hardship for working people and pass tax cuts for billionaires. But
these DOGE cuts are not a foregone conclusion.

Trump has a very slim majority in Congress, and legislation to cut
extremely popular programs like Medicare and Social Security is sure to
spark constituent outrage. Our 30,000 strong Citizen Action Team is ready
to jump into action for these political fights, mobilize in the Capitol,
and lobby members of Congress in every single congressional district in
the country — and we can only execute our plans with your support.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250125nd&akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7 ]As we fight back against Trump, Musk, and the worst of the Oligarchy's
plans, we need your help. Will you pitch in a donation of any amount to
support our nationwide network of activists who have shown they're ready
and willing to fight to preserve Medicare and Social Security?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250125nd&akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7 ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250125nd&akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7 ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250125nd&akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7 ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250125nd&akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7 ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250125nd&akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7 ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-20250125nd&akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Musk’s DOGE project is one example of Trump’s direct betrayals of the poor
and working class — putting crucial safety net programs on the chopping
block to fund outrageous tax cuts for billionaires and corporations.
Trump, Musk, and America’s giant corporations are all coming together to
plunder our tax dollars and outright privatize the government.

This means gutting Social Security benefits so seniors don’t have enough
money to live on, privatizing Medicare so health insurance CEOs can buy
more yachts while people are denied care, and slashing Medicaid so folks
in need can’t even see the doctor.

When we took time to survey our movement this week, our supporters
expressed that the most concerning part of Trump’s policy agenda is cuts
to Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security, and other crucial public services.
From the same survey, we know our supporters are scared, angry, and upset.
In this unprecedented political moment, you can stand with us because we
have a plan.

Our Grassroots Army is 30,000 strong and growing — and we will be directly
lobbying members of Congress in their home offices and in D.C. to win the
votes we need to block horrendous cuts to the social safety net.

On these high priority issues, we can build the pressure to knock off the
couple of Republican votes we need, but only if we have an overwhelming
show of force across the country — are you with us?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250125nd&akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7 ]Will you stand with Our Revolution and our Citizen Action Team with a
donation today? Every dollar will be used to build out our Grassroots Army
so we have the strength to fight back effectively in every part of the
country.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7 ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7 ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1007&akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7 ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1008&akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13136?t=1009&akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7 ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13139?t=1010&akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7 ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=7583%2E5885482%2EtxoSH7

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as

TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **_To Rep. Jamie Raskin — thank you for standing up against the MAGA Justices on the Supreme Court!_**

First, Justice Clarence Thomas was EXPOSED for accepting luxury vacations and bribes from GOP mega-donors. Then, he and fellow far-right Justice Samuel Alito REFUSED to recuse themselves from January 6th cases despite their EXTREME bias. **But now, you’re taking a stand to FINALLY hold the Supreme Court accountable for their blatant misconduct!**

[**I know Republicans are already plotting their revenge against you, so today, I’m fighting back and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my support for this bill and keep electing amazing Democrats like you! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86441?t=9&akid=18680%2E878179%2EDAelkG) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86441?t=10&akid=18680%2E878179%2EDAelkG)

name: Team Merkley
subject: Trump’s first week was disastrous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
We’re ready to fight Trump’s dangerous agenda at every turn.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100969594/524498516/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzg1ZjgzYy00MWRiLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uw4lIECVvkjcBQIZMLPokMyjC84PsmLrun0ObTn1ueY=&emci=38e48136-41db-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=0785f83c-41db-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Trump's first week in office has**been full of dangerous executive orders, chilling promises, and an ominous roadmap for what's ahead.** In his first few days, Trump has:
* **Issued pardons and commutations for the January 6 rioters** , giving get-out-of-jail-free cards to insurrectionists who attacked and injured police officers and desecrated our Capitol
* **Revoked birthright citizenship** , which is blatantly unconstitutional and inhumane and has already been blocked in court
* **Withdrew from the Paris Climate Agreement** , placed a moratorium on permitting for onshore and offshore wind, and opened up Alaska for drilling, making climate chaos even more lethal in the future
* **Laid the groundwork for devastating changes to the civil service** , which will allow him to purge civil servants and replace them with MAGA loyalists
* **Left the World Health Organization** , which makes us more vulnerable to pandemics and diseases like bird flu

The list goes on and on... **When we talked about Project 2025 being Trump's roadmap for his second term, we knew what was coming.** Now, our team is ready to fight his dangerous agenda at every turn, and Jeff Merkley will be at the forefront of the fight. [**We're asking you to help our movement stay strong and fight against Trump's MAGA agenda by pitching in whatever amount you can today, even if it's $5. clean_body: We’re ready to fight Trump’s dangerous agenda at every turn. | | | | Trump's first week in office hasbeen full of dangerous executive orders, chilling promises, and an ominous roadmap for what's ahead. In his first few days, Trump has: Issued pardons and commutations for the January 6 rioters , giving get-out-of-jail-free cards to insurrectionists who attacked and injured police officers and desecrated our Capitol Revoked birthright citizenship , which is blatantly unconstitutional and inhumane and has already been blocked in court Withdrew from the Paris Climate Agreement , placed a moratorium on permitting for onshore and offshore wind, and opened up Alaska for drilling, making climate chaos even more lethal in the future Laid the groundwork for devastating changes to the civil service , which will allow him to purge civil servants and replace them with MAGA loyalists Left the World Health Organization , which makes us more vulnerable to pandemics and diseases like bird flu The list goes on and on... When we talked about Project 2025 being Trump's roadmap for his second term, we knew what was coming. Now, our team is ready to fight his dangerous agenda at every turn, and Jeff Merkley will be at the forefront of the fight. = = Thank you, Team Merkley | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by ** Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Outrageous
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I am not defeated, and I am not afraid to stand up to President Trump. I can’t do it alone, though.
#

| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| Hey, it’s Mark.

President Trump granted complete immunity to all of the January 6th rioters who attacked the Capitol. He’s commuted sentences for violent criminals — people who beat up police officers. It’s outrageous, but that’s the point. The President is doing everything he can to make us feel anxious, scared, and defeated.

But I’m here to tell you: I am not defeated, and I am not afraid to stand up to President Trump. I can’t do it alone, though.

So please, if you can, use this link and make a donation to my Senate campaign: [**https://act.markkelly.com/go/1-25**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-jan25.ChccGr&refcode=em250125-1-f&t=1&akid=5950%2E6688874%2EKwVq5F)

It’d mean a lot to have you on my team.

Thanks.
**[DONATE $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-jan25.ChccGr&amount=3&refcode=em250125-1-f&t=2&akid=5950%2E6688874%2EKwVq5F)** Mark Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5950%2E6688874%2EKwVq5F).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. name: Team Pramila
subject: How we can win back the majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Now is the time to rebuild our movement and strengthen our recurring donor base.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250125-4702-footer&t=1&akid=4702%2E420207%2E3J8A54)
Peter,
It’s no surprise that grassroots fundraising slowed down after the election and over the holidays. But with our first end-of-month deadline of the new year approaching, it still hasn’t quite picked back up.
**With Trump back in the White House and Republicans in control of Congress, we don’t want to be in the position of missing our goals right now, Peter.**
There’s too much at stake for our progressive movement. That’s why we’re reaching out to our most dedicated supporters with a big ask:
One of the most effective ways to help Pramila organize Democrats around a bold, populist, working class agenda while preparing for attacks from right-wing groups who want to defeat her is by making a monthly contribution.
Now is the time to rebuild our movement and strengthen our recurring donor base. **Pramila knows we need to prepare early to fight back against MAGA and win back the majority in 2026 — and she can’t do it without you.**
[**Can we count on you to begin a monthly donation of any amount to Pramila’s campaign today? For the price of a cup of coffee, you can help sustain and grow our people-powered movement!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250125?refcode=em20250125-4702&recurring=true&refcode2=4702_420207_3J8A54&akid=4702%2E420207%2E3J8A54)

Thank you,
Team Pramila

| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=aa00a390fa694e9aae7a934a21c0f6a3&_e=oU24WSat-taQr2i2GUhx4wydIE5EcHvJSfm-G_INZYhOFx5MJ7tgEypDeGQfHwoLxy1zo86G9rj4Q3N_xQ8wNc4k3tEQMOByCzUVopZGdtkPTUTtaWaTeECxun3gRyAjkagZE3Jj9eMRq-mhhs03qdRABA6BKxY2FMN-xrz-GQInNVX2OZPMgNpn-JyhPYEOev0BFtzGecotBc8_dtQMkOZbcnbUEGOvO93kdO5xrz48ZkhKtUGuXRFHagaUORiVK0TD6AxI_T4CoW38Ym2FG4pv9Up5AsRFMgKDCVOyBDuXgYky9dq4LrXTzgY1W2nxIEqkTHVLp_nJk8eDNL5KMyO9nzWT8RzvGkApZI7t2ld8Z_PZpIfIW0iNuCcspMeTrjOHjmg0ZWnteiDkxLpuBA%3D%3D) [NO](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=aa00a390fa694e9aae7a934a21c0f6a3&_e=oU24WSat-taQr2i2GUhx4wydIE5EcHvJSfm-G_INZYhOFx5MJ7tgEypDeGQfHwoLxy1zo86G9rj4Q3N_xQ8wNc4k3tEQMOByCzUVopZGdtkPTUTtaWaTeECxun3gRyAjkagZE3Jj9eMRq-mhhs03qdRABA6BKxY2FMN-xrz-GQInNVX2OZPMgNpn-JyhPYEOev0BFtzGecotBc8_dtQMkOZbcnbUEGOvO93kdO5xrz5_c_kByMI7NGiAIaJS7KgcsxKphIY7cjJpkt_zAfdrOw2cFwWEP7iWU7IGDFKTQ2pN65t7fCRXq0BruvQVv6QJ9sRK5c3pCzXZ7BzZeuFBpZWG8DTiOB4KFNZaO9COZzUgZpZcjXnp9rXyVMOj2iNrL_JAclLw24GsdbRGqzC2Jg%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=aa00a390fa694e9aae7a934a21c0f6a3&_e=oU24WSat-taQr2i2GUhx4wydIE5EcHvJSfm-G_INZYhOFx5MJ7tgEypDeGQfHwoLxy1zo86G9rj4Q3N_xQ8wNc4k3tEQMOByCzUVopZGdtkPTUTtaWaTeECxun3gRyAjkagZE3Jj9eMRq-mhhs03qdRABA6BKxY2FMN-xrz-GQInNVX2OZPMgNpn-JyhPYEOev0BFtzGecotBc8_dtQMkOZbcnbUEGOvO93kdO5xrz48zhOwhDKVeAf0EYaoL7L3jvS4eYmrucZcidpZxVgus6GKzdDZDi6ujfqo2tJAXFrSp5nBhbKBG4PV5V4FnPoZlBtMdyRgV46dQE9Q2Q0E-OQ54JAFY_b-PRw9LcYWriKgaqlbGOi-cAJO0PAj3gqxpdN8Q8DsVA_RxYuHdTj2fw%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA .

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I remember a lot of talk about how expensive eggs were…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Well, we’re five days into his presidency. What have we seen?
#

Hey, Peter. It’s Ruben.
I remember a lot of talk about how expensive eggs were last year. I also remember Trump saying that on day one of his presidency prices were going to fall. Everything was going to get cheaper. You probably remember that, too.
Well, we’re five days into his presidency. What have we seen?
On his first day in office, Trump signed an executive order that slashed billions of dollars in projects and thousands of jobs in Arizona. He revoked an executive order that directed the federal government to negotiate drug prices for seniors. He pardoned a criminally convicted leader of a $200 million underground drug network. The list goes on and on and on, and it gets worse every day. **Oh, and egg prices are up more than a dollar since December of 2024!**
How, exactly, is this stuff supposed to make anything cheaper for anybody?
Look, if these guys want to work together to lower costs, I’m right here. I’m ready. But we’re not even a full week into Trump’s administration and we’ve already seen where their priorities are.
**Trump and Republicans in DC want to prioritize tax cuts for billionaires over health care for seniors, or jobs for working people, or the cost of living. End of story.**
Not if I have anything to say about it.
Arizona sent me to the Senate to fight for them, the same as I would fight for my own family. And if Trump and his team think they’re going to push through massive tax cuts for the most ridiculously wealthy people in the country while everything gets more expensive for working families, seniors, and veterans... they’ve got another thing coming.
We’ve got to hold firm now. Trump and his team are going to push us, but we cannot break. And to do that, I need you with me.
[**Will you make a donation of any amount — $15, $10, even $5 — and help me continue the fight we started when I first launched my campaign two years ago? It’d mean a lot to me.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan25.N6iRGd&refcode=em250125-1-90&t=1&akid=3673%2E734936%2EpWraUo)

clean_body: REGISTER NOW for the first annual Ohio Moms for America State Conference, March 21-23, 2025. Enjoy this awesome weekend of pampering, empowerment, and inspiration! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] CALLING ALL MOMS!!! Ohio Moms for America is excited to invite you to their FIRST STATE CONFERENCE! [] [] PAMPERED, INSPIRED, AND PURPOSEFUL MARCH 21-23, 2024 ~ THE AMISH DOOR INN 1210 Winesburg Street Wilmot, OH 44689 JOIN US FOR A TRANSFORMATIVE WEEKEND DESIGNED JUST FOR YOU! Pampering: Take time to relax, rejuvenate, and enjoy well-deserved self-care. Inspiration: Be empowered by an incredible lineup of speakers, including: Kimberly Fletcher – Moms for America Founder & President Al & Juleen Jackson – A dynamic team dedicated to strengthening families * Debbie Jansen, Tami Hirsch, Darbi Boddy, Tyler Ohta, Magistrate Erin Welch, Amie Williams – And more voices that will inspire and uplift! Purpose: Leave with practical tools, renewed energy, and a deeper commitment to advancing freedom in your home, your community, and our nation. This is more than an event—it’s a chance to connect with like-minded moms, recharge your spirit, and gain a fresh sense of purpose. REGISTRATION IS ONLY $85 (LODGING NOT INCLUDED) - SPACE IS LIMITED SO REGISTER NOW! Make this your time to be pampered, inspired, and purposeful. We can’t wait to see you there! REGISTER NOW [] Moms for America® Empowering Moms, Promoting Liberty and Raising Patriots! PLEASE CHECK OUT MOMS FOR AMERICA'S UPCOMING EVENTS! International law is clear, and our movement must also be clear that we won’t stop until Palestine is free. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWaOlYVL-5kpRcA3KP7xQhkgsJI_Yi6e6Q5sTqy5FfBPnYv1LpDRiMAg53fLkrbzX-0KHO94kaltwQaMVb_APBr6ryPjSiDGaEexOQS8-vgaNTxX9cgbBrYBZ-TqeBS2T2wybz32tRno6hlf3JttOIBaJKKHeHKShWVOlMilA8Fo2m9Oyv3L4dxkODhlaKw64WOGFiiKdz-_14KmZZNHrmpg/4dg/q1uo3bw4T9Gj2mSE9POMUQ/h0/h001.cBP9MueUuHH7uR4kDMDTcRhGtW9VBfb6G7fwCvqbLyc)
---
Friend, Palestinians and Israelis celebrated in the streets after mediators announced a temporary ceasefire deal. But in between the announcement and the beginning of the truce last weekend, Israel’s government killed hundreds of Palestinians in Gaza. After the start date for the truce, the Israeli military not only killed a young child in Gaza but also killed over a dozen Palestinians in the West Bank. **The ethnic cleansing of Palestinians has not stopped** , and it won’t stop unless the U.S. stops arming and funding Israel’s apartheid regime. Israel’s genocidal Prime Minister Netanyahu has already expressed skepticism about extending the Gaza ceasefire past this first six-week phase, and it remains to be seen whether even this first phase will be implemented as it should. **Even if a permanent ceasefire were secured in both Gaza and the West Bank, that would still not be enough.** Over the past 15 months, the Israeli government has destroyed most of Gaza’s healthcare system, agricultural lands, access to clean water, infrastructure, and other necessary conditions to sustain life. Even if Palestinians in Gaza are allowed to rebuild without being bombed, they cannot go back to the intolerable conditions that were in place before October 2023, including the years of Israel’s inhumane blockade of Gaza’s borders. At minimum, Israel’s government must abide by last year’s rulings from the world’s top court, which affirmed that Israel is carrying out apartheid and demanded that Israel fulfill its obligations under international law to ensure Palestinians’ right to return and right to self-determination. **The International Court of Justice ruled that Israel’s government must pay reparations to Palestinians and end its illegal occupation of Palestinian territories including Gaza, the West Bank, and East Jerusalem.** Most countries in the United Nations voted in agreement with these demands, and urged countries to enact arms embargoes and sanctions on Israel in the meantime. **International law is clear, and our movement must also be clear: We won’t stop until Palestine is free.** [**Please add your name to demand the Israeli government not only implement a permanent ceasefire, but also fulfill the rest of its obligations under international law, including: ensuring unrestricted humanitarian aid into Gaza and ending its long-standing blockade of Gaza, withdrawing from all occupied Palestinian territories including the West Bank, ending its 76-year-long practice of blocking Palestinian refugees from returning home, and paying reparations to Palestinians.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5NS1wNc1cxE-O5Q-WX7S4KQFCeKtGkLSDwAgpV6xgKYJHLZvOgB306VW9kAi_EzuftrfNUfRjpTW5eTmwiKu1iaXGKriUuluYXDRwM4WS7XxlYnFJ88qBK1YwNS-SOP_84UDXz3KNH3mFZkHaYgRi5GaPUANM_t4Jkc67ry4juaaLUkfaitHQvLh-fJU4ZpEFjl_XDDq9rH9JkJztN5puY1Ji9IpnWnm3ZTKIm0m7DoxBmSdLNfOT3rl8bSaRFRIimAYuqWSJsXn1LUhBUSdFFHCoNtur1Wiy7HwufdFzMDzYXzQLMadY0GrNBVLOWWGCUYuE5tz05L0n0cOoC02zxSFfqOYwOOqnfRpcL-S51CbiTNp7FVpe0Pe5JFigBlFcB5ff8pFmeh2voBpFKhUD1PxBx5OwRP2e_6ofBErgFoevXE_Kt2fZCJXnah-0OrDw/4dg/q1uo3bw4T9Gj2mSE9POMUQ/h1/h001.MeZDTUX6DKUVQ_47EMImGv8HSMrh6YknXOlY8lhmZnM) In the past 15 months, Israel’s military has forcibly displaced 2 million Palestinians, about 95% of Gaza’s population, often multiple times. Israel’s military has killed at least 46,900 Palestinans in Gaza, including at least 18,000 children—and injured at least 100,700 people.1 These are undercounts: According to a peer-reviewed study published this month in the Lancet, at least 70,000 Palestinians in Gaza were killed between October 7 2023 and June 30 2024.2 Since June, Israel’s military has continued to relentlessly bomb Gaza and commit clear war crimes by targeting children, medical providers and aid workers, and journalists.
**This has been a horrific genocidal escalation after 76 years of continued ethnic cleansing** , starting with the Nakba, when the state of Israel was created through the forced removal and murder of hundreds of thousands of Palestinians.
Now, nearly all of Gaza’s 2.3 million residents are experiencing “acute food insecurity” at crisis levels.1 Some humanitarian aid is getting through with this temporary Gaza ceasefire, but human rights groups like the World Food Program have said that they can only provide needed aid if Israel continues to allow unhindered access through all border crossings and ensures that aid workers can move freely and safely within Gaza.
**As an occupying power, Israel’s government still maintains tight control over Palestinians’ daily lives, including in the West Bank.** Even as Israel’s government has begun to release some imprisoned Palestinians as laid out in the ceasefire and hostage exchange deal, thousands still remain under “administrative detention”—indefinitely held without charge or trial while brutally tortured. For the detainees who do get charged, Israel’s illegal apartheid system sends Palestinian civilians (including children) through Israel’s unjust military courts, which have a 99% conviction rate of Palestinians.
**We cannot turn away or give up the fight for Palestinians’ liberation and human dignity, including the right to live on their own terms with true self-government.**
Until Palestine is free, **we must keep demanding countries like the United States stop supporting Israel’s illegal presence in occupied Palestine** —as required by international law and demanded last year by the International Court of Justice and the majority of United Nations member states, which have also called for sanctions and arms embargoes to pressure Israel to comply with international law.
**We must also keep pushing the U.S. to stop shielding Israel from accountability** , especially as one of the few countries that can actually veto UN measures—and has been the sole veto for multiple ceasefire resolutions and steps for Palestinian sovereignty. Instead of sanctioning Israel, most of my colleagues in the U.S. House of Representatives voted for sanctions against the International Criminal Court after its long-overdue decision to issue arrest warrants to Israel’s Prime Minister and Defense Minister for war crimes and crimes against humanity. Now Republican members of Congress keep threatening to condition aid for the Los Angeles wildfires, despite blocking any conditions on U.S. funding for Israeli war crimes.
**Our movement for Palestinian liberation cannot back down now.**
[**Will you sign the petition to demand countries act to ensure not only a**** _permanent_****ceasefire, but true Palestinian self-determination and liberation?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5NS1wNc1cxE-O5Q-WX7S4KQFCeKtGkLSDwAgpV6xgKYJHLZvOgB306VW9kAi_EzuftrfNUfRjpTW5eTmwiKu1iaXGKriUuluYXDRwM4WS7XxlYnFJ88qBK1YwNS-SOP_84UDXz3KNH3mFZkHaYgRi5GaPUANM_t4Jkc67ry4juaa9nzOCZ97uqix4NJGVjJfFbkjQGuiLtm7a9T9sEjWZ-uGECqJizdUPyaVNQwdTgWKEfAvzsGaNW6yFsj0Tn5v6TG0e0CFFgNM_hTCJ42VfKnAEomD4M4BU91AwQ2q1eouG4zWz-_XlYSXPO-cEAl4l-15v3qTPLpuilCTOxHw3r8oYBf-6w4Umbxpo7Rz2IVSdf6AVi4xn_6YOwbCPmUcfNyqOW4dW-63eXtwmsEvDmsH4o81sj6W3N1hgD-r5hfYsz0WRFtMNZVx-HpUDtT9p/4dg/q1uo3bw4T9Gj2mSE9POMUQ/h3/h001.rb7DlRxqjoL6lp8Wx6rD_FwvpANUgbb1_06xf239UJY)
Thank you for continuing to take action to support equal human rights for Palestinians. When we recognize our shared humanity and truly value all life, we create a safer world for all of us.
In love and solidarity,
Rashida

| Peter,

I’m back to work on the issues we care about most, and I want to keep you in the loop. **Before I do, my team is already laying the groundwork for 2026 victories, and we could use your help.[_Anything you can give today will go a long way in setting us up for success._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100971263/524503744/-898182107?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-01-25_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmI1MGQyZS00NmRiLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mz2PQFp3pOqyDBwaV7oBiYaYVmsM8HFRlQQJz5c1kYo=)**

I’m looking forward to continuing my work delivering for our communities here in the 38th district and across the country. Here are just a few things I’ll be focusing on this year:

**💲** Lowering costs for hardworking families and creating better-paying jobs.

**🌎** Protecting our environment and working to tackle climate change.

**💰** Improving our nation’s tax code so that it’s fair for everyone, not just the wealthy few.

**⚖️** Working to pass meaningful immigration reform and fight to protect Dreamers and other immigrants and keep families together.

Your support is what keeps this work going. With a Republican trifecta, I’ll be spending every spare minute holding them accountable and passing meaningful legislation for working families.

**That means I’ll also be spending less time building for 2026, so I need your help.[_Can I count on your support with a contribution of any amount today to become a 2025 Founding Donor of this campaign and help us lay the groundwork for 2026 victories?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100971266/524503748/-898182107?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-01-25_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmI1MGQyZS00NmRiLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mz2PQFp3pOqyDBwaV7oBiYaYVmsM8HFRlQQJz5c1kYo=)**

body:

Apple, Google, Tesla, Amazon, Nvidia, Microsoft, and Facebook

But according to Alex Green, seven new stocks are set to take over
during Trump’s second term.

Thanks to the sudden rise of AI, HE SAYS THESE STOCKS WILL DOMINATE
THE COMING YEARS [https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/2789ce156e574909b1a5afe6a3887205-1a97bd65bb054b679240541421537951/63].

name: Josh Harder
subject: Meet my new Finance Director
body:
Re: Michael

| | Peter, Did you see this email from Michael, our new Finance Director? I’m very excited he’s agreed to stay with us since this will be the toughest re-elect we’ve seen now that we’re in a Trump district. Michael is one of the strongest campaign staffers in the country, so it’s a big deal he’ll be running our fundraising operation. I’m excited for you to get to see how great he is! **Now that I represent a Trump district, we have extremely large goals we need to hit and I’m confident Michael will be able to lead this grassroots team to victory. MAGA and their dark money allies are already targeting us, and we need to hit the ground running.** **[That’s why I’d love to set a first-month fundraising record for our campaign this month. With just 5 days left to hit our $20,000 goal, can you chip in today to help us show MAGA that we’re ready for this fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100972438/524507160/-31595347?&refcode=E12054-20250125-MichaelKicker-SL-CampaignFinance&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDgyNGZkZTAtNDZkYi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TElrIjbRn5yKGTFnyP6mbQFd-ILjcPJAgECCXDAh43w=)** Thank you for helping us kick off this year strong! \- Josh

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100972441/524507163/-31595347?&refcode=E12054-20250125-MichaelKicker-SL-CampaignFinance&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDgyNGZkZTAtNDZkYi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TElrIjbRn5yKGTFnyP6mbQFd-ILjcPJAgECCXDAh43w=)** Hi Peter, I’m excited to share fun news - after working on Josh’s campaign last cycle, I have been promoted to Finance Director! I know how big of a responsibility this is, and I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work. I love working for Josh - he genuinely is one of the smartest and most driven representatives we have. He’s not afraid to stand up for what’s right - even if that means Trump and Elon decide to spend millions of dollars against him. **Last cycle our finance team was incredibly successful - we raised millions of dollars to win re-election - without taking a dime of corporate PAC money. It was all thanks to supporters like you who gave $5 and $10 at a time to help us win.** **[Now in my new role, I’m trying to make a big splash. I can’t tell you how proud I am to work for Josh. He’s a true public servant who really cares about our families. The issues he’s fighting for - lowering costs, fighting climate change, protecting our democracy - aren’t just talking points for him. He knows we need to change course because he wants a better future for his two young daughters.
**Josh is tough and willing to stand up to Donald Trump, MAGA extremists, and big corporations when they seek to harm our communities.**
But Josh’s district flipped towards Trump and now Josh has a giant target on his back. In fact, he’s one of the most endangered Democrats in Congress and we simply can’t afford to lose this seat if we want to take back the House majority next year.
**[That’s why I’m asking for your help. Will you please send in a generous donation to help me hit our first big fundraising goal of the year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100972470/524507213/-31595347?&refcode=E12054-20250125-MichaelKicker-SL-CampaignFinance&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDgyNGZkZTAtNDZkYi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TElrIjbRn5yKGTFnyP6mbQFd-ILjcPJAgECCXDAh43w=)**
Thank you for your support! Excited to be on this mission with you!
\- Michael Hammer
Josh’s Finance Director

clean_body: Re: Michael | | Peter, Did you see this email from Michael, our new Finance Director? I’m very excited he’s agreed to stay with us since this will be the toughest re-elect we’ve seen now that we’re in a Trump district. Michael is one of the strongest campaign staffers in the country, so it’s a big deal he’ll be running our fundraising operation. I’m excited for you to get to see how great he is! Now that I represent a Trump district, we have extremely large goals we need to hit and I’m confident Michael will be able to lead this grassroots team to victory. MAGA and their dark money allies are already targeting us, and we need to hit the ground running. = Thank you for helping us kick off this year strong! \- Josh —FORWARDED MESSAGE— = Hi Peter, I’m excited to share fun news - after working on Josh’s campaign last cycle, I have been promoted to Finance Director! I know how big of a responsibility this is, and I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work. I love working for Josh - he genuinely is one of the smartest and most driven representatives we have. He’s not afraid to stand up for what’s right - even if that means Trump and Elon decide to spend millions of dollars against him. Last cycle our finance team was incredibly successful - we raised millions of dollars to win re-election - without taking a dime of corporate PAC money. It was all thanks to supporters like you who gave $5 and $10 at a time to help us win. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- I can’t tell you how proud I am to work for Josh. He’s a true public servant who really cares about our families. The issues he’s fighting for - lowering costs, fighting climate change, protecting our democracy - aren’t just talking points for him. He knows we need to change course because he wants a better future for his two young daughters. Josh is tough and willing to stand up to Donald Trump, MAGA extremists, and big corporations when they seek to harm our communities. But Josh’s district flipped towards Trump and now Josh has a giant target on his back. In fact, he’s one of the most endangered Democrats in Congress and we simply can’t afford to lose this seat if we want to take back the House majority next year. = Thank you for your support! Excited to be on this mission with you! \- Michael Hammer Josh’s Finance Director *

subject: 1% of America controls 42% of the wealth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, take a look
at this:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250125?refcode=em20250125-36362&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36362_1203867_SSS3sA&akid=36362%2E1203867%2ESSS3sA ]Tweet by Mehdi Hasan: Run on this Dems. Just run on this. Tweet by More
Perfect Union: The bottom 50% of households hold just 2.4% of U.S. wealth.
The top 1% controls 42% of the wealth.

We agree, Mehdi! Wealth inequality and economic injustice are running
rampant in the United States, with billionaires rapidly gaining a higher
percentage of our nation’s wealth AND political power in Washington.

This issue is exactly what the Democratic Party should be prioritizing,
but instead, far too many Democratic incumbents are millionaires
themselves and out of touch with the everyday struggles of working-class
people.

If our Party wants to serve everyday people AND win more elections, it
needs to stop cozying up to corporations and the wealthy elite and start
building more working-class representation in the halls of power.

We’re pushing them to do just that. Our team at Justice Democrats is
currently recruiting working-class progressives all over the country to
run for Congress this election cycle.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250125?refcode=em20250125-36362&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36362_1203867_SSS3sA&akid=36362%2E1203867%2ESSS3sA ]If the Democratic Party refuses to change and continues to back
corporatist incumbents who got us into this mess, we’re gearing up to
challenge them in deep-blue districts come 2026. Directly support our
fight with $5 or more now →

Justice Democrats

name: Team Benson
subject: This week has been full of huge accomplishments
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=60%2E181023%2ENj6jkJ)
Hi,
This week has been one for the books! We’re proud to say we’ve built a powerful movement since Jocelyn announced her run for governor.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jbmi-em-20250125-1?refcode=em20250125-1&refcode2=60_181023_Nj6jkJ&akid=60%2E181023%2ENj6jkJ)
A slew of state and local elected leaders have come out in support of Jocelyn, acknowledging that now is the time for a more accountable and transparent government.
“She has all of the attributes that a great Governor needs: **toughness, bravery, and smarts** ,” said State Rep. Phil Skaggs.
We also announced endorsements from End Citizens United, EMILYs List and Vote Mama – our movement is strong and we are just getting started!
**[Our state needs a bold leader who will guide Michigan forward, and Jocelyn has the qualifications to do just that. Will you join us in the fight for democracy in Michigan by powering our campaign with a contribution?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jbmi-em-20250125-1?refcode=em20250125-1&refcode2=60_181023_Nj6jkJ&akid=60%2E181023%2ENj6jkJ)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jbmi-em-20250125-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250125-1&refcode2=60_181023_Nj6jkJ&akid=60%2E181023%2ENj6jkJ)**
Thank you for your continued support,
Team Benson

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-jbmi/?t=2&akid=60%2E181023%2ENj6jkJ)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=3&akid=60%2E181023%2ENj6jkJ)

Ferndale, MI 48220

name: Senator Tuberville
subject: Must defend our home
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND
body:
It is crucial for our national security.
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=2b592e5516c94ea895bc0dc1282a0b3f&_e=TwLGIr1_Fc4q4fDLRmBPdAFA8rcQ6rOFv9WJUFE8j3q8H7CO5lNiw4yIyVlk4rDc-fCPZO102iNwBil6F5gFHT6iaqJXosQeMGaoKeCDTgieK99CXbAuYveAIemL8F_stvtR492Y8iK-UHkj67LLvH8Iv7PDU4w6fPWL8jhmLZgqoXl4BTEtaDOK4DFE187ma40vnYek6BzxbzmMz2_MjcXU7dVs9jrRgHnFx84r0fVZdxHaywbjrBhw-o8zsJeirsbtHF2z_PfiguBroCGG_PePW0sER1XWsujgQZrK1fAac5KW_hxa0hgdYvgvw1v3maXHL4p5T17waQ1lfN3L-A%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

Over the past few years, we've seen an alarming increase in foreign purchases of American farmland and food companies, particularly by China. Our farmers deserve to have the access and resources they need to support the agricultural industry.

**_Food security is crucial to our national security._**

We cannot allow other nations like China, North Korea, and Russia to have influence over our critical supply chains.

| [ **STOP CHINA FROM BUYING OUR FARMLAND** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=2b592e5516c94ea895bc0dc1282a0b3f&_e=TwLGIr1_Fc4q4fDLRmBPdAFA8rcQ6rOFv9WJUFE8j3q8H7CO5lNiw4yIyVlk4rDc-fCPZO102iNwBil6F5gFHT6iaqJXosQeMGaoKeCDTgieK99CXbAuYveAIemL8F_stvtR492Y8iK-UHkj67LLvH8Iv7PDU4w6fPWL8jhmLZgqoXl4BTEtaDOK4DFE187mZO48uzO_LpL87LLY2j8cQMGW7HAGl6wEszHcHJ0Z4LqvIDEZ1ya044S7AEkwK2hzabbylsMNGbgSs83HD0BS_JWWtzUnhjY2QjxnfVOTy4o8L_uQ3CaxpdopPiHcgR19sKiiL6i9zloX03YBdZBvkg%3D%3D)
---

**We must defend our home.**

I will continue fighting to secure our agricultural supply chains so that American farmers can provide food for Americans.

_That 's why I'm sponsoring the Foreign Adversary Risk Management Act in the Senate. We must protect our home soil and put Americans first._

America relies on farming. Farmers need our support.

_The U.S. Secretary of Agriculture must have a full-time seat on the Committee on Foreign Investments in the United States. Without the Secretary of Agriculture's input, farmers will be left behind, and our national security will be at risk._

**I 'm reaching out today to inform you of the securities at risk and ask for your help.** [**Please join my team today and help me support our farmers.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=2b592e5516c94ea895bc0dc1282a0b3f&_e=TwLGIr1_Fc4q4fDLRmBPdAFA8rcQ6rOFv9WJUFE8j3q8H7CO5lNiw4yIyVlk4rDc-fCPZO102iNwBil6F5gFHT6iaqJXosQeMGaoKeCDTgieK99CXbAuYveAIemL8F_stvtR492Y8iK-UHkj67LLvH8Iv7PDU4w6fPWL8jhmLZgqoXl4BTEtaDOK4DFE187mvCutxDv2Hnh927HfaP2oJ1Rkz6aEcopzbrpW0aQ_gEjZs334FwDafFJLVLS8oE3MMPEUi1SBJ_Q-Bt23QU32VVF68GhkoQhMHzNyeZAV7cAOqhacF48fk86VQPJhDBA8yILOrM4aj2Qow__Wy7KmgQ%3D%3D)

[ **JOIN TEAM TUBERVILLE** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=2b592e5516c94ea895bc0dc1282a0b3f&_e=TwLGIr1_Fc4q4fDLRmBPdAFA8rcQ6rOFv9WJUFE8j3q8H7CO5lNiw4yIyVlk4rDc-fCPZO102iNwBil6F5gFHT6iaqJXosQeMGaoKeCDTgieK99CXbAuYveAIemL8F_stvtR492Y8iK-UHkj67LLvH8Iv7PDU4w6fPWL8jhmLZgqoXl4BTEtaDOK4DFE187m7POIFtwXlJLdlWzeCmws9OKiq9c2Pqf7-QrNqCY5GmBidFcL0lH-sZc4yHlFzMBB9HZn6JRtw-NEC8DJaHBmIEab2NP1zagtW9DxPQBGDwJPtQ0nSfrwkPDF6KhiasOtyq3t45Yp_ROy62NLoa3g_g%3D%3D)
---

Thank you,
Senator Tuberville

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=2b592e5516c94ea895bc0dc1282a0b3f&_e=TwLGIr1_Fc4q4fDLRmBPdAFA8rcQ6rOFv9WJUFE8j3q8H7CO5lNiw4yIyVlk4rDc-fCPZO102iNwBil6F5gFHT6iaqJXosQeMGaoKeCDTgieK99CXbAuYveAIemL8F_stvtR492Y8iK-UHkj67LLvH8Iv7PDU4w6fPWL8jhmLZgqoXl4BTEtaDOK4DFE187maUzvxaHyPpQ_iSicMUfNQH7MyScYSikmd4i3OhZ2QheEJ8G1XPTdkIAf-ikUqaG__YixsP-U6jmH3M6PioG6bOfEXgnLmTNSu5OIx9SiUjIHnVRcNxo6QLriGa3-jikFvsrVm_DP997ZR66wp2z7WQ%3D%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=2b592e5516c94ea895bc0dc1282a0b3f&_e=TwLGIr1_Fc4q4fDLRmBPdAFA8rcQ6rOFv9WJUFE8j3q8H7CO5lNiw4yIyVlk4rDc-fCPZO102iNwBil6F5gFHT6iaqJXosQeMGaoKeCDTgieK99CXbAuYveAIemL8F_stvtR492Y8iK-UHkj67LLvH8Iv7PDU4w6fPWL8jhmLZgqoXl4BTEtaDOK4DFE187mWWdCu56fa-KvxwLONVur6R1N68-kfJvapqxswaoEw3WPdHDF9QJUunTB2X5oEqRWX3zWibeDcb2Nwh3tKhyf1jw3Nrbp33qfVqiswiLJDPYTCxWFXrPTvYoQ8_ZoyynSHku-is5uck4JySFklhkAYQ%3D%3D)

---

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Why I started JanePAC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100974573/524512864/1328794144?refcode=ea.6361739c-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ms=ea.6361739c-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzNjE3MzljLTRkZGItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3hkIRyengMxEEUfvxFZImNj73e4jkPeFUUxyYRfitfw=&emci=81fdd895-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=6361739c-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=4823105)
---
Between the devastating fires raging in Southern California and Trump’s first reckless acts as president, it’s easy to feel discouraged. But in moments like this, I remind myself that there’s immense power when people come together to demand change. I hope this email inspires you as I tell you why I started JanePAC and what we’re fighting for together. But before I dive into the backstory, can I ask for your support? **[Just a few dollars today could help us power the climate fight in 2025.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100974576/524512865/2105508926?refcode=ea.6361739c-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ms=ea.6361739c-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzNjE3MzljLTRkZGItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3hkIRyengMxEEUfvxFZImNj73e4jkPeFUUxyYRfitfw=)** Over the years, my activism has taken me to some unexpected places — courtrooms, Congress, the White House, and even jail cells. I’ve been arrested, shouted at, and dismissed more times than I can count. But through it all, I’ve kept going, **because I believe we can leave the world better than we found it.** That belief is what kept me going in moments like this: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100974577/524512866/2105508926?refcode=ea.6361739c-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ms=ea.6361739c-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzNjE3MzljLTRkZGItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3hkIRyengMxEEUfvxFZImNj73e4jkPeFUUxyYRfitfw=) _(Not bad for a mugshot, right? 😉)_ And it’s that same belief that led me to climate activism. I’ll never forget one morning, years ago, when I woke up to skies stained red-brown due to nearby wildfires. I felt a deep sense of grief as I saw the damage. Even the birds were dying from it. It became crystal clear to me that the problem of climate change is too big and too complex to fight alone. That’s what motivated me to rally others and help build a movement to tackle this crisis. One of the turning points in my journey came when I read _On Fire_ by Naomi Klein. The science was undeniable: the climate crisis is here, and we have limited time to prevent full-blown climate catastrophe. So I reached out to Annie Leonard at Greenpeace USA, and together we soon launched Fire Drill Fridays. What started with an act of civil disobedience grew into a nationwide movement with thousands of people demanding action. As public support for climate action grew over the years, the actual policies we needed seemed to lose steam due to inaction from politicians on both sides of the aisle. It became clear to me that we not only need to raise hell, we need systemic change. That means changing policies at every level of government. And to change policies, we need leaders who aren’t beholden to corporate polluters — especially Big Oil. That’s why, in 2022, I started JanePAC to defeat the political allies of the fossil fuel industry and elect climate champions at every level of government. I am beyond proud of what we’ve accomplished together since then. But we’re just getting started — and we need you involved. **[Every dollar we raise fuels the fight this year to elect climate champions, block Big Oil’s dirty influence, and build a future where our planet and our people can thrive. Can I count on your support?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100974580/524512867/2105508926?refcode=ea.6361739c-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ms=ea.6361739c-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzNjE3MzljLTRkZGItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3hkIRyengMxEEUfvxFZImNj73e4jkPeFUUxyYRfitfw=)** Starting JanePAC was never about partisan politics or popular politicians — it was about our collective future. When I think about my grandchildren, their smiles light up my heart, but they also ignite a fire in me. I’m fighting for their future and for every family struggling to breathe clean air and drink clean water because of the fossil fuel industry’s unquenchable greed. Together, we can fight for a sustainable, clean energy future for everyone — you, me, your kids and grandkids, even the birds. But we all need to dig deep to make that a reality. **[Even $5 can make a huge difference as we gear up for the fights ahead in the coming months. Please, join me.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100974585/524512869/2105508926?amount=5&refcode=ea.6361739c-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ms=ea.6361739c-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzNjE3MzljLTRkZGItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3hkIRyengMxEEUfvxFZImNj73e4jkPeFUUxyYRfitfw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100974587/524512870/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.6361739c-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ms=ea.6361739c-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzNjE3MzljLTRkZGItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3hkIRyengMxEEUfvxFZImNj73e4jkPeFUUxyYRfitfw=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100974590/524512871/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.6361739c-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ms=ea.6361739c-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzNjE3MzljLTRkZGItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3hkIRyengMxEEUfvxFZImNj73e4jkPeFUUxyYRfitfw=)

[**DONATE $250**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100974599/524512874/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=ea.6361739c-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ms=ea.6361739c-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzNjE3MzljLTRkZGItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3hkIRyengMxEEUfvxFZImNj73e4jkPeFUUxyYRfitfw=) | [**OTHER AMOUNT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100974600/524512875/2105508926?refcode=ea.6361739c-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ms=ea.6361739c-4ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzNjE3MzljLTRkZGItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3hkIRyengMxEEUfvxFZImNj73e4jkPeFUUxyYRfitfw=)
