clean_body: | Between the devastating fires raging in Southern California and Trump’s first reckless acts as president, it’s easy to feel discouraged. But in moments like this, I remind myself that there’s immense power when people come together to demand change. I hope this email inspires you as I tell you why I started JanePAC and what we’re fighting for together. But before I dive into the backstory, can I ask for your support? = Over the years, my activism has taken me to some unexpected places — courtrooms, Congress, the White House, and even jail cells. I’ve been arrested, shouted at, and dismissed more times than I can count. But through it all, I’ve kept going, because I believe we can leave the world better than we found it. That belief is what kept me going in moments like this: = (Not bad for a mugshot, right? 😉) And it’s that same belief that led me to climate activism. I’ll never forget one morning, years ago, when I woke up to skies stained red-brown due to nearby wildfires. I felt a deep sense of grief as I saw the damage. Even the birds were dying from it. It became crystal clear to me that the problem of climate change is too big and too complex to fight alone. That’s what motivated me to rally others and help build a movement to tackle this crisis. One of the turning points in my journey came when I read On Fire by Naomi Klein. The science was undeniable: the climate crisis is here, and we have limited time to prevent full-blown climate catastrophe. So I reached out to Annie Leonard at Greenpeace USA, and together we soon launched Fire Drill Fridays. What started with an act of civil disobedience grew into a nationwide movement with thousands of people demanding action. As public support for climate action grew over the years, the actual policies we needed seemed to lose steam due to inaction from politicians on both sides of the aisle. It became clear to me that we not only need to raise hell, we need systemic change. That means changing policies at every level of government. And to change policies, we need leaders who aren’t beholden to corporate polluters — especially Big Oil. That’s why, in 2022, I started JanePAC to defeat the political allies of the fossil fuel industry and elect climate champions at every level of government. I am beyond proud of what we’ve accomplished together since then. But we’re just getting started — and we need you involved. = Starting JanePAC was never about partisan politics or popular politicians — it was about our collective future. When I think about my grandchildren, their smiles light up my heart, but they also ignite a fire in me. I’m fighting for their future and for every family struggling to breathe clean air and drink clean water because of the fossil fuel industry’s unquenchable greed. Together, we can fight for a sustainable, clean energy future for everyone — you, me, your kids and grandkids, even the birds. But we all need to dig deep to make that a reality. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for everything. xx Jane = P.S. If you’ve been impacted by the fires in Southern California and need a break from our emails, Take care of what matters most, and we’ll be here when you're ready. | = | = = Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: April McClain Delaney
subject: Trump just weakened healthcare access. Here’s how I’m fighting back. >>
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY APRIL MCCLAIN DELANEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hardworking families here in Maryland and across the country deserve leaders committed to finding common-sense solutions

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100974873/524513396/-1724203694?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2025-01-25_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjc1MmUxOGYtNGVkYi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3KpeIooaJ3QQaaTuysLTj5dXSfxmlMi226v27QKtFYg=)
---
| Peter,

This week, the Trump administration reversed critical Biden policies aimed at facilitating access to healthcare and strengthening Medicaid.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100974876/524513398/-1146661722?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2025-01-25_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjc1MmUxOGYtNGVkYi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3KpeIooaJ3QQaaTuysLTj5dXSfxmlMi226v27QKtFYg=)
This move is alarming, to say the least, as millions of Americans across the country continue to struggle with the costs of healthcare.

As disorienting as the executive orders signed this week, I want to reassure you that I’m doing what I can in Congress to safeguard our social safety net from extreme Republican policies.

**Just last week, together with some of my colleagues, we announced over $2 million in investments to increase healthcare access in Western Maryland and address our physician shortage.** Though our investments aren’t a safeguard against this reversal, it’s a necessary step in ensuring every Marylander receives access to affordable, high-quality healthcare.

[_**Hardworking families here in Maryland and across the country deserve leaders committed to finding common-sense solutions. As we work our way through the next four years, I hope you’ll consider donating $10 or whatever you can today to power our campaign.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100974877/524513403/-1146661722?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2025-01-25_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjc1MmUxOGYtNGVkYi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3KpeIooaJ3QQaaTuysLTj5dXSfxmlMi226v27QKtFYg=)

clean_body: Hardworking families here in Maryland and across the country deserve leaders committed to finding common-sense solutions | = | Peter, This week, the Trump administration reversed critical Biden policies aimed at facilitating access to healthcare and strengthening Medicaid. = This move is alarming, to say the least, as millions of Americans across the country continue to struggle with the costs of healthcare. As disorienting as the executive orders signed this week, I want to reassure you that I’m doing what I can in Congress to safeguard our social safety net from extreme Republican policies. Just last week, together with some of my colleagues, we announced over $2 million in investments to increase healthcare access in Western Maryland and address our physician shortage. Though our investments aren’t a safeguard against this reversal, it’s a necessary step in ensuring every Marylander receives access to affordable, high-quality healthcare. = | = | = | = | = | = Grateful to have your support, April * | | = PAID FOR BY APRIL MCCLAIN DELANEY FOR CONGRESS April McClain Delaney for Congress PO Box 83940 Gaithersburg, MD 20883-83940 United States | = = We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. name: The No Dem Left Behind Team
subject: Trump, Once Again, Cozies Up To Billionaires at Davos
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w7fwj-udkrld-kyd76rh2/)
---
# **Trump, Once Again, Cozies Up To Billionaires at Davos**
---
| | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w7fwj-udkrle-kyd76rh3/)
---
Hello friend, At the World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, President Donald Trump once again took the stage alongside the world's most powerful elites—billionaires like Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos—who have completely disconnected from the everyday struggles of working Americans. Trump’s remarks weren’t just about politics; they were threats. He called for NATO countries to spend more on defense, threatened tariffs on products made outside of the U.S., and baselessly accused Bank of America of not doing business with conservatives. These threats are not about protecting American interests—they are about **pushing forward the agenda of the super-wealthy elites** who fund his every move. This is no longer just a political struggle—it’s a **fight for the soul of our democracy.** The world’s richest individuals are pulling the strings, dismantling workers' protections, targeting immigrants, and reversing progress—all to line their pockets even further. They’ve replaced public service with profit margins, leaving everyday Americans powerless in the face of their unchecked wealth and influence. When Trump stood with billionaires on the inaugural stage, it wasn’t just a ceremony. It was the **coronation of an American oligarchy.** Trump’s so-called “golden age” was nothing more than a mask for the blatant pursuit of power and profit for the ultra-rich. This is no longer about democracy—it’s about **oligarchy**. A system where a few billionaires hold all the power, and the rest of us are left to fend for ourselves. Trump’s relentless attacks on government agencies, labor protections, and basic rights are nothing less than an assault on the foundation of our country, driven by greed and the desire to crush anyone who dares challenge them. History warns us about the dangers of concentrated power in the hands of a few. We’ve seen how it ends—**authoritarianism** fueled by a handful of super-wealthy oligarchs who have no interest in democracy, only in maintaining their control over it. [**_We cannot stand by and watch our democracy crumble while the ultra-wealthy make threats at Davos and pull the strings in Washington. It’s time to stand up and fight back against the oligarchy that is poisoning our nation._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w7fwj-udkrlf-kyd76rh4/)
---

---

---
Thank you for your support in this pivotal time.
---

Hi Peter, As you probably already heard, Oregon’s 2025 legislative session commenced on Tuesday, January 21st! This session, the Oregon League of Conservation Voters is committed to doing all we can to protect our state’s climate and environment, because our planet is worth protecting. You know that as a member of OLCV. **[Will you help us raise the bar for protecting our planet this session?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100974973/524513648/-1698714710?am=20&contactdata=wyaUjqwWJhMgDs2/k83a3zEJ4pdWx1xRWd2EHTLbpMW/tWGktfa1IlNueh8mWCOUklaJ2vM8xZIdpK1/NuaRgjaxpzHTNJPNlNVFyAznRCP+IFPCnXd5vsUDpguQZSVy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhNTJlMThmLTRlZGItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=z6vw4uUbXjDxe219pXjLKIHtR3k1cjmzNFd7Oe54_KA=&emci=70032e56-11da-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=ba52e18f-4edb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=2107230)** Oregon has a unique opportunity this year to be a beacon of hope for the rest of the country. With a pro-environment supermajority in both the Oregon House and Senate, now is the time to raise the bar for climate action - even under a Trump presidency. But how can we get there? It’s simple - through our _strong member support_. Member support has always been the driving force behind organizations like ours, and it’s because of you that our state has come as far as it has. There’s no denying that Oregon is a leader on climate, and we’ll keep fighting together to raise the bar. **[Will you help us get there by making a contribution of any amount?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100974975/524513650/-1698714710?am=20&contactdata=wyaUjqwWJhMgDs2/k83a3zEJ4pdWx1xRWd2EHTLbpMW/tWGktfa1IlNueh8mWCOUklaJ2vM8xZIdpK1/NuaRgjaxpzHTNJPNlNVFyAznRCP+IFPCnXd5vsUDpguQZSVy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhNTJlMThmLTRlZGItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=z6vw4uUbXjDxe219pXjLKIHtR3k1cjmzNFd7Oe54_KA=&emci=70032e56-11da-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=ba52e18f-4edb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=2107230) **

Without your gift, we don’t have the resources to recruit volunteers to speak directly with our elected leaders, build coalition forces to secure wins for important bills, educate Oregonians on timely legislative bills, or provide folks with an opportunity to take action. Without you, we can’t get the job done. **[Make a generous gift now so we can secure wins for our climate this session!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100974981/524513672/-1698714710?am=20&contactdata=wyaUjqwWJhMgDs2/k83a3zEJ4pdWx1xRWd2EHTLbpMW/tWGktfa1IlNueh8mWCOUklaJ2vM8xZIdpK1/NuaRgjaxpzHTNJPNlNVFyAznRCP+IFPCnXd5vsUDpguQZSVy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhNTJlMThmLTRlZGItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=z6vw4uUbXjDxe219pXjLKIHtR3k1cjmzNFd7Oe54_KA=&emci=70032e56-11da-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=ba52e18f-4edb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=2107230) ** These times may feel dark, but together we can make Oregon the bright light that it is. This session, the Oregon League of Conservation Voters is committed to doing all we can to protect our state’s climate and environment, because our planet is worth protecting. You know that as a member of OLCV. Oregon has a unique opportunity this year to be a beacon of hope for the rest of the country. With a pro-environment supermajority in both the Oregon House and Senate, now is the time to raise the bar for climate action - even under a Trump presidency. But how can we get there? It’s simple - through our strong member support. Member support has always been the driving force behind organizations like ours, and it’s because of you that our state has come as far as it has. There’s no denying that Oregon is a leader on climate, and we’ll keep fighting together to raise the bar. It will truly take all of us to achieve the that we’ve set for our state this year. Without your gift, we don’t have the resources to recruit volunteers to speak directly with our elected leaders, build coalition forces to secure wins for important bills, educate Oregonians on timely legislative bills, or provide folks with an opportunity to take action. Without you, we can’t get the job done. These times may feel dark, but together we can make Oregon the bright light that it is. Let’s show each other what’s possible. | | Many thanks, Sarah Kline (she/they) OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

---

President Donald Trump **[publicly humiliated woke Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass](https://substack.com/redirect/44dd821b-1507-4b8a-834f-ac1989c68708?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a roundtable discussion on Friday over the city's fumbled wildfire recovery efforts.
"We're the party of common sense, you are not!" Trump finally snapped.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/44dd821b-1507-4b8a-834f-ac1989c68708?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Trump strongly criticized the bureaucratic hurdles slowing down the rebuilding process. "You have emergency powers just like I do," Trump insisted, pushing for quicker action. "I'm exercising my emergency powers. You have to exercise them also."
Bass countered with concerns about safety, saying, "We want people to be safe," but Trump was quick to highlight local inefficiencies, "But the people are willing to clear out their own debris. It doesn't cost a lot."
**[The discussion grew heated](https://substack.com/redirect/44dd821b-1507-4b8a-834f-ac1989c68708?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when Trump questioned the city's definition of hazardous waste, stating, "What's hazardous waste? You're going to have to define that." His push for more immediate action was clear, and Bass seemed resistant.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/44dd821b-1507-4b8a-834f-ac1989c68708?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Trump SHOCKED when hurricane victim shares her story...**
A North Carolina woman told President Trump the hardship she has had to deal with in the aftermath of Hurricane Helene, saying **[her community has been left and forgotten by the government under the Biden administration.](https://substack.com/redirect/17b42179-acb0-4f05-a040-80e6af357bd7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"I'm embarrassed to even say I need help,..." the woman told Trump during a Friday press conference, during which the President invited up several community members to share their experience.
Trump consoled the woman in a touching moment, complimenting her and her family for their resilience. Earlier in the event, Trump agreed that FEMA is "a waste of time and money" and did not do enough to support the suffering American citizens in the aftermath of the disaster.
**[Watch the emotional moment below:](https://substack.com/redirect/17b42179-acb0-4f05-a040-80e6af357bd7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

Bass countered with concerns about safety, saying, "We want people to be safe," but Trump was quick to highlight local inefficiencies, "But the people are willing to clear out their own debris. It doesn't cost a lot." when Trump questioned the city's definition of hazardous waste, stating, "What's hazardous waste? You're going to have to define that." His push for more immediate action was clear, and Bass seemed resistant. A North Carolina woman told President Trump the hardship she has had to deal with in the aftermath of Hurricane Helene, saying "I'm embarrassed to even say I need help,..." the woman told Trump during a Friday press conference, during which the President invited up several community members to share their experience. Trump consoled the woman in a touching moment, complimenting her and her family for their resilience. Earlier in the event, Trump agreed that FEMA is "a waste of time and money" and did not do enough to support the suffering American citizens in the aftermath of the disaster. | | POLL Should federal aid to California for the wildfires be conditional? | ? ? ? Will you join our team? | | | | | ---|--- | BREAKING: The Pennsylvania House is TIED – a special election will determine chamber control If Democrats lose this seat, Republicans will flip control of the PA House, enact their extreme agenda, and threaten the freedoms of millions of Pennsylvanians. We aren’t being dramatic – we’ve already seen how Trump and his Republican allies in Washington are creating dangerous policies. If the GOP gains power in PA, they will work to pass far-right legislation at the state level. Even worse, they’ll build the momentum they need to flip statehouses red nationwide. Every moment and every dollar counts as we prepare to compete. So we’re asking: If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | This upcoming special gives our party an opportunity to show the GOP we’re committed to defending our Democratic majorities all across the country. name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: America is on the brink of destruction
body:
50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4964125e440848ef8d9b9831476b4538&_e=ZhHU3x_BOp4U1xzkwwJDfC0hjlmee44qUojkusc_yGBnE22r2o6TXFEBpI3MIHPANwxY-eFt1o5aiFPAP4GBd1aehPCINT9MgdpwhXJ7CsDrO1h-5sqzwqhZ_R-i6XTRhawI8mMRedZEPHB_kCJXJrokY9LmOP8wYjmQK9fU5nQ0PJIyAlAJ_w0NtxuirLCUi-yuqI7ef8g0Pa22nkRf03FRPFUYzo4zJF2liRNUGhceX_hJErgPpN-fgs82S_B6W3e94QAu-I1Yk9BcrGXPtLXARURDimKnQuhWoSNl_1U4h71BVuEYtZUEccNYqXUy4eFgPQ8XM_L9kEJ36opSBeoGPQH4xTnkMjVbyEhup0uPDg640ivdazj3241ZEavBeKMv53C8OHo5jXGHVbS9Zg%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4964125e440848ef8d9b9831476b4538&_e=ZhHU3x_BOp4U1xzkwwJDfC0hjlmee44qUojkusc_yGBnE22r2o6TXFEBpI3MIHPANwxY-eFt1o5aiFPAP4GBd1aehPCINT9MgdpwhXJ7CsDrO1h-5sqzwqhZ_R-i6XTRhawI8mMRedZEPHB_kCJXJrokY9LmOP8wYjmQK9fU5nQ0PJIyAlAJ_w0NtxuirLCUi-yuqI7ef8g0Pa22nkRf03FRPFUYzo4zJF2liRNUGhceX_hJErgPpN-fgs82S_B6Ih_zKhJ8QuA7maXT9Fr1sQcFSOjixlT8LsIgLyiKdvteUqQwlrNYY2OXPHIoHYDmuquTcNbw4cDPw2fgLTLI2vtHvlPwqL3JEXRDd6jlX1oP-KmXEuyYIwq90o9trE5EbQpvT_0xObX7lKXIc2VWTw%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4964125e440848ef8d9b9831476b4538&_e=ZhHU3x_BOp4U1xzkwwJDfC0hjlmee44qUojkusc_yGBnE22r2o6TXFEBpI3MIHPANwxY-eFt1o5aiFPAP4GBd1aehPCINT9MgdpwhXJ7CsDrO1h-5sqzwqhZ_R-i6XTRhawI8mMRedZEPHB_kCJXJrokY9LmOP8wYjmQK9fU5nQ0PJIyAlAJ_w0NtxuirLCUi-yuqI7ef8g0Pa22nkRf03FRPFUYzo4zJF2liRNUGhceX_hJErgPpN-fgs82S_B64dTpk8BR0Gnh_JfjOllEglQ8xJ6jl_9_lVa7wOAGxIxYZoRDdsvipTpBYMIrISgVYW28HBNyXzZjpRdSErYKVLzdFIb_FCjwJdL3fLXhOz0YeY0AeYZ7EBxAS7hkNLopw3NhHi4X_ewPAq1-d9c94g%3D%3D)**
---
| | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4964125e440848ef8d9b9831476b4538&_e=ZhHU3x_BOp4U1xzkwwJDfC0hjlmee44qUojkusc_yGBnE22r2o6TXFEBpI3MIHPANwxY-eFt1o5aiFPAP4GBd1aehPCINT9MgdpwhXJ7CsDrO1h-5sqzwqhZ_R-i6XTRhawI8mMRedZEPHB_kCJXJrokY9LmOP8wYjmQK9fU5nQ0PJIyAlAJ_w0NtxuirLCUi-yuqI7ef8g0Pa22nkRf03FRPFUYzo4zJF2liRNUGhceX_hJErgPpN-fgs82S_B68vkwwbLGabek07wMaE0kcL5p0N_pz8zhvud-8QHl7u-Mg_FrulzWmAQISlBvM7w7VKtiQG_At1beurugI1KH3Rm9Hakahf_JtfpyDgn33sPjIq6W0o0J2g42TgDv4z3om4Lf1HNxqb82yawLt4sT6g%3D%3D)

subject: What a movie ticket cost in 1950
body:
Elvis was on the radio, The Ed Sullivan Show was on the TV, and scores of people were hightailing it to the suburbs — this was 1950s America.

name: David Hogg
subject: This is about more than stopping Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We won’t give the GOP an inch.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250125-1&t=1&akid=1667%2E587540%2EQMyc2s)
Peter, President Trump just took office this week and – as expected – he’s already taking a number of dangerous actions with his new lease on power.
**We’re doing everything we can to hold Trump accountable, halt the worst of his agenda, and elect the young leaders who will fight for our progressive future.**
**[Will you donate $5 right now to power our mission in 2025 and beyond?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250125-1?refcode=em20250125-1667&amount=5&refcode2=1667_587540_QMyc2s&akid=1667%2E587540%2EQMyc2s)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250125-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250125-1667&refcode2=1667_587540_QMyc2s&akid=1667%2E587540%2EQMyc2s)**
Here’s a look at some of Trump’s new orders and actions on day one in office:
\- Blanket pardons for 1,500 of the January 6 traitors and insurrectionists.
\- The reversal of 78 Biden-era orders, undoing progress on racial equality, LGBTQ+ rights, climate policy, and lower prescription drug costs.
\- Removing the U.S. from the Paris Climate Accord... _again._
\- Restoring the use of the death penalty at the federal level.
\- Ending birthright citizenship (a direct violation of the Constitution).
\- Eliminating federal diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) programs.
\- Making it federal policy to acknowledge only two genders (male/female).
Peter, we know we have a lot of fights ahead of us over the next four years. It might seem overwhelming thinking about the path ahead of us. **But we cannot lose hope or lose sight of the progressive future we are all building together.**
**We must stay in the fight.**
And that means continuing to do everything we can to build progressive power in our state legislatures, take back the majorities in Congress, and ensure Trump is replaced by a progressive Democrat in the White House four years from now.
**Let me be clear: This fight is about so much more than stopping Donald Trump.**
Defeating the MAGA agenda is not enough. We have to offer _real,_ meaningful solutions to people’s problems and give the voters a reason to trust Democrats.
**We have to rebuild our party** – and that includes supporting young people who are stepping up and running for their state legislatures and seats in Congress.
**I believe in us, Peter.** I’ve seen the things we can accomplish when we band together to make a difference. We can do this. But we can’t give the GOP an inch. We need supporters like you to stay with us in the fight. It’s the only way we’ll win.
**[Leaders We Deserve is electing the next generation of progressives to defeat Trumpism and fight for our future. Support our work – donate $5 now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250125-1?refcode=em20250125-1667&amount=5&refcode2=1667_587540_QMyc2s&akid=1667%2E587540%2EQMyc2s)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250125-1&t=2&refcode2=1667_587540_QMyc2s&akid=1667%2E587540%2EQMyc2s)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1667%2E587540%2EQMyc2s)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1667%2E587540%2EQMyc2s)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

Peter,

We’re facing our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2025 – and the first of the Trump administration. Now, more than ever before, it’s critical we come out strong – _and I’ll explain exactly why:_

Republicans are in control of the White House _and_ both chambers of Congress. The stakes for our next election couldn’t be higher.

Their extreme agenda threatens reproductive freedom, affordable healthcare, our environment, and crucial programs like Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare that countless Americans rely on. And that’s just the start.

Peter, no one wakes up a month before an election with all the resources they need to win. If we want to protect the progress we’ve made and set the groundwork to take back the House, the Senate, and the White House in the years to come, we simply can’t afford to wait until the very last minute.

Winning takes time, resources, and preparation, and that work starts NOW. This early in the cycle, every dollar we raise builds the foundation we need to take on well-funded opponents and their special interest backers. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us start 2025 on strong footing by chipping in $5, $10, or any amount you can before our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of the name: GOP Surveys
subject: What is YOUR favorite Executive Order?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Let us know now!

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._P-WPORFyAtF6bFqfaQ)
---
President Trump hit the ground running, signing bold executive orders in his first days to tackle critical issues and put America First.

Here’s what he’s accomplished so far:

_✅Declared drug cartels as Foreign Terrorist Organizations_
_✅Renamed the Gulf of Mexico to the Gulf of America_
_✅Exited the Paris Climate Accord_
_✅Ended birthright citizenship_
_✅Exited the World Health Organization_

body:
C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a2dbb45d16d2471eb25d060e74ff9ea2&_e=UbtANieZpfI3-1fUgT_nUNk719igkDTyrE3EYJmxphMdUA8JwMi_Cp93CJQ_dTHe6yQhQts1pPo7-8Zke3W2cOCW33Lwsejb6aViDYG_BRuFcrrrDCoqmAJJ7227A0mdZIWfnAOgMWTRyP5k6zJLtnF02x9UIvfujbbJDjXoCTgveC7BD3vR-dqCPzTcgkQ7GDyNm9Fdzj-p-JHRCSqvyPO9bG01nwHJ5P4DljsEEU-u0GO7T58ZBkNTfhQU6rKIDE53eKP8Uzel5fzWXvdfIANT4IAJOp7ykHLuRDNCdrAIuVX41JVwKVm0slmLcIO6EEqVyLHZhMcd_bcmrCaitSnhtjkQ0d0kXMPxtAymSUSt576mmCgoC2VYqrEiK6Tco8mVw96_X4MqHoFoxQKhjTwm67gDcAz0SzumbqBZZ9ysywwpaUmv-b3agEdgYay8)
---
| | Peter, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a2dbb45d16d2471eb25d060e74ff9ea2&_e=UbtANieZpfI3-1fUgT_nUNk719igkDTyrE3EYJmxphMdUA8JwMi_Cp93CJQ_dTHe6yQhQts1pPo7-8Zke3W2cOCW33Lwsejb6aViDYG_BRuFcrrrDCoqmAJJ7227A0mdZIWfnAOgMWTRyP5k6zJLtnF02x9UIvfujbbJDjXoCTgveC7BD3vR-dqCPzTcgkQ7GDyNm9Fdzj-p-JHRCSqvyPO9bG01nwHJ5P4DljsEEU-u0GO7T58ZBkNTfhQU6rKIDE53eKP8Uzel5fzWXvdfIANT4IAJOp7ykHLuRDNCdrCEbjdGHhOCXGJAYoLKhl-AM1dTZMxivZlLypcCsQf9xHJ3DAGN-EWhB3UbjDTWRsGLtPxrV1jjVukGTKEtctZNqTjtWqKkdZDR5o-GEzDs69T1p8ye2O-tsVbD5ENJt4_lk2EFjIrXy1xR-VaJ5xFM)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a2dbb45d16d2471eb25d060e74ff9ea2&_e=UbtANieZpfI3-1fUgT_nUNk719igkDTyrE3EYJmxphMdUA8JwMi_Cp93CJQ_dTHe6yQhQts1pPo7-8Zke3W2cOCW33Lwsejb6aViDYG_BRuFcrrrDCoqmAJJ7227A0mdZIWfnAOgMWTRyP5k6zJLtnF02x9UIvfujbbJDjXoCTgveC7BD3vR-dqCPzTcgkQ7GDyNm9Fdzj-p-JHRCSqvyPO9bG01nwHJ5P4DljsEEU-u0GO7T58ZBkNTfhQU6rKIDE53eKP8Uzel5fzWXvdfIANT4IAJOp7ykHLuRDNCdrDW-gH3_5X-plzJNHMOuOA-U5HekiaCJFrI0lDWBPfpeInbs1Gf6v7Qxbgt4llxUDA_MCpvhT6D2Zj6qRxtLnj_gqlBnJb4Hoh3LNE97GAaRvyOf8xvxLbDmH6YUmV7vyycpfhOvDRzhrnvdhgRE8fO)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a2dbb45d16d2471eb25d060e74ff9ea2&_e=UbtANieZpfI3-1fUgT_nUNk719igkDTyrE3EYJmxphMdUA8JwMi_Cp93CJQ_dTHe6yQhQts1pPo7-8Zke3W2cOCW33Lwsejb6aViDYG_BRuFcrrrDCoqmAJJ7227A0mdZIWfnAOgMWTRyP5k6zJLtnF02x9UIvfujbbJDjXoCTgveC7BD3vR-dqCPzTcgkQ7GDyNm9Fdzj-p-JHRCSqvyPO9bG01nwHJ5P4DljsEEU-u0GO7T58ZBkNTfhQU6rKIDE53eKP8Uzel5fzWXvdfIANT4IAJOp7ykHLuRDNCdrBwCy6VTFm46g4l9EBObFsIsm5MW3ymRJjzw2Trxn8B_1j0ULWHPo6NCBUfHZ4rSjo1ZaNkkwZf3xkTYQMB9GracczugW69PKeXTSH9zH_pzNHevkUTOebEqLDMy26jaP9sA9mpzSaUVDQclwVuITEP).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning

_I 'm not a career politician._ I'm just a midwestern, minivan-driving mom on a mission to make our country stronger and that starts by securing our nation's future for the next generation.

I'm worried about the kind of country our children will inherit if the radical Left gets their way. The Left wants to **destroy** women's sports, **strip parents of their rights** in their children's classrooms, and let China **infiltrate** schools and universities.
_**[As a mom, I refuse to sit on the sidelines while the Left destroys our children's futures and the America we know and love.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=5765d7ef77b14f268a68e94ac2b47f66&_e=uPUr0qzSp64RA9Lc2Dvl-643uGWptiX9RC53dmk2nJ4teSXEo5Q3YBTLY_R4D5S-drSQ_DWUgfDirIY44mktudrj07zlFS-E3zi3onZ8UQAYIR-0hyAQB7iRoYuKGgyT-guLkxbVR4hSArK8zDccky_z8knGMVw5P9LcRfuSmFK5-ScBI7-ESU9WBXM4pHPhmCL61wm1PUq20hnhP8jk0ap2IZYcK2xmdRtNjJD7hB4Gc_nw4iOS-NByZGCi8Vq-UyQ-kCK5HFHLE8bfPvZn_IIPAciPY-ObLjL9Nt1ZTmeLCY1CWWgE4JlhYHeoDFMPPfn9Oc2xQzWXu2yRnfbVin-L9rPXAODjtwVs1SzwqMEmG847mLxtf7Lq2pEM42Oegbec4Lwpol32QuONE2Ll9AzYBes41M_4jsvxkMxLOE9AiDgIiDOZfofgl5ukpELpMmN-lpTGaSCb6OGDBwZx-TDYYl_5ucdQlD8Gg66O_1165Zo-k13lli_XPSEiAUxAzwGRpGEM_4XI_lmMS__odw%3D%3D "As a mom, I refuse to sit on the sidelines while the Left destroys our children’s futures and the America we know and love.")**_

Peter, I ran for Congress to empower parents to make the best decisions for their families. You have my word that I will NEVER back down from this fight.

_However, Peter, I can 't do it alone..._

So, I'm humbly asking for your support today to keep the Left's agenda **AWAY** from our kids and make sure parents, not government bureaucrats, are the sole decision-makers for their children. _**[Will you join me today?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=5765d7ef77b14f268a68e94ac2b47f66&_e=uPUr0qzSp64RA9Lc2Dvl-643uGWptiX9RC53dmk2nJ4teSXEo5Q3YBTLY_R4D5S-drSQ_DWUgfDirIY44mktudrj07zlFS-E3zi3onZ8UQAYIR-0hyAQB7iRoYuKGgyT-guLkxbVR4hSArK8zDccky_z8knGMVw5P9LcRfuSmFK5-ScBI7-ESU9WBXM4pHPhmCL61wm1PUq20hnhP8jk0ap2IZYcK2xmdRtNjJD7hB4Gc_nw4iOS-NByZGCi8Vq-UyQ-kCK5HFHLE8bfPvZn_IIPAciPY-ObLjL9Nt1ZTmeLCY1CWWgE4JlhYHeoDFMPPfn9Oc2xQzWXu2yRnfbVin-L9rPXAODjtwVs1SzwqMG_D8TNO4GZrkPz2sXKbCw2NKq095TJ5u41cJ2oUZ61IbHnj2EQZz8ITjdtU2xVlPTaW16RgpnpRSIQ9CoX0bu6IA_hLNKexR6C0-4Vx1ZJ9xfcmLlM0QJtneun9hcOGFgQgBGl4s_PtMB6OTM5ofAppSh0CqBE-K0aEhKJeICmEQ%3D%3D "Will you join me today?")**_

I'm Ashley Hinson, a Congresswoman from Iowa. You may not know me, but I'm hoping you'll at least do me the favor of meeting me by reading this in its entirety please.

**I 'm a mom, conservative, and Trump supporter.** I ran for office because I'm terrified of the world my boys will grow up in if the Democrats continue to take us down the path we're headed in.

The Radical Left that preaches __America is evil__ , supports terrorist groups like __Hamas__ , and wants to let __illegal immigrants vote__.

**I believe America can do better, and when I fight in Washington, I fight like a Mama Bear for my boys - and all of America's children.**

clean_body: On a mission to empower parents | | | | | "Hi, Peter, it’s Ashley." I 'm not a career politician. I'm just a midwestern, minivan-driving mom on a mission to make our country stronger and that starts by securing our nation's future for the next generation. I'm worried about the kind of country our children will inherit if the radical Left gets their way. The Left wants to destroy women's sports, strip parents of their rights in their children's classrooms, and let China infiltrate schools and universities. "As a mom, I refuse to sit on the sidelines while the Left destroys our children’s futures and the America we know and love." | | "STAND WITH ME" | | "PROTECT OUR KIDS" Peter, I ran for Congress to empower parents to make the best decisions for their families. You have my word that I will NEVER back down from this fight. However, Peter, I can 't do it alone... So, I'm humbly asking for your support today to keep the Left's agenda AWAY from our kids and make sure parents, not government bureaucrats, are the sole decision-makers for their children. "Will you join me today?" | | "STAND WITH ME" | | "PROTECT OUR KIDS" Thank you, | "Ashley Hinson \(R-IA\") | Ashley Hinson (R-IA) | | | ⚠️⚠️⚠️ Don 't close out of this email! "Ashley Hinson with President Trump" I'm Ashley Hinson, a Congresswoman from Iowa. You may not know me, but I'm hoping you'll at least do me the favor of meeting me by reading this in its entirety please. I 'm a mom, conservative, and Trump supporter. I ran for office because I'm terrified of the world my boys will grow up in if the Democrats continue to take us down the path we're headed in. The Radical Left that preaches America is evil , supports terrorist groups like Hamas , and wants to let illegal immigrants vote. I believe America can do better, and when I fight in Washington, I fight like a Mama Bear for my boys - and all of America's children. | | "STAND WITH ASHLEY" I 'm not some cookie-cutter lifelong politician who can call up corporate fat cats or rich liberals to hit my goals. I HATE sending you messages out of the blue like this. I never thought I'd have to be one of "those" types of people. "However, I rely on your $6 here and there to hit my goals because I want our conservative movement fueled by the conservatives who believe in our mission the most." | "STAND WITH ASHLEY" Democrats have tunnel vision when it comes to President Trump. They're blind with hatred because he defeated their all-but-coronated candidate, Kamala Harris. They hate everything we can accomplish under his leadership. I'm fighting to stop the Democrats, and I really hope you're going to stand alongside me in this fight! Thank you, Ashley Hinson | "STAND WITH ASHLEY" | Paid for by Ashley Hinson Victory Committee PO BOX 811 MARION, IA 52302 | To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add "info@mail.ashleyhinsonforia.com" to your address book. Not Sure How? Follow the link below to your email provider to get step by step instructions on how to add us to your address book. , , , , |

name: Cori Bush
subject: Introducing Politivist Action PAC: Our Fight Continues
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?refcode=em_250124_launch1_act&refcode2=x_012425_launch1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?refcode=em_250124_launch1_act&refcode2=x_012425_launch1]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?refcode=em_250124_launch1_act&refcode2=x_012425_launch1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?refcode=em_250124_launch1_act&refcode2=x_012425_launch1] Hey Peter,
Cori Bush here. It’s great to be writing to you all again. In August, AIPAC megadonors succeeded in buying our seat in Congress. But you may also remember that day, I vowed our fight didn’t end there.
I’m proud to introduce Politivist Action PAC — an organization born from our movement to uplift and empower leaders who champion peace, justice, and human rights for all. Can I count on you to become a founding donor to my new PAC today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?refcode=em_250124_launch1_act&refcode2=x_012425_launch1]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?refcode=em_250124_launch1_act&refcode2=x_012425_launch1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?refcode=em_250124_launch1_act&refcode2=x_012425_launch1]
I never thought politics was for someone like me. I’m the daughter of a former union meat-cutter, a survivor of gun violence, and a formerly unhoused single mother of two. My journey into activism began when Michael Brown was killed in Ferguson in 2014, and for over 400 days, I stood on the frontlines, demanding justice for Black lives.
When my community asked me to run for office, I took that leap. Together, we defeated a 52-year political dynasty and made history, proving that movements led by everyday people can change the course of history. But even as I served in Congress, introducing transformative legislation and delivering billions in funding for St. Louis, big money forces worked tirelessly to silence our movement.
And Peter, I won’t sugarcoat it — we have a bitter fight ahead of us. Trump and his extremist allies are gearing up to dismantle our progress, threaten our civil rights, deregulate environmental protections, and so much more.
Politivist Action PAC is our answer. It’s about building power from the ground up — supporting grassroots candidates who refuse corporate PAC money, confronting the rise of right-wing extremism, and driving forward the fight for racial, economic, and social justice.
This is a movement, not a moment. Let’s show the megadonors that they can’t buy our power. Join us in building a future where every leader is unbought, unbossed, and unapologetic in their fight for justice. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?refcode=em_250124_launch1_act&refcode2=x_012425_launch1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_250124_launch1_act&refcode2=x_012425_launch1] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_250124_launch1_act&refcode2=x_012425_launch1]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_250124_launch1_act&refcode2=x_012425_launch1] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_250124_launch1_act&refcode2=x_012425_launch1]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_250124_launch1_act&refcode2=x_012425_launch1] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_250124_launch1_act&refcode2=x_012425_launch1]
In solidarity,
Cori Bush
Founder, Politivist Action PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?refcode=em_250124_launch1_act&refcode2=x_012425_launch1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?refcode=em_250124_launch1_act&refcode2=x_012425_launch1] Politivist Action PAC is committed to driving social change by electing leaders who stand for peace, justice, and human rights. We build diverse, intergenerational movements to confront extremism, defend democracy, and promote racial, economic, and social justice. By rejecting corporate influence and fighting to eliminate big money in politics, we proudly support grassroots candidates who champion dignity and equality for all.

clean_body: [] [] Hey Peter, Cori Bush here. It’s great to be writing to you all again. In August, AIPAC megadonors succeeded in buying our seat in Congress. But you may also remember that day, I vowed our fight didn’t end there. I’m proud to introduce Politivist Action PAC — an organization born from our movement to uplift and empower leaders who champion peace, justice, and human rights for all. Can I count on you to become a founding donor to my new PAC today? [] [] I never thought politics was for someone like me. I’m the daughter of a former union meat-cutter, a survivor of gun violence, and a formerly unhoused single mother of two. My journey into activism began when Michael Brown was killed in Ferguson in 2014, and for over 400 days, I stood on the frontlines, demanding justice for Black lives. When my community asked me to run for office, I took that leap. Together, we defeated a 52-year political dynasty and made history, proving that movements led by everyday people can change the course of history. But even as I served in Congress, introducing transformative legislation and delivering billions in funding for St. Louis, big money forces worked tirelessly to silence our movement. And Peter, I won’t sugarcoat it — we have a bitter fight ahead of us. Trump and his extremist allies are gearing up to dismantle our progress, threaten our civil rights, deregulate environmental protections, and so much more. Politivist Action PAC is our answer. It’s about building power from the ground up — supporting grassroots candidates who refuse corporate PAC money, confronting the rise of right-wing extremism, and driving forward the fight for racial, economic, and social justice. This is a movement, not a moment. Let’s show the megadonors that they can’t buy our power. Join us in building a future where every leader is unbought, unbossed, and unapologetic in their fight for justice. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] OTHER [] In solidarity, Cori Bush Founder, Politivist Action PAC [] Politivist Action PAC is committed to driving social change by electing leaders who stand for peace, justice, and human rights. We build diverse, intergenerational movements to confront extremism, defend democracy, and promote racial, economic, and social justice. By rejecting corporate influence and fighting to eliminate big money in politics, we proudly support grassroots candidates who champion dignity and equality for all. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: standing up for VA’s federal workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
It’s official: Donald Trump reissued his “Schedule F” executive order, making it easier to fire Virginia’s federal workers and replace them with political appointees and loyalists.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100978054/524522655/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-01-25_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U2MGZjM2MtNTdkYi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XCOVL4rluM_80psZuhtcBsqHgz6YnbCt-c1-_23752k=)
---
| Peter,

It’s official: Donald Trump reissued his “Schedule F” executive order, making it easier to fire Virginia’s federal workers and replace them with political appointees and loyalists.

Virginia is home to thousands of federal employees who dedicate their lives to keeping America’s communities strong, safe, and connected. They are nonpartisan professionals who have devoted their careers to serving our nation.

When the President threatens to fire these federal workers and redesignate their jobs as appointee positions, he’s not only threatening the jobs and livelihoods of our Virginia neighbors and their families — he’s prioritizing political allegiance over nonpartisan expertise and experience in some of our country’s most consequential roles.

I’ve been steadfast in opposing the return of this reckless policy. It undermines Virginia’s economic stability and disrespects the invaluable contributions of America’s public servants. Across our Commonwealth, I’ve heard from federal employees, small business owners, and community leaders who share my concern about the devastating impact Schedule F could have on our workforce and economy.

_**I believe that our lawmakers should be focused on creating jobs — not creating chaos.**_

But I can’t fight back against this alone. I need your help to ensure we have the resources to protect Virginia’s workforce and push back against dangerous policies like Schedule F. [_**Will you contribute whatever you can today to support my campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100978056/524522657/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-01-25_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U2MGZjM2MtNTdkYi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XCOVL4rluM_80psZuhtcBsqHgz6YnbCt-c1-_23752k=)

name: Sheri, United We Dream
subject: Five ways to protect immigrants in your community🧡
body:
Guides, cards & more to stop ICE | | | Peter, It’s up to us to protect each other. Trump just gave his deportation agents unchecked authority to step into schools, hospitals, and places of worship to hunt down immigrants. We have stopped deportations under Trump before, and we can do it again. We must. There are many ways to protect immigrants. Here are my top picks:
* [**Join the Here To Stay Network**.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dC91rsipD286ESFr9EvsYLUJig4VkQHgcNi6qJi15c52cvqlbSjW0vWE2KPg1UqB89d56dMmpGweIKpWbDRvUnQx4WQDKwoRpdWblKxxSSZQckPffB_Nhe5bh4FafD23fAG7JWfmBRJXfdZzZeGO416s_TI-n9g8jGkdLAvi6uJPm65EumUbdm6vhR2tmd5mEzsWhJRAwkvdtbaO5GQOYuvCc2WDzJ-nvGMJ7POOwCQfFZ0c7ir7Wp9LEp2FHqRzlk1WdutEHnpz9xxv1GQan9D/4dg/gkF_1P3RS5mj5bcX9WZ6Hg/h0/h001.zcAB03sbtt5vRUsJwlLQI-6gH9PTlgEwK50BuwfjLZY) 📢✨ Make your bold commitment to protect immigrants and fight alongside us! In addition, learn how to make safer, accurate reports when you spot deportation agents in your city or neighborhood. 🤳🚔

The fact of the matter is that Trump will continue to recklessly use his Presidency to tear apart families and communities, in order to distract us from his goal of leaving the White House richer than he entered. Trump does not care about anyone but himself. But we care about our home and our future. Imagine what our communities could look like when we’re all able to flourish and have what we need — a warm meal, a roof over our heads, and healthcare to lead longer healthier lives. We have the power to help shape our shared future and drive that dream forward. When we protect immigrants, we are protecting the home we all deserve. Let’s unite to show Trump that immigrants are here to stay! We are in this together, Sheridan and the UWD team

name: Prudent Politics
subject: Milton Friedman: What does “created equal” mean?
body:
Please read the following message.
* * *

| | | | | [](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueareIteknop5I6ITm6cy0bmq&s=CAHFEOGHILKPKPKM)
---
| | Hi Friend, One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes.

They want life to be fair for everyone, and for all to have wellness, happiness, and financial security. But if the end goal of socialism is "equality", that begs the question: what is equality? Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other or are they in conflict?
---
| [](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueareIteknop5I7ITm6cy0bmq&s=CAHFEOGHILKPKPKM)
---
| | In this **[[25-page commentary](http://resources.hoover.org/created-equal-signup?utm_campaign=createdequal&utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=email&utm_content=AE-PRPOLEX60906&olc=37012)](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueareIteknop5I8ITm6cy0bmq&s=CAHFEOGHILKPKPKM)** , "Created Equal", legendary economist and Hoover fellow Milton Friedman answers these and other questions in great depth. You'll learn what Thomas Jefferson meant when he wrote the words "created equal" in the Declaration of Independence and how the meaning has changed through American history. You'll see how Friedman brilliantly illustrates differences between equality of opportunity and equality of outcome.

With many today striving to increase government power in the name of a concept of "equality", Friedman's words still ring true for those who believe that a society that puts freedom first will end up with both greater freedom and greater equality.

**[Please follow this link to get your free copy of "Created Equal" now.](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueareIteknop5I9ITm6cy0bmq&s=CAHFEOGHILKPKPKM)**
Thanks,

Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

body:
Trump has done enough damage in 6 days to last a lifetime!
| Folks, Trump has been President for just 6 days and **our Democracy Defense Fund memberships are already SOARING!!! 📈** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86447?t=6&akid=18681%2E878179%2EfnKrwL) [Democrats in your area are fighting back to stop Trump’s far-right executive order rampage, but we’re still waiting for you: Will you confirm your Democracy Defense Fund Membership ASAP? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86447?t=7&akid=18681%2E878179%2EfnKrwL) | [TOP DEMOCRATS NEEDED: CONFIRM YOUR DEMOCRACY DEFENSE FUND MEMBERSHIP IMMEDIATELY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86448?t=8&akid=18681%2E878179%2EfnKrwL)
---
_In just 6 days, Trump has:_

❌ **Rolled back Biden’s orders to lower prescription prices,
❌ Revoked Biden’s advancements for equality for LGBTQ+ people,
❌ Ordered mass deportations and ended birthright citizenship,
❌ _And he left the World Health Organization AND the Paris Climate Agreement!_**

If we don’t fight back FAST, the damage will be _irreversible,_ folks.

[**We need your help: Will you confirm your Democracy Defense Fund membership IMMEDIATELY to limit the damage that Trump can get away with? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86447?t=9&akid=18681%2E878179%2EfnKrwL)

_The Voter Protection Project_

(www.protectvoting.org)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18681%2E878179%2EfnKrwL). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18681%2E878179%2EfnKrwL).**

name: Gun Safety Team via ADP
subject: Can we count on your support?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Arizona Democrats
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-header]
Republicans balk at child fatality report recommending no guns in households with children
— AZ Mirror, January 17, 2025
“The annual report dug into the 853 child deaths that happened in the Grand Canyon State in 2023. The Child Fatality Review Team determined that 49% of those deaths were preventable, and that the second-most common cause of preventable deaths was firearm injuries, behind vehicle crashes. Child shooting deaths have increased 171% in the past 10 years, according to the Arizona Department of Health Services, with 68 deaths in 2023, which were all determined to be preventable.”
SUPPORT COMMON SENSE GUN LAWS [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CXNi2DWDgk6aXzcZJcze6Q2?contactdata=zuZexPLx3AbAD+I/8DwEjyRgTcMl8qSdgnEmo0p1bhXrZxduGFybR1Y57gYAgNrP4dECh8VAnUcvpqBwD1+6kQx8MI4ciMJ67RSWjzIQq1x6oYiWIypU0auomeMHxYXfNFh71MxBRTddB9tivlF8mQ==]
Folks — Democrats have worked hard to find common sense solutions to protect our communities from senseless gun violence, but the GOP has challenged our work at every opportunity.
Time and time again, Republicans have caved to the extremist gun lobby instead of taking action to make our communities free from gun violence.
They’ve blown this latest report completely out of proportion, starting a partisan outrage cycle to fill their campaign coffers instead of finding real solutions to end the gun violence epidemic.
Can we count on your support today? We need a strong coalition to fight for the common sense solutions we deserve.
SUPPORT COMMON SENSE GUN LAWS [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CXNi2DWDgk6aXzcZJcze6Q2?contactdata=zuZexPLx3AbAD+I/8DwEjyRgTcMl8qSdgnEmo0p1bhXrZxduGFybR1Y57gYAgNrP4dECh8VAnUcvpqBwD1+6kQx8MI4ciMJ67RSWjzIQq1x6oYiWIypU0auomeMHxYXfNFh71MxBRTddB9tivlF8mQ==]

subject: re: the United States Postal Service

body:
| Every Eligible American is committed to preserving a safe, secure, and accessible democracy for every eligible American, regardless of zip code. If you’d like to unsubscribe from our list, [**click here.**](https://valuethevote.us/l/XB6zMjAdnXwG)
---
| [ ](https://valuethevote.us/l/6E1xIggNJ123)
---
This is a petition for you... The United States Post Office has been under attack for years now, ever since far-right groups decided that voters having access to make their voices heard with mail-in voting cost them the 2020 election Despite no evidence of widespread election irregularities (or of partisan advantage in absentee voting), ballot access is still under attack. **And with a new administration sworn in this week, the USPS remains a top target for budget cuts.** Americans rely on the USPS for affordable communication and deliveries. We can’t allow partisan lies to destroy this vital institution. **[Join us and call on Congress to support the United States Postal Service. We need 120 local signatures before midnight.](https://valuethevote.us/l/VOd3nfYiq9kJ)**
---
[ **SIGN** ](https://valuethevote.us/l/KMgZGYcOTqIP)
---
Thank you, Every Eligible American

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.

clean_body: Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. And we need you to join us. | | | | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ | | Dear Reader In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. Every person matters in this effort. Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now. | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

# You're Invited - Nancy Mace
in Columbia, SC Monday Night!
---
| **Did you hear?!**

Congresswoman Nancy Mace announced she is considering a run for **Governor of South Carolina in 2026. **

Congresswoman Nancy Mace will be visiting Columbia for the first time since making this announcement on Monday, January 27th to speak at the Richland County GOP meeting. Congresswoman Nancy Mace will discuss the first week of Trump’s presidency and the future of South Carolina.

**When:** January 27th 2025
**Time:** 5:30 pm
**Location:** 930 Richland Street, Columbia, SC 29201

**RSVP** to [contact@richlandscgop.com](mailto:contact@richlandscgop.com)

name: Gay Valimont
subject: For this mom, the fight never stopped.

Team — it’s Gay Valimont, Democrat running in the upcoming FL-1 special election.

My story is special, so I hope you’ll take a second to read it.

**FIRST:** I worked as a gun violence prevention activist here in Florida, leading our chapter of Moms Demand Action. Tragically, I lost my husband and son to ALS and cancer.

**THEN:** I ran for congress against Matt Gaetz — and after narrowly defeating me he resigned just days later, betraying the people of Florida, and causing a special election!

**NOW:** We get another chance! AND when we win, we will get Democrats one seat closer to a HOUSE MAJORITY. **We can STOP Trump!** [**Trump knows his grip on Congress hinges on this seat! He’s pouring millions into the race, so I need you to split a donation between Fight for Reform to elect state and local Democrats and our campaign now to stop MAGA from taking total control. »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59017?t=7&akid=22791%2E4449941%2EfTYaVL) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Gay Valimont will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59018?t=8&akid=22791%2E4449941%2EfTYaVL)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: MartinHeinrich.com
subject: Martin knows the difference our public lands can make
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100978986/524525444/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250125_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGU1OGY4Zi02MWRiLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AzRlxwiJOHzJTZWJKnrnaOYIQER0M-0Wu5lRY2iNpp0=&emci=3fe58f8f-61db-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=44e58f8f-61db-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=252045)
---
Friends, As a father and a former outdoor educator, Martin knows how much of a difference getting outside can make for kids and their families. That’s why he reached across the aisle to pass the _Every Kid Outdoors Extension Act_ — a bipartisan piece of legislation that will extend free access to national parks to fourth graders and their families through 2031. This wildly successful program has encouraged tens of thousands of families to explore America’s public lands and historic sites, and ensuring its longevity will enrich the lives of many more New Mexicans for years to come. **Martin will always be a champion for our public lands because the next generation deserves to enjoy the lands that help define our nation.** **[If you’re in support of legislation like the _Every Kid Outdoors Extension Act_ that protects these natural resources and makes them more accessible, please sign our petition today >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100978987/524525445/810713211?contactdata=FU2OxrPfAZ8epU9NCHzQk5RSxAL5FdOZpIP4Xs0RwWvoMe2LzraOPpWKihjuWSNU149ylLAtPvfKR4ADj1WipAXHMkcrsu9hWrZLR8zKaq3I+obmqe4dp0MUHYNi55H46O+rD2URrrMuMXGK49DYEA==&refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250125_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGU1OGY4Zi02MWRiLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AzRlxwiJOHzJTZWJKnrnaOYIQER0M-0Wu5lRY2iNpp0=&emci=3fe58f8f-61db-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=44e58f8f-61db-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=252045)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100978988/524525446/810713211?contactdata=FU2OxrPfAZ8epU9NCHzQk5RSxAL5FdOZpIP4Xs0RwWvoMe2LzraOPpWKihjuWSNU149ylLAtPvfKR4ADj1WipAXHMkcrsu9hWrZLR8zKaq3I+obmqe4dp0MUHYNi55H46O+rD2URrrMuMXGK49DYEA==&refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250125_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGU1OGY4Zi02MWRiLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AzRlxwiJOHzJTZWJKnrnaOYIQER0M-0Wu5lRY2iNpp0=&emci=3fe58f8f-61db-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=44e58f8f-61db-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=252045)

Together, we can hold the line against any attacks on our public lands and defend the values that make New Mexico and our country strong.
Thank you for supporting our fight,
Team Heinrich
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

name: Blake Gendebien
subject: Why I’m running for Elise Stefanik’s seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| Hi Peter, I’m Blake Gendebien.

I’m a husband, father, dairy farmer, and business owner who was born and raised in the North Country.

I’m excited to announce that I’m running for Congress here in New York’s 21st District.

[Will you split $10 between my campaign and Ritchie Torres today to help us kickstart our campaign and flip this seat in the special election? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100979016/524525735/-1137810903?amount=10&refcode=RTFC_20250125_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGI4MjM4NC02M2RiLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=za3FJU_xhU3ijuju8wWyw64S88j4jfGc_LiT7TiTJls=) | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100979017/524525736/-1137810903?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=RTFC_20250125_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGI4MjM4NC02M2RiLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=za3FJU_xhU3ijuju8wWyw64S88j4jfGc_LiT7TiTJls=)
---
After serving in the Peace Corps, my parents moved to the North Country and started a dairy farm. I grew up working on the farm, earned a degree in agriculture, and later worked for a farm equipment manufacturer. For the past 22 years, with my family, I have owned and operated Twin Mill Farms, which currently has over 1,000 acres of land, 500 cows, and 12 employees.

Now, I’ve decided to run for Congress because the North Country is a national treasure and has been overlooked for far too long. It’s time for us to get the representation we deserve in Washington.

My experience as a farm owner, serving as Vice Chair on the Agri-Mark Board of Directors, and co-founding the Jules of Life Foundation – a nonprofit that assists patients and families battling cancer – has given me deep roots in our community.

**But this campaign isn’t about me; it’s about all of us.** It’s about all of the farmers, business owners, workers, families, teachers, coaches, and community members here in the North Country. I’m not running for Congress as a stepping stone to political power. I’m running because this is an opportunity to fight for the North Country, and I understand the challenges that folks here are facing.

[Will you split $10 between me and Ritchie Torres today to join us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100979018/524525737/-1137810903?amount=10&refcode=RTFC_20250125_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGI4MjM4NC02M2RiLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=za3FJU_xhU3ijuju8wWyw64S88j4jfGc_LiT7TiTJls=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Blake Gendebien and Ritchie Torres will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100979024/524525743/-1137810903?amount=10&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20250125_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGI4MjM4NC02M2RiLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=za3FJU_xhU3ijuju8wWyw64S88j4jfGc_LiT7TiTJls=)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $15 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100979025/524525744/-1137810903?amount=15&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20250125_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGI4MjM4NC02M2RiLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=za3FJU_xhU3ijuju8wWyw64S88j4jfGc_LiT7TiTJls=)
[Or a custom donation »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100979026/524525745/-1137810903?amount=20&amounts=10,15,20&refcode=RTFC_20250125_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGI4MjM4NC02M2RiLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=za3FJU_xhU3ijuju8wWyw64S88j4jfGc_LiT7TiTJls=)
Thank you,
Blake
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.
